                // 用户加入房间
                currentRoom = data.roomId;
                currentUser = data.userId;

                if (!rooms.has(currentRoom)) {
                    rooms.set(currentRoom, new Set());
                }
                rooms.get(currentRoom).add({ ws, userId: currentUser });

                // 通知房间内其他用户
                broadcastToRoom(currentRoom, {
                    type: 'user-joined',
                    userId: currentUser
                }, currentUser);
                break;

            case 'offer':
                // 转发offer给目标用户
                sendToUser(data.targetUserId, {
                    type: 'offer',
                    offer: data.offer,
                    from: currentUser
                });
                break;

            case 'answer':
                // 转发answer给发起者
                sendToUser(data.targetUserId, {
                    type: 'answer',
                    answer: data.answer,
                    from: currentUser
                });
                break;

            case 'ice-candidate':
                // 转发ICE候选
                sendToUser(data.targetUserId, {
                    type: 'ice-candidate',
                    candidate: data.candidate,
                    from: currentUser
                });
                break;

            case 'leave':
                // 用户离开
                handleUserLeave(currentRoom, currentUser);
                break;
        }
    });

    ws.on('close', () => {
        handleUserLeave(currentRoom, currentUser);
    });
});

function broadcastToRoom(roomId, message, excludeUser) {
    if (!rooms.has(roomId)) return;

    rooms.get(roomId).forEach(({ ws, userId }) => {
        if (userId !== excludeUser && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
            ws.send(JSON.stringify(message));
        }
    });
}

function sendToUser(userId, message) {
    rooms.forEach((users) => {
        users.forEach(({ ws, userId: id }) => {
            if (id === userId && ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
                ws.send(JSON.stringify(message));
            }
        });
    });
}

function handleUserLeave(roomId, userId) {
    if (!roomId || !rooms.has(roomId)) return;

    const room = rooms.get(roomId);
    room.forEach(({ ws, userId: id }) => {
        if (id === userId) {
            room.delete({ ws, userId: id });
        }
    });

    // 通知房间内其他用户
    broadcastToRoom(roomId, {
        type: 'user-left',
        userId: userId
    }, userId);

    if (room.size === 0) {
        rooms.delete(roomId);
    }
}

2. ICE框架 (Interactive Connectivity Establishment)

ICE是一种用于NAT穿透的框架，它结合了STUN和TURN服务器来解决网络连接问题。

// ICE服务器配置
const iceServers = {
    iceServers: [
        // STUN服务器 - 用于获取公网IP和端口
        { urls: 'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302' },
        { urls: 'stun:stun1.l.google.com:19302' },
        { urls: 'stun:stun2.l.google.com:19302' },

        // TURN服务器 - 用于中继传输(当P2P失败时)
        {
            urls: 'turn:your-turn-server.com:3478',
            username: 'user',
            credential: 'password'
        }
    ]
};

// 创建PeerConnection
const pc = new RTCPeerConnection(iceServers);

// 监听ICE候选
pc.onicecandidate = (event) => {
    if (event.candidate) {
        // 将candidate发送给对端
        sendSignal({
            type: 'ice-candidate',
            candidate: event.candidate
        });
    }
};

// 监听连接状态变化
pc.oniceconnectionstatechange = () => {
    console.log('ICE连接状态:', pc.iceConnectionState);
    switch (pc.iceConnectionState) {
        case 'checking':
            console.log('正在检查连接...');
            break;
        case 'connected':
        case 'completed':
            console.log('连接成功!');
            break;
        case 'failed':
            console.log('连接失败，尝试TURN中继');
            break;
        case 'disconnected':
            console.log('连接断开');
            break;
        case 'closed':
            console.log('连接已关闭');
            break;
    }
};

3. 连接建立完整流程

// 完整的WebRTC连接建立流程

class WebRTCClient {
    constructor(options = {}) {
        this.options = options;
        this.pc = null;
        this.localStream = null;
        this.remoteStream = null;
        this.signalCallback = options.onSignal || (() => {});

        this.initPeerConnection();
    }

    // 初始化PeerConnection
    initPeerConnection() {
        const config = {
            iceServers: this.options.iceServers || [
                { urls: 'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302' }
            ]
        };

        this.pc = new RTCPeerConnection(config);

        // 监听远程流
        this.pc.ontrack = (event) => {
            console.log('收到远程轨道:', event.streams[0]);
            this.remoteStream = event.streams[0];
            if (this.options.onRemoteStream) {
                this.options.onRemoteStream(event.streams[0]);
            }
        };

        // 监听ICE候选
        this.pc.onicecandidate = (event) => {
            if (event.candidate) {
                this.signalCallback({
                    type: 'ice-candidate',
                    candidate: event.candidate
                });
            }
        };

        // 监听连接状态
        this.pc.oniceconnectionstatechange = () => {
            console.log('ICE状态:', this.pc.iceConnectionState);
            if (this.options.onStateChange) {
                this.options.onStateChange(this.pc.iceConnectionState);
            }
        };

        // 监听ICE候选收集完成
        this.pc.onicegatheringstatechange = () => {
            console.log('ICE收集状态:', this.pc.iceGatheringState);
        };
    }

    // 获取本地媒体流
    async getLocalStream(constraints = { video: true, audio: true }) {
        try {
            this.localStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia(constraints);

            // 将本地流添加到PeerConnection
            this.localStream.getTracks().forEach(track => {
                this.pc.addTrack(track, this.localStream);
            });

            return this.localStream;
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('获取媒体设备失败:', error);
            throw error;
        }
    }

    // 创建offer (发起方)
    async createOffer() {
        const offer = await this.pc.createOffer({
            offerToReceiveAudio: true,
            offerToReceiveVideo: true
        });

        await this.pc.setLocalDescription(offer);

        return offer;
    }

    // 创建answer (接收方)
    async createAnswer(offer) {
        await this.pc.setRemoteDescription(new RTCSessionDescription(offer));

        const answer = await this.pc.createAnswer();
        await this.pc.setLocalDescription(answer);

        return answer;
    }

    // 处理answer (发起方)
    async handleAnswer(answer) {
        await this.pc.setRemoteDescription(new RTCSessionDescription(answer));
    }

    // 处理ICE候选
    async handleIceCandidate(candidate) {
        try {
            await this.pc.addIceCandidate(new RTCIceCandidate(candidate));
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('添加ICE候选失败:', error);
        }
    }

    // 关闭连接
    close() {
        if (this.localStream) {
            this.localStream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
        }
        if (this.pc) {
            this.pc.close();
        }
    }
}

// 使用示例 - 发起方
async function startCall() {
    const caller = new WebRTCClient({
        onSignal: (signal) => {
            // 发送信号给接收方
            sendToPeer(signal);
        },
        onRemoteStream: (stream) => {
            document.getElementById('remoteVideo').srcObject = stream;
        }
    });

    // 获取本地流并显示
    const localStream = await caller.getLocalStream();
    document.getElementById('localVideo').srcObject = localStream;

    // 创建offer
    const offer = await caller.createOffer();
    // 发送offer给接收方
    sendToPeer({ type: 'offer', sdp: offer });
}

// 接收信号处理
function handleSignal(signal) {
    switch (signal.type) {
        case 'offer':
            // 接收offer并创建answer
            handleOffer(signal.sdp);
            break;
        case 'answer':
            caller.handleAnswer(signal.sdp);
            break;
        case 'ice-candidate':
            caller.handleIceCandidate(signal.candidate);
            break;
    }
}

2.1.3 NAT穿透技术

STUN (Session Traversal Utilities for NAT)

STUN服务器帮助客户端获取自己的公网IP地址和端口。

// STUN服务器示例响应
// 客户端发送请求到STUN服务器
// STUN服务器返回:
// {
//     mappedAddress: "203.0.113.1:54321",  // 公网IP和端口
//     xorMappedAddress: "203.0.113.1:54321",
//     responseAddress: "203.0.113.1:54321",
//     // ...
// }

// 使用STUN进行连通性测试
async function testStunConnectivity(stunServer) {
    const pc = new RTCPeerConnection({ iceServers: [{ urls: stunServer }] });

    // 创建数据通道用于测试
    const dataChannel = pc.createDataChannel('test');
    pc.createOffer().then(offer => pc.setLocalDescription(offer));

    return new Promise((resolve) => {
        pc.onicecandidate = (event) => {
            if (event.candidate) {
                console.log('STUN候选:', event.candidate);
                // 尝试用这个候选建立连接
                resolve(event.candidate);
            }
        };
    });
}

TURN (Traversal Using Relays around NAT)

当P2P连接无法建立时，TURN服务器作为中继服务器。

// TURN服务器配置
const turnConfig = {
    iceServers: [
        {
            urls: 'turn:turn.example.com:3478',
            username: 'user',
            credential: 'password',
            credentialType: 'password'
        },
        // TURN over TLS (更安全)
        {
            urls: 'turns:turn.example.com:443',
            username: 'user',
            credential: 'password'
        }
    ]
};

// TURN服务器性能测试
async function testTurnServer(turnUrl, username, credential) {
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const pc = new RTCPeerConnection({
        iceServers: [{
            urls: turnUrl,
            username,
            credential
        }]
    });

    const dc = pc.createDataChannel('test');
    const offer = await pc.createOffer();
    await pc.setLocalDescription(offer);

    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
            reject(new Error('TURN连接超时'));
        }, 10000);

        pc.onicecandidate = async (event) => {
            if (event.candidate) {
                try {
                    await pc.addIceCandidate(event.candidate);
                    clearTimeout(timeout);
                    const latency = Date.now() - startTime;
                    resolve({
                        success: true,
                        latency,
                        candidate: event.candidate
                    });
                } catch (error) {
                    reject(error);
                }
            }
        };
    });
}

NAT类型检测

// 检测NAT类型
async function detectNatType() {
    const stunServers = [
        'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302',
        'stun:stun1.l.google.com:19302'
    ];

    // 测试场景1: 不使用STUN的内部连接
    const pc1 = new RTCPeerConnection({ iceServers: [] });
    // ... 测试内部IP连通性

    // 测试场景2: 使用STUN获取公网IP
    const pc2 = new RTCPeerConnection({ iceServers: [{ urls: stunServers[0] }] });
    // ... 测试公网IP连通性

    // 测试场景3: 使用TURN中继
    const pc3 = new RTCPeerConnection({ iceServers: [{ urls: 'turn:example.com:3478', username: 'test', credential: 'test' }] });
    // ... 测试TURN连通性

    // 根据结果判断NAT类型:
    // - 完全圆锥型NAT (Full Cone NAT)
    // - 受限圆锥型NAT (Restricted Cone NAT)
    // - 端口受限圆锥型NAT (Port Restricted Cone NAT)
    // - 对称型NAT (Symmetric NAT)
}

2.2 媒体设备访问

2.2.1 getUserMedia API详解

// 基础用法 - 获取摄像头和麦克风
async function getBasicMedia() {
    try {
        const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
            video: true,
            audio: true
        });

        // 显示在video元素中
        const videoElement = document.getElementById('video');
        videoElement.srcObject = stream;

        return stream;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('获取媒体设备失败:', error);
    }
}

// 高级约束 - 精确控制媒体参数
async function getAdvancedMedia() {
    try {
        const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
            // 视频约束
            video: {
                // 指定设备ID
                deviceId: 'specific-device-id',

                // 分辨率要求
                width: { min: 640, ideal: 1280, max: 1920 },
                height: { min: 480, ideal: 720, max: 1080 },

                // 帧率
                frameRate: { min: 15, ideal: 30, max: 60 },

                // 宽高比
                aspectRatio: 16 / 9,

                // 编码器偏好
                codec: 'video/VP9',

                // 伪像控制
                noiseSuppression: true,
                autoGainControl: true,
                echoCancellation: true
            },

            // 音频约束
            audio: {
                deviceId: 'specific-device-id',

                // 回声消除
                echoCancellation: true,

                // 自动增益
                autoGainControl: true,

                // 噪声抑制
                noiseSuppression: true,

                // 音调
                voiceIsolation: true,

                // 采样率
                sampleRate: { ideal: 48000 },

                // 通道数
                channelCount: { ideal: 2 }
            }
        });

        return stream;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('获取媒体设备失败:', error);
    }
}

2.2.2 设备枚举与选择

// 枚举所有媒体设备
async function enumerateDevices() {
    // 首先请求权限
    await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: true, audio: true });

    const devices = await navigator.mediaDevices.enumerateDevices();

    const videoDevices = devices.filter(d => d.kind === 'videoinput');
    const audioInputDevices = devices.filter(d => d.kind === 'audioinput');
    const audioOutputDevices = devices.filter(d => d.kind === 'audiooutput');

    console.log('视频设备:', videoDevices);
    console.log('音频输入设备:', audioInputDevices);
    console.log('音频输出设备:', audioOutputDevices);

    return { videoDevices, audioInputDevices, audioOutputDevices };
}

// 设备选择UI示例
class DeviceSelector {
    constructor() {
        this.devices = null;
        this.selectedVideoDevice = null;
        this.selectedAudioInput = null;
        this.selectedAudioOutput = null;
    }

    async init() {
        this.devices = await enumerateDevices();
        this.render();
    }

    render() {
        // 创建设备选择下拉框
        const videoSelect = document.getElementById('videoDevice');
        this.devices.videoDevices.forEach(device => {
            const option = document.createElement('option');
            option.value = device.deviceId;
            option.textContent = device.label || `摄像头 ${device.deviceId.slice(0, 8)}`;
            videoSelect.appendChild(option);
        });

        const audioInputSelect = document.getElementById('audioInput');
        this.devices.audioInputDevices.forEach(device => {
            const option = document.createElement('option');
            option.value = device.deviceId;
            option.textContent = device.label || `麦克风 ${device.deviceId.slice(0, 8)}`;
            audioInputSelect.appendChild(option);
        });

        const audioOutputSelect = document.getElementById('audioOutput');
        this.devices.audioOutputDevices.forEach(device => {
            const option = document.createElement('option');
            option.value = device.deviceId;
            option.textContent = device.label || `扬声器 ${device.deviceId.slice(0, 8)}`;
            audioOutputSelect.appendChild(option);
        });
    }

    async switchDevice(kind, deviceId) {
        // 停止当前轨道
        // 重新获取带有新设备ID的流
    }
}

// 获取可用设备的能力信息
async function getDeviceCapabilities() {
    // 必须在获取流之后才能获取能力
    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
        video: true,
        audio: true
    });

    const videoTrack = stream.getVideoTracks()[0];
    const audioTrack = stream.getAudioTracks()[0];

    const videoCapabilities = videoTrack.getCapabilities();
    const audioCapabilities = audioTrack.getCapabilities();

    console.log('视频能力:', {
        width: videoCapabilities.width,
        height: videoCapabilities.height,
        aspectRatio: videoCapabilities.aspectRatio,
        frameRate: videoCapabilities.frameRate,
        deviceId: videoCapabilities.deviceId
    });

    console.log('音频能力:', {
        sampleRate: audioCapabilities.sampleRate,
        sampleSize: audioCapabilities.sampleSize,
        channelCount: audioCapabilities.channelCount,
        deviceId: audioCapabilities.deviceId,
        autoGainControl: audioCapabilities.autoGainControl,
        echoCancellation: audioCapabilities.echoCancellation,
        noiseSuppression: audioCapabilities.noiseSuppression
    });

    // 获取设置和约束
    const videoSettings = videoTrack.getSettings();
    const audioSettings = audioTrack.getSettings();

    console.log('视频设置:', videoSettings);
    console.log('音频设置:', audioSettings);

    // 清理
    stream.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop());
}

2.2.3 屏幕共享与媒体录制

// 屏幕共享
async function shareScreen() {
    try {
        // 请求屏幕共享
        const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({
            video: {
                // 可以指定特定的显示器
                displaySurface: 'monitor', // 'monitor', 'window', 'browser'
            },
            audio: true, // 共享系统音频 (仅部分浏览器支持)
            selfBrowserSurface: 'include', // 是否允许共享自己的浏览器标签页
            surfaceSwitching: 'include', // 是否允许切换共享源
            systemAudio: 'include' // 是否允许共享系统音频
        });

        // 监听用户停止共享
        stream.getVideoTracks()[0].onended = () => {
            console.log('用户停止了屏幕共享');
        };

        return stream;
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('屏幕共享失败:', error);
    }
}

// 媒体录制
class MediaRecorder {
    constructor(stream, options = {}) {
        this.stream = stream;
        this.recorder = null;
        this.chunks = [];

        this.options = {
            mimeType: options.mimeType || 'video/webm;codecs=vp9',
            audioBitsPerSecond: options.audioBitsPerSecond || 128000,
            videoBitsPerSecond: options.videoBitsPerSecond || 2500000
        };
    }

    start() {
        // 检查支持的MIME类型
        let mimeType = this.options.mimeType;
        if (!MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported(mimeType)) {
            // 尝试备选类型
            const alternatives = [
                'video/webm;codecs=vp8',
                'video/webm;codecs=h264',
                'video/webm'
            ];
            for (const alt of alternatives) {
                if (MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported(alt)) {
                    mimeType = alt;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }

        this.recorder = new MediaRecorder(this.stream, {
            mimeType,
            audioBitsPerSecond: this.options.audioBitsPerSecond,
            videoBitsPerSecond: this.options.videoBitsPerSecond
        });

        this.chunks = [];

        this.recorder.ondataavailable = (event) => {
            if (event.data && event.data.size > 0) {
                this.chunks.push(event.data);
            }
        };

        this.recorder.start(1000); // 每秒收集一次数据
    }

    stop() {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
            this.recorder.onstop = () => {
                const blob = new Blob(this.chunks, { type: this.options.mimeType });
                resolve(blob);
            };
            this.recorder.stop();
        });
    }

    pause() {
        this.recorder.pause();
    }

    resume() {
        this.recorder.resume();
    }

    getState() {
        return this.recorder ? this.recorder.state : 'inactive';
    }
}

// 使用媒体录制
async function recordScreen() {
    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({ video: true });

    const recorder = new MediaRecorder(stream, {
        mimeType: 'video/webm;codecs=vp9',
        videoBitsPerSecond: 5000000
    });

    recorder.start();

    // 5分钟后自动停止
    setTimeout(async () => {
        const blob = await recorder.stop();
        downloadBlob(blob, 'recording.webm');
    }, 5 * 60 * 1000);

    return recorder;
}

function downloadBlob(blob, filename) {
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = filename;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}

2.3 音视频编解码

2.3.1 视频编解码器详解

VP8/VP9

// 检查VP8/VP9支持
function checkVp9Support() {
    const video = document.createElement('video');

    // VP9支持检测
    const vp9Support = {
        'video/vp9': video.canPlayType('video/vp9'),
        'video/vp9; codecs="vp9"': video.canPlayType('video/vp9; codecs="vp9"'),
        'video/vp9; profiles="0"': video.canPlayType('video/vp9; profiles="0"'),
        'video/vp9; profiles="2"': video.canPlayType('video/vp9; profiles="2"')
    };

    console.log('VP9支持情况:', vp9Support);
    return vp9Support;
}

// VP9编码参数
const vp9EncodingParams = {
    // 编码质量
    quality: 'quality', // 'realtime', 'quality', or 'all'

    // 比特率控制
    bitrate: 2000000, // 2 Mbps

    // 分辨率
    width: 1920,
    height: 1080,

    // 帧率
    framerate: 30,

    // GOP大小
    keyFrameInterval: 300, // 每5秒一个关键帧

    // 纹理编码
    denoising: true,
    automaticResize: true
};

H.264

// H.264支持检测
function checkH264Support() {
    const video = document.createElement('video');

    const h264Support = {
        'video/mp4; codecs="avc1.42001E, mp4a.40.2"': video.canPlayType('video/mp4; codecs="avc1.42001E, mp4a.40.2"'),
        'video/mp4; codecs="avc1.42E01E, mp4a.40.2"': video.canPlayType('video/mp4; codecs="avc1.42E01E, mp4a.40.2"'),
        'video/mp4; codecs="avc1.64001f, mp4a.40.2"': video.canPlayType('video/mp4; codecs="avc1.64001f, mp4a.40.2"'),
        'video/mp4; codecs="avc1.64001f, ec-3"': video.canPlayType('video/mp4; codecs="avc1.64001f, ec-3"')
    };

    console.log('H.264支持情况:', h264Support);
    return h264Support;
}

// WebRTC中使用H.264
const h264Config = {
    codecs: [
        {
            mimeType: 'video/H264',
            clockRate: 90000,
            sdpFmtpLine: 'level-asymmetry-allowed=1;packetization-mode=1;profile-level-id=42001f'
        },
        {
            mimeType: 'video/rtx',
            clockRate: 90000
        }
    ]
};

AV1 (AOMedia Video 1)

// AV1支持检测
function checkAV1Support() {
    const video = document.createElement('video');

    const av1Support = {
        'video/av1': video.canPlayType('video/av1'),
        'video/av1; codecs="av01.0.01M.08"': video.canPlayType('video/av1; codecs="av01.0.01M.08"'),
        'video/av1; codecs="av01.0.05M.10"': video.canPlayType('video/av1; codecs="av01.0.05M.10"'),
        'video/av1; codecs="av01.0.12M.12"': video.canPlayType('video/av1; codecs="av01.0.12M.12"')
    };

    console.log('AV1支持情况:', av1Support);
    return av1Support;
}

// WebRTC中的编解码器优先级配置
const preferredCodecs = [
    { mimeType: 'video/AV1', clockRate: 90000 },
    { mimeType: 'video/VP9', clockRate: 90000 },
    { mimeType: 'video/VP8', clockRate: 90000 },
    { mimeType: 'video/H264', clockRate: 90000 }
];

2.3.2 音频编解码器

Opus

Opus是一种支持语音和音乐的音频编解码器，是WebRTC的默认音频编解码器。

// Opus编解码参数
const opusConfig = {
    // 比特率: 6-510 kbps
    bitrate: 128000, // 128 kbps

    // 采样率: 8000, 12000, 16000, 24000, 48000
    sampleRate: 48000,

    // 通道数: 1 (单声道) 或 2 (立体声)
    channelCount: 1,

    // 编码模式: 'voip' 或 'audio'
    // 'voip': 针对语音优化，语音处理效果好
    // 'audio': 针对音乐优化
    application: 'voip',

    // 帧大小: 120, 20, 40, 60, 80, 100, 120 (ms)
    frameSize: 20,

    // 复杂度: 0-10, 越高质量越好但计算量越大
    complexity: 10,

    // 信号类型: 'auto', 'voice', 'music'
    signal: 'auto',

    // 是否使用VBR (可变比特率)
    vbr: true,

    // VBR质量: 0-10
    vbrQuality: 8
};

// 在WebRTC中配置Opus
const audioCodecPreferences = [
    {
        mimeType: 'audio/opus',
        clockRate: 48000,
        channels: 2,
        sdpFmtpLine: 'minptime=10;useinbandfec=1'
    }
];

AAC

// AAC编解码支持检测
function checkAACSupport() {
    const video = document.createElement('video');

    const aacSupport = {
        'audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.2"': video.canPlayType('audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.2"'), // AAC-LC
        'audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.5"': video.canPlayType('audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.5"'), // HE-AAC
        'audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.8"': video.canPlayType('audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.8"'), // HE-AAC v2
        'audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.2"': video.canPlayType('audio/mp4; codecs="mp4a.40.2"'), // AAC-LC
        'audio/aac': video.canPlayType('audio/aac'),
        'audio/aac; codecs="aac"': video.canPlayType('audio/aac; codecs="aac"')
    };

    return aacSupport;
}

2.3.3 媒体流处理

// 音视频轨道处理
class MediaTrackProcessor {
    constructor(stream) {
        this.stream = stream;
        this.videoTrack = stream.getVideoTracks()[0];
        this.audioTrack = stream.getAudioTracks()[0];
    }

    // 静音音频
    muteAudio() {
        if (this.audioTrack) {
            this.audioTrack.enabled = false;
        }
    }

    // 取消静音
    unmuteAudio() {
        if (this.audioTrack) {
            this.audioTrack.enabled = true;
        }
    }

    // 暂停视频
    pauseVideo() {
        if (this.videoTrack) {
            this.videoTrack.enabled = false;
        }
    }

    // 恢复视频
    resumeVideo() {
        if (this.videoTrack) {
            this.videoTrack.enabled = true;
        }
    }

    // 替换视频轨道
    replaceVideoTrack(newTrack) {
        const sender = this.stream.getVideoTracks()[0];
        if (sender) {
            this.stream.removeTrack(sender);
        }
        this.stream.addTrack(newTrack);
        this.videoTrack = newTrack;
    }

    // 获取轨道设置
    getSettings() {
        return {
            video: this.videoTrack ? this.videoTrack.getSettings() : null,
            audio: this.audioTrack ? this.audioTrack.getSettings() : null
        };
    }

    // 获取轨道能力
    getCapabilities() {
        return {
            video: this.videoTrack ? this.videoTrack.getCapabilities() : null,
            audio: this.audioTrack ? this.audioTrack.getCapabilities() : null
        };
    }
}

// 使用Canvas处理视频帧
class VideoFrameProcessor {
    constructor() {
        this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d');
    }

    // 处理视频帧 (添加水印)
    async processFrame(videoElement, watermarkText) {
        this.canvas.width = videoElement.videoWidth;
        this.canvas.height = videoElement.videoHeight;

        // 绘制视频帧
        this.ctx.drawImage(videoElement, 0, 0);

        // 添加水印
        this.ctx.font = '24px Arial';
        this.ctx.fillStyle = 'white';
        this.ctx.strokeStyle = 'black';
        this.ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        this.ctx.strokeText(watermarkText, 20, 40);
        this.ctx.fillText(watermarkText, 20, 40);

        return this.canvas;
    }

    // 灰度处理
    async grayscale(videoElement) {
        this.canvas.width = videoElement.videoWidth;
        this.canvas.height = videoElement.videoHeight;

        this.ctx.drawImage(videoElement, 0, 0);

        const imageData = this.ctx.getImageData(0, 0, this.canvas.width, this.canvas.height);
        const data = imageData.data;

        for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i += 4) {
            const avg = (data[i] + data[i + 1] + data[i + 2]) / 3;
            data[i] = avg;     // R
            data[i + 1] = avg; // G
            data[i + 2] = avg; // B
        }

        this.ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);
        return this.canvas;
    }

    // 获取处理后的Stream
    getProcessedStream(videoElement, processor) {
        const processedCanvas = processor(videoElement);
        return processedCanvas.captureStream(30);
    }
}

// 音频处理
class AudioProcessor {
    constructor(audioContext) {
        this.audioContext = audioContext;
        this.gainNode = null;
        this.analyserNode = null;
    }

    // 创建音频处理图
    createAudioGraph(mediaStream) {
        const source = this.audioContext.createMediaStreamSource(mediaStream);

        // 增益节点 (音量控制)
        this.gainNode = this.audioContext.createGain();
        this.gainNode.gain.value = 1.0;

        // 分析节点 (用于可视化)
        this.analyserNode = this.audioContext.createAnalyser();
        this.analyserNode.fftSize = 2048;

        // 连接节点
        source.connect(this.gainNode);
        this.gainNode.connect(this.analyserNode);
        this.analyserNode.connect(this.audioContext.destination);

        return {
            source,
            gainNode: this.gainNode,
            analyserNode: this.analyserNode
        };
    }

    // 设置音量
    setVolume(value) {
        if (this.gainNode) {
            this.gainNode.gain.value = Math.max(0, Math.min(2, value));
        }
    }

    // 获取频率数据 (用于可视化)
    getFrequencyData() {
        if (!this.analyserNode) return null;

        const bufferLength = this.analyserNode.frequencyBinCount;
        const dataArray = new Uint8Array(bufferLength);
        this.analyserNode.getByteFrequencyData(dataArray);

        return dataArray;
    }

    // 获取波形数据
    getWaveformData() {
        if (!this.analyserNode) return null;

        const bufferLength = this.analyserNode.frequencyBinCount;
        const dataArray = new Uint8Array(bufferLength);
        this.analyserNode.getByteTimeDomainData(dataArray);

        return dataArray;
    }

    // 创建回声效果
    createEcho(delayTime = 0.5, decay = 0.5) {
        const delay = this.audioContext.createDelay();
        delay.delayTime.value = delayTime;

        const feedback = this.audioContext.createGain();
        feedback.gain.value = decay;

        const wet = this.audioContext.createGain();
        wet.gain.value = 0.5;

        // 连接回声路径
        this.gainNode.connect(delay);
        delay.connect(feedback);
        feedback.connect(delay);
        delay.connect(wet);
        wet.connect(this.audioContext.destination);
    }
}

2.4 实时通信架构

2.4.1 多方通话架构

// Mesh架构 - 简单的多方通话
class MeshConference {
    constructor(roomId) {
        this.roomId = roomId;
        this.peerConnections = new Map(); // userId -> RTCPeerConnection
        this.localStream = null;
        this.remoteStreams = new Map(); // userId -> MediaStream
    }

    async join() {
        this.localStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
            video: true,
            audio: true
        });

        // 为房间内每个已有用户创建连接
        const participants = await this.getRoomParticipants();
        for (const userId of participants) {
            await this.createPeerConnection(userId);
        }
    }

    async createPeerConnection(peerId) {
        const pc = new RTCPeerConnection({
            iceServers: [{ urls: 'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302' }]
        });

        // 添加本地流
        this.localStream.getTracks().forEach(track => {
            pc.addTrack(track, this.localStream);
        });

        // 监听远程流
        pc.ontrack = (event) => {
            this.remoteStreams.set(peerId, event.streams[0]);
            this.onRemoteStream(peerId, event.streams[0]);
        };

        // 创建并发送offer
        const offer = await pc.createOffer();
        await pc.setLocalDescription(offer);

        this.sendSignal(peerId, { type: 'offer', sdp: offer });

        this.peerConnections.set(peerId, pc);
        return pc;
    }

    async handleOffer(peerId, offer) {
        const pc = new RTCPeerConnection({
            iceServers: [{ urls: 'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302' }]
        });

        this.localStream.getTracks().forEach(track => {
            pc.addTrack(track, this.localStream);
        });

        pc.ontrack = (event) => {
            this.remoteStreams.set(peerId, event.streams[0]);
            this.onRemoteStream(peerId, event.streams[0]);
        };

        await pc.setRemoteDescription(offer);
        const answer = await pc.createAnswer();
        await pc.setLocalDescription(answer);

        this.sendSignal(peerId, { type: 'answer', sdp: answer });
        this.peerConnections.set(peerId, pc);
    }

    onRemoteStream(userId, stream) {
        // 子类实现
    }

    sendSignal(peerId, signal) {
        // 发送到信令服务器
    }

    async getRoomParticipants() {
        // 获取房间参与者列表
        return [];
    }
}

// SFU架构 - 可扩展的多方通话
class SFUConference {
    constructor(roomId) {
        this.roomId = roomId;
        this.localStream = null;
        this.pc = null;
    }

    async join() {
        this.localStream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({
            video: {
                width: { ideal: 640 },
                height: { ideal: 480 }
            },
            audio: true
        });

        // 创建与SFU的连接
        this.pc = new RTCPeerConnection({
            iceServers: [{ urls: 'stun:stun.l.google.com:19302' }]
        });

        // 添加本地轨道
        this.localStream.getTracks().forEach(track => {
            this.pc.addTrack(track, this.localStream);
        });

        // 接收来自SFU的远程流
        this.pc.ontrack = (event) => {
            const [stream] = event.streams;
            this.onRemoteStream(event.streams[0], event.track.id);
        };

        // 创建offer
        const offer = await this.pc.createOffer();
        await this.pc.setLocalDescription(offer);

        // 发送到SFU服务器
        const answer = await this.signaling/offer(offer);
        await this.pc.setRemoteDescription(answer);

        // 处理ICE候选
        this.pc.onicecandidate = (event) => {
            if (event.candidate) {
                this.signaling.sendIceCandidate(event.candidate);
            }
        };
    }

    // 订阅/取消订阅特定用户的视频
    async subscribe(participantId, video = true, audio = true) {
        // 发送订阅请求到SFU
        await this.signaling.sendSubscribeRequest({
            participantId,
            video,
            audio
        });
    }

    // 控制发送的流的质量
    async setVideoQuality(quality) {
        // 根据质量参数调整发送分辨率和帧率
        const videoSender = this.pc.getSenders().find(s => s.track?.kind === 'video');

        if (videoSender) {
            const params = videoSender.getParameters();
            if (!params.encodings) {
                params.encodings = [{}];
            }

            switch (quality) {
                case 'low':
                    params.encodings[0].maxBitrate = 500000;
                    params.encodings[0].maxFramerate = 15;
                    break;
                case 'medium':
                    params.encodings[0].maxBitrate = 1500000;
                    params.encodings[0].maxFramerate = 24;
                    break;
                case 'high':
                    params.encodings[0].maxBitrate = 3000000;
                    params.encodings[0].maxFramerate = 30;
                    break;
            }

            await videoSender.setParameters(params);
        }
    }

    onRemoteStream(stream, trackId) {
        // 处理远程流
    }

    signaling = {
        async offer(offer) { return {}; },
        async sendSubscribeRequest(req) { },
        async sendIceCandidate(candidate) { }
    };
}

2.4.2 信令服务器实现

// 完整的WebSocket信令服务器
const WebSocket = require('ws');
const { v4: uuidv4 } = require('uuid');

class SignalingServer {
    constructor(port = 8080) {
        this.wss = new WebSocket.Server({ port });
        this.rooms = new Map(); // roomId -> Set(ws)
        this.userRooms = new Map(); // ws -> roomId
        this.userIds = new Map(); // ws -> userId

        console.log(`信令服务器启动在端口 ${port}`);
        this.setupHandlers();
    }

    setupHandlers() {
        this.wss.on('connection', (ws, req) => {
            const userId = uuidv4();
            console.log(`用户 ${userId} 连接`);

            ws.isAlive = true;
            ws.userId = userId;

            ws.on('pong', () => {
                ws.isAlive = true;
            });

            ws.on('message', (message) => {
                try {
                    const data = JSON.parse(message);
                    this.handleMessage(ws, data);
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('消息解析失败:', e);
                }
            });

            ws.on('close', () => {
                this.handleDisconnect(ws);
            });

            ws.on('error', (error) => {
                console.error(`用户 ${userId} 连接错误:`, error);
            });
        });

        // 心跳检测
        setInterval(() => {
            this.wss.clients.forEach((ws) => {
                if (!ws.isAlive) {
                    return ws.terminate();
                }
                ws.isAlive = false;
                ws.ping();
            });
        }, 30000);
    }

    handleMessage(ws, data) {
        console.log('收到消息:', data.type);

        switch (data.type) {
            case 'join':
                this.handleJoin(ws, data.roomId);
                break;

            case 'leave':
                this.handleLeave(ws);
                break;

            case 'offer':
                this.handleOffer(ws, data);
                break;

            case 'answer':
                this.handleAnswer(ws, data);
                break;

            case 'ice-candidate':
                this.handleIceCandidate(ws, data);
                break;

            case 'room-users':
                this.handleRoomUsers(ws);
                break;

            case 'video-quality':
                this.handleVideoQuality(ws, data);
                break;

            case 'mute':
                this.handleMute(ws, data);
                break;

            default:
                console.log('未知消息类型:', data.type);
        }
    }

    handleJoin(ws, roomId) {
        // 离开当前房间（如果有）
        if (this.userRooms.has(ws)) {
            this.handleLeave(ws);
        }

        // 加入新房间
        if (!this.rooms.has(roomId)) {
            this.rooms.set(roomId, new Set());
        }

        this.rooms.get(roomId).add(ws);
        this.userRooms.set(ws, roomId);
        this.userIds.set(ws, data.userId);

        console.log(`用户 ${ws.userId} 加入房间 ${roomId}`);

        // 通知用户加入成功
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({
            type: 'joined',
            roomId,
            userId: ws.userId
        }));

        // 通知房间内其他用户
        this.broadcast(roomId, {
            type: 'user-joined',
            userId: ws.userId
        }, ws);

        // 发送房间内用户列表给新用户
        this.sendRoomUsers(ws, roomId);
    }

    handleLeave(ws) {
        const roomId = this.userRooms.get(ws);
        if (!roomId) return;

        const room = this.rooms.get(roomId);
        if (room) {
            room.delete(ws);

            if (room.size === 0) {
                this.rooms.delete(roomId);
            } else {
                // 通知房间内其他用户
                this.broadcast(roomId, {
                    type: 'user-left',
                    userId: ws.userId
                }, ws);
            }
        }

        this.userRooms.delete(ws);
        this.userIds.delete(ws);

        ws.send(JSON.stringify({
            type: 'left',
            roomId
        }));
    }

    handleOffer(ws, data) {
        const { targetUserId, sdp, roomId } = data;

        const targetWs = this.findUserById(targetUserId, roomId);
        if (targetWs) {
            targetWs.send(JSON.stringify({
                type: 'offer',
                sdp,
                from: ws.userId
            }));
        }
    }

    handleAnswer(ws, data) {
        const { targetUserId, sdp, roomId } = data;

        const targetWs = this.findUserById(targetUserId, roomId);
        if (targetWs) {
            targetWs.send(JSON.stringify({
                type: 'answer',
                sdp,
                from: ws.userId
            }));
        }
    }

    handleIceCandidate(ws, data) {
        const { targetUserId, candidate, roomId } = data;

        const targetWs = this.findUserById(targetUserId, roomId);
        if (targetWs) {
            targetWs.send(JSON.stringify({
                type: 'ice-candidate',
                candidate,
                from: ws.userId
            }));
        }
    }

    handleRoomUsers(ws) {
        const roomId = this.userRooms.get(ws);
        if (roomId) {
            this.sendRoomUsers(ws, roomId);
        }
    }

    handleVideoQuality(ws, data) {
        // 转发视频质量请求给其他用户
        const roomId = this.userRooms.get(ws);
        if (roomId) {
            this.broadcast(roomId, {
                type: 'video-quality',
                userId: ws.userId,
                quality: data.quality
            }, ws);
        }
    }

    handleMute(ws, data) {
        const roomId = this.userRooms.get(ws);
        if (roomId) {
            this.broadcast(roomId, {
                type: 'mute',
                userId: ws.userId,
                kind: data.kind,
                muted: data.muted
            }, ws);
        }
    }

    handleDisconnect(ws) {
        this.handleLeave(ws);
        console.log(`用户 ${ws.userId} 断开连接`);
    }

    broadcast(roomId, message, excludeWs = null) {
        const room = this.rooms.get(roomId);
        if (!room) return;

        const messageStr = JSON.stringify(message);
        room.forEach((client) => {
            if (client !== excludeWs && client.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
                client.send(messageStr);
            }
        });
    }

    findUserById(userId, roomId) {
        const room = this.rooms.get(roomId);
        if (!room) return null;

        for (const client of room) {
            if (client.userId === userId) {
                return client;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }

    sendRoomUsers(ws, roomId) {
        const room = this.rooms.get(roomId);
        if (!room) return;

        const users = [];
        room.forEach((client) => {
            users.push({
                userId: client.userId,
                isSelf: client === ws
            });
        });

        ws.send(JSON.stringify({
            type: 'room-users',
            users
        }));
    }
}

// 启动服务器
const signalingServer = new SignalingServer(8080);

2.4.3 质量监控与自适应

// WebRTC质量监控
class QualityMonitor {
    constructor(pc) {
        this.pc = pc;
        this.statsInterval = null;
        this.callbacks = [];
    }

    start(interval = 1000) {
        this.statsInterval = setInterval(() => {
            this.collectStats();
        }, interval);
    }

    stop() {
        if (this.statsInterval) {
            clearInterval(this.statsInterval);
            this.statsInterval = null;
        }
    }

    async collectStats() {
        const stats = await this.pc.getStats();
        const report = {
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            connection: {},
            local: {},
            remote: {},
            network: {}
        };

        stats.forEach((stat) => {
            switch (stat.type) {
                case 'candidate-pair':
                    report.connection = {
                        state: stat.state,
                        currentRoundTripTime: stat.currentRoundTripTime,
                        availableOutgoingBitrate: stat.availableOutgoingBitrate,
                        availableIncomingBitrate: stat.availableIncomingBitrate,
                        packetsReceived: stat.packetsReceived,
                        packetsSent: stat.packetsSent,
                        bytesReceived: stat.bytesReceived,
                        bytesSent: stat.bytesSent
                    };
                    break;

                case 'inbound-rtp':
                    if (stat.kind === 'video') {
                        report.remote.video = {
                            packetsLost: stat.packetsLost,
                            jitter: stat.jitter,
                            fractionLost: stat.fractionLost,
                            framesDecoded: stat.framesDecoded,
                            bytesReceived: stat.bytesReceived,
                            lastPacketReceivedTimestamp: stat.lastPacketReceivedTimestamp
                        };
                    } else if (stat.kind === 'audio') {
                        report.remote.audio = {
                            packetsLost: stat.packetsLost,
                            jitter: stat.jitter,
                            fractionLost: stat.fractionLost,
                            bytesReceived: stat.bytesReceived
                        };
                    }
                    break;

                case 'outbound-rtp':
                    if (stat.kind === 'video') {
                        report.local.video = {
                            packetsSent: stat.packetsSent,
                            bytesSent: stat.bytesSent,
                            framesEncoded: stat.framesEncoded,
                            keyFramesEncoded: stat.keyFramesEncoded
                        };
                    } else if (stat.kind === 'audio') {
                        report.local.audio = {
                            packetsSent: stat.packetsSent,
                            bytesSent: stat.bytesSent
                        };
                    }
                    break;

                case 'track':
                    if (stat.trackIdentifier === 'audio') {
                        report.network.audio = {
                            audioLevel: stat.audioLevel,
                            totalAudioEnergy: stat.totalAudioEnergy,
                            echoReturnLoss: stat.echoReturnLoss
                        };
                    }
                    break;

                case 'remote-inbound-rtp':
                    if (stat.kind === 'video') {
                        report.network.video = {
                            packetsLost: stat.packetsLost,
                            jitter: stat.jitter,
                            roundTripTime: stat.roundTripTime
                        };
                    }
                    break;
            }
        });

        this.callbacks.forEach(cb => cb(report));
        return report;
    }

    onReport(callback) {
        this.callbacks.push(callback);
    }

    // 计算平均统计
    getAverageStats(duration = 5000) {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
            const samples = [];

            const collectSample = () => {
                this.collectStats().then(report => {
                    samples.push(report);
                });
            };

            collectSample();
            const interval = setInterval(collectSample, duration);

            setTimeout(() => {
                clearInterval(interval);

                if (samples.length === 0) {
                    resolve(null);
                    return;
                }

                // 计算平均值
                const avg = {
                    timestamp: Date.now(),
                    connection: {},
                    remote: { video: {}, audio: {} },
                    local: { video: {}, audio: {} },
                    network: { video: {}, audio: {} }
                };

                const sum = (arr, key) => arr.reduce((acc, r) => acc + (r[key] || 0), 0);
                const avgValue = (arr, key) => sum(arr, key) / arr.length;

                const lastSample = samples[samples.length - 1];
                avg.connection = lastSample.connection;

                avg.remote.video = {
                    packetsLost: avgValue(samples, 'remote.video.packetsLost'),
                    fractionLost: avgValue(samples, 'remote.video.fractionLost')
                };

                avg.network.video = {
                    roundTripTime: avgValue(samples, 'network.video.roundTripTime')
                };

                resolve(avg);
            }, duration);
        });
    }
}

// 自适应码率控制
class AdaptiveBitrateController {
    constructor(pc, options = {}) {
        this.pc = pc;
        this.qualityMonitor = new QualityMonitor(pc);
        this.minBitrate = options.minBitrate || 500000;
        this.maxBitrate = options.maxBitrate || 5000000;
        this.targetBitrate = options.targetBitrate || 2000000;
        this.adjustmentInterval = options.adjustmentInterval || 3000;

        this.currentQuality = 'medium';
        this.isAdjusting = false;
    }

    start() {
        this.qualityMonitor.start(1000);

        this.qualityMonitor.onReport((report) => {
            this.adjustBitrate(report);
        });
    }

    adjustBitrate(report) {
        if (this.isAdjusting) return;

        const rtt = report.connection.currentRoundTripTime || 0;
        const packetsLost = report.remote.video?.packetsLost || 0;
        const fractionLost = report.remote.video?.fractionLost || 0;

        // 基于丢包率调整
        if (fractionLost > 0.1) {
            // 丢包率过高，降低码率
            this.decreaseBitrate(0.7);
        } else if (fractionLost > 0.05) {
            this.decreaseBitrate(0.85);
        } else if (fractionLost < 0.02 && rtt < 0.1) {
            // 网络条件良好，提高码率
            this.increaseBitrate(1.2);
        }
    }

    async decreaseBitrate(factor) {
        this.isAdjusting = true;
        this.targetBitrate = Math.max(this.minBitrate, this.targetBitrate * factor);

        await this.applyBitrate();
        console.log(`降低码率到: ${this.targetBitrate / 1000}kbps`);

        setTimeout(() => {
            this.isAdjusting = false;
        }, this.adjustmentInterval);
    }

    async increaseBitrate(factor) {
        this.isAdjusting = true;
        this.targetBitrate = Math.min(this.maxBitrate, this.targetBitrate * factor);

        await this.applyBitrate();
        console.log(`提高码率到: ${this.targetBitrate / 1000}kbps`);

        setTimeout(() => {
            this.isAdjusting = false;
        }, this.adjustmentInterval);
    }

    async applyBitrate() {
        const senders = this.pc.getSenders();

        for (const sender of senders) {
            if (sender.track?.kind === 'video') {
                const params = sender.getParameters();
                if (!params.encodings) {
                    params.encodings = [{}];
                }

                params.encodings[0].maxBitrate = this.targetBitrate;
                await sender.setParameters(params);
            }
        }
    }

    stop() {
        this.qualityMonitor.stop();
    }
}

三、跨端开发技术

3.1 Flutter基础

3.1.1 Flutter核心概念

Flutter是Google推出的跨平台UI框架，使用Dart语言编写，能够构建高性能、美观的原生应用。

// Flutter基础 - main.dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

void main() {
  runApp(const MyApp());
}

class MyApp extends StatelessWidget {
  const MyApp({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MaterialApp(
      title: 'Flutter Demo',
      theme: ThemeData(
        colorScheme: ColorScheme.fromSeed(seedColor: Colors.deepPurple),
        useMaterial3: true,
      ),
      home: const MyHomePage(title: 'Flutter Demo Home Page'),
    );
  }
}

class MyHomePage extends StatefulWidget {
  const MyHomePage({super.key, required this.title});

  final String title;

  @override
  State<MyHomePage> createState() => _MyHomePageState();
}

class _MyHomePageState extends State<MyHomePage> {
  int _counter = 0;

  void _incrementCounter() {
    setState(() {
      _counter++;
    });
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        backgroundColor: Theme.of(context).colorScheme.inversePrimary,
        title: Text(widget.title),
      ),
      body: Center(
        child: Column(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: <Widget>[
            const Text('You have pushed the button this many times:'),
            Text(
              '$_counter',
              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
            ),
            ElevatedButton(
              onPressed: _incrementCounter,
              child: const Text('Increment'),
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

3.1.2 Widget系统详解

// Flutter Widget系统详解

// 1. StatelessWidget - 无状态组件
class GreetingWidget extends StatelessWidget {
  final String name;

  const GreetingWidget({super.key, required this.name});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16.0),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: Colors.blue.shade100,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8.0),
      ),
      child: Text(
        'Hello, $name!',
        style: const TextStyle(
          fontSize: 24,
          fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

// 2. StatefulWidget - 有状态组件
class CounterWidget extends StatefulWidget {
  const CounterWidget({super.key});

  @override
  State<CounterWidget> createState() => _CounterWidgetState();
}

class _CounterWidgetState extends State<CounterWidget> {
  int _count = 0;

  void _increment() {
    setState(() {
      _count++;
    });
  }

  void _decrement() {
    setState(() {
      _count--;
    });
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Column(
      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
      children: [
        Text(
          'Count: $_count',
          style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineMedium,
        ),
        const SizedBox(height: 16),
        Row(
          mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
          children: [
            IconButton(
              icon: const Icon(Icons.remove),
              onPressed: _decrement,
              iconSize: 32,
            ),
            const SizedBox(width: 16),
            IconButton(
              icon: const Icon(Icons.add),
              onPressed: _increment,
              iconSize: 32,
            ),
          ],
        ),
      ],
    );
  }
}

// 3. 常用布局Widget
class LayoutExamples extends StatelessWidget {
  const LayoutExamples({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // Column - 垂直布局
    return Column(
      children: [
        Container(
          height: 100,
          width: double.infinity,
          color: Colors.red,
          child: const Text('Item 1'),
        ),
        Container(
          height: 100,
          width: double.infinity,
          color: Colors.green,
          child: const Text('Item 2'),
        ),
      ],
    );

    // Row - 水平布局
    // return Row(
    //   children: [
    //     Expanded(child: Container(color: Colors.red)),
    //     Expanded(child: Container(color: Colors.green)),
    //   ],
    // );

    // Stack - 绝对定位
    // return Stack(
    //   children: [
    //     Container(color: Colors.red, width: 200, height: 200),
    //     Positioned(
    //       right: 10,
    //       bottom: 10,
    //       child: Container(color: Colors.blue, width: 50, height: 50),
    //     ),
    //   ],
    // );
  }
}

// 4. ListView - 列表
class ListViewExample extends StatelessWidget {
  final List<String> items = List.generate(20, (i) => 'Item $i');

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return ListView.builder(
      itemCount: items.length,
      itemBuilder: (context, index) {
        return ListTile(
          leading: CircleAvatar(child: Text('${index + 1}')),
          title: Text(items[index]),
          subtitle: const Text('Subtitle'),
          trailing: const Icon(Icons.arrow_forward_ios),
          onTap: () {
            print('Tapped: ${items[index]}');
          },
        );
      },
    );
  }
}

// 5. GridView - 网格
class GridViewExample extends StatelessWidget {
  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return GridView.builder(
      gridDelegate: const SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
        crossAxisCount: 3,
        crossAxisSpacing: 8,
        mainAxisSpacing: 8,
      ),
      itemCount: 30,
      itemBuilder: (context, index) {
        return Container(
          color: Colors.primaries[index % Colors.primaries.length],
          child: Center(
            child: Text(
              '${index + 1}',
              style: const TextStyle(color: Colors.white, fontSize: 24),
            ),
          ),
        );
      },
    );
  }
}

3.1.3 状态管理

// Flutter状态管理 - Provider模式

// 1. ChangeNotifier - 状态提供者
class CounterModel extends ChangeNotifier {
  int _count = 0;

  int get count => _count;

  void increment() {
    _count++;
    notifyListeners();
  }

  void decrement() {
    _count--;
    notifyListeners();
  }

  void reset() {
    _count = 0;
    notifyListeners();
  }
}

// 2. 使用ChangeNotifierProvider
import 'package:provider/provider.dart';

class CounterApp extends StatelessWidget {
  const CounterApp({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return ChangeNotifierProvider(
      create: (_) => CounterModel(),
      child: const MaterialApp(
        home: CounterScreen(),
      ),
    );
  }
}

class CounterScreen extends StatelessWidget {
  const CounterScreen({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: const Text('Provider Counter'),
      ),
      body: Center(
        child: Consumer<CounterModel>(
          builder: (context, counter, child) {
            return Column(
              mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
              children: [
                Text(
                  '${counter.count}',
                  style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 48),
                ),
                const SizedBox(height: 16),
                Row(
                  mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
                  children: [
                    IconButton(
                      icon: const Icon(Icons.remove),
                      iconSize: 32,
                      onPressed: () => counter.decrement(),
                    ),
                    const SizedBox(width: 16),
                    IconButton(
                      icon: const Icon(Icons.add),
                      iconSize: 32,
                      onPressed: () => counter.increment(),
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ],
            );
          },
        ),
      ),
    );
  }
}

// 3. 多Provider
class MultiProviderExample extends StatelessWidget {
  const MultiProviderExample({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return MultiProvider(
      providers: [
        ChangeNotifierProvider(create: (_) => CounterModel()),
        ChangeNotifierProvider(create: (_) => ThemeModel()),
        ChangeNotifierProvider(create: (_) => UserModel()),
      ],
      child: const MyApp(),
    );
  }
}

// 4. ProxyProvider - 依赖其他Provider
class TodoListModel extends ChangeNotifier {
  final UserModel _userModel;

  TodoListModel(this._userModel);

  List<String> _todos = [];

  List<String> get todos => _todos;

  void addTodo(String todo) {
    _todos.add('${_userModel.username}: $todo');
    notifyListeners();
  }
}

// 使用ProxyProvider
// MultiProvider(
//   providers: [
//     ChangeNotifierProvider(create: (_) => UserModel()),
//     ProxyProvider<UserModel, TodoListModel>(
//       update: (_, userModel, __) => TodoListModel(userModel),
//     ),
//   ],
//   child: const MyApp(),
// ),

3.1.4 网络请求与数据解析

// Flutter网络请求

import 'dart:convert';
import 'package:http/http.dart' as http;

// 1. 简单的GET请求
Future<Map<String, dynamic>> fetchData(String url) async {
  final response = await http.get(Uri.parse(url));

  if (response.statusCode == 200) {
    return json.decode(response.body);
  } else {
    throw Exception('Failed to load data: ${response.statusCode}');
  }
}

// 2. 带错误处理的请求
class ApiService {
  final String baseUrl;

  ApiService({this.baseUrl = 'https://api.example.com'});

  Future<T> get<T>(
    String endpoint, {
    Map<String, String>? queryParams,
    T Function(dynamic)? parser,
  }) async {
    try {
      final uri = Uri.parse('$baseUrl$endpoint').replace(
        queryParameters: queryParams,
      );

      final response = await http.get(uri).timeout(
        const Duration(seconds: 30),
      );

      if (response.statusCode == 200) {
        final data = json.decode(response.body);
        return parser != null ? parser(data) : data as T;
      } else {
        throw ApiException(
          statusCode: response.statusCode,
          message: 'Request failed',
        );
      }
    } catch (e) {
      if (e is ApiException) rethrow;
      throw ApiException(message: e.toString());
    }
  }

  Future<T> post<T>(
    String endpoint, {
    Map<String, dynamic>? body,
    T Function(dynamic)? parser,
  }) async {
    try {
      final uri = Uri.parse('$baseUrl$endpoint');

      final response = await http.post(
        uri,
        headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
        body: json.encode(body),
      ).timeout(const Duration(seconds: 30));

      if (response.statusCode == 200 || response.statusCode == 201) {
        final data = json.decode(response.body);
        return parser != null ? parser(data) : data as T;
      } else {
        throw ApiException(
          statusCode: response.statusCode,
          message: 'Request failed',
        );
      }
    } catch (e) {
      if (e is ApiException) rethrow;
      throw ApiException(message: e.toString());
    }
  }
}

class ApiException implements Exception {
  final int? statusCode;
  final String message;

  ApiException({this.statusCode, required this.message});

  @override
  String toString() => 'ApiException: $message (status: $statusCode)';
}

// 3. 数据模型
class User {
  final int id;
  final String name;
  final String email;
  final String? avatar;

  User({
    required this.id,
    required this.name,
    required this.email,
    this.avatar,
  });

  factory User.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
    return User(
      id: json['id'],
      name: json['name'],
      email: json['email'],
      avatar: json['avatar'],
    );
  }

  Map<String, dynamic> toJson() {
    return {
      'id': id,
      'name': name,
      'email': email,
      'avatar': avatar,
    };
  }
}

// 4. 使用FutureBuilder
class UserListScreen extends StatelessWidget {
  const UserListScreen({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(title: const Text('Users')),
      body: FutureBuilder<List<User>>(
        future: _fetchUsers(),
        builder: (context, snapshot) {
          if (snapshot.connectionState == ConnectionState.waiting) {
            return const Center(child: CircularProgressIndicator());
          } else if (snapshot.hasError) {
            return Center(child: Text('Error: ${snapshot.error}'));
          } else if (snapshot.hasData) {
            return ListView.builder(
              itemCount: snapshot.data!.length,
              itemBuilder: (context, index) {
                final user = snapshot.data![index];
                return ListTile(
                  leading: CircleAvatar(
                    backgroundImage: user.avatar != null
                        ? NetworkImage(user.avatar!)
                        : null,
                  ),
                  title: Text(user.name),
                  subtitle: Text(user.email),
                );
              },
            );
          }
          return const SizedBox.shrink();
        },
      ),
    );
  }

  Future<List<User>> _fetchUsers() async {
    final api = ApiService();
    final data = await api.get<List<dynamic>>('/users');
    return data.map((e) => User.fromJson(e)).toList();
  }
}

3.2 React Native

3.2.1 React Native基础

// React Native基础组件

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import {
  View,
  Text,
  StyleSheet,
  TouchableOpacity,
  TextInput,
  ScrollView,
  FlatList,
  Image,
  ActivityIndicator,
  Alert,
  Modal,
  StatusBar,
  SafeAreaView,
} from 'react-native';

// 1. 基础组件示例
const BasicComponent = () => {
  const [text, setText] = useState('');

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <Text style={styles.title}>Hello React Native</Text>
      <TextInput
        style={styles.input}
        placeholder="Type something..."
        value={text}
        onChangeText={setText}
      />
      <Text style={styles.output}>You typed: {text}</Text>
    </View>
  );
};

// 2. 列表组件
const UserList = ({ users }) => {
  const renderItem = ({ item }) => (
    <View style={styles.userItem}>
      <Image source={{ uri: item.avatar }} style={styles.avatar} />
      <View style={styles.userInfo}>
        <Text style={styles.userName}>{item.name}</Text>
        <Text style={styles.userEmail}>{item.email}</Text>
      </View>
    </View>
  );

  return (
    <FlatList
      data={users}
      keyExtractor={(item) => item.id.toString()}
      renderItem={renderItem}
      ItemSeparatorComponent={() => <View style={styles.separator} />}
    />
  );
};

// 3. 带加载状态的列表
const LoadingList = () => {
  const [data, setData] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchData();
  }, []);

  const fetchData = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const response = await fetch('https://api.example.com/users');
      const json = await response.json();
      setData(json);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.center}>
        <ActivityIndicator size="large" color="#0000ff" />
      </View>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.center}>
        <Text style={styles.error}>{error}</Text>
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={fetchData}>
          <Text style={styles.retry}>Retry</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      </View>
    );
  }

  return <UserList users={data} />;
};

// 4. 模态框
const ModalExample = () => {
  const [modalVisible, setModalVisible] = useState(false);

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <TouchableOpacity
        style={styles.button}
        onPress={() => setModalVisible(true)}
      >
        <Text style={styles.buttonText}>Open Modal</Text>
      </TouchableOpacity>

      <Modal
        animationType="slide"
        transparent={true}
        visible={modalVisible}
        onRequestClose={() => setModalVisible(false)}
      >
        <View style={styles.modalOverlay}>
          <View style={styles.modalContent}>
            <Text style={styles.modalTitle}>Modal Title</Text>
            <Text>This is a modal dialog</Text>
            <TouchableOpacity
              style={styles.button}
              onPress={() => setModalVisible(false)}
            >
              <Text style={styles.buttonText}>Close</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>
        </View>
      </Modal>
    </View>
  );
};

// 样式定义
const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex: 1,
    padding: 16,
  },
  center: {
    flex: 1,
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  title: {
    fontSize: 24,
    fontWeight: 'bold',
    marginBottom: 16,
  },
  input: {
    borderWidth: 1,
    borderColor: '#ccc',
    borderRadius: 8,
    padding: 12,
    marginBottom: 16,
  },
  output: {
    fontSize: 16,
  },
  userItem: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    padding: 12,
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  avatar: {
    width: 50,
    height: 50,
    borderRadius: 25,
    marginRight: 12,
  },
  userInfo: {
    flex: 1,
  },
  userName: {
    fontSize: 16,
    fontWeight: 'bold',
  },
  userEmail: {
    fontSize: 14,
    color: '#666',
  },
  separator: {
    height: 1,
    backgroundColor: '#eee',
  },
  button: {
    backgroundColor: '#007AFF',
    padding: 12,
    borderRadius: 8,
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  buttonText: {
    color: '#fff',
    fontSize: 16,
    fontWeight: 'bold',
  },
  error: {
    color: 'red',
    fontSize: 16,
  },
  retry: {
    color: '#007AFF',
    fontSize: 16,
    marginTop: 8,
  },
  modalOverlay: {
    flex: 1,
    backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5)',
    justifyContent: 'center',
    alignItems: 'center',
  },
  modalContent: {
    backgroundColor: '#fff',
    borderRadius: 16,
    padding: 24,
    width: '80%',
  },
  modalTitle: {
    fontSize: 20,
    fontWeight: 'bold',
    marginBottom: 16,
  },
});

3.2.2 React Native导航

// React Navigation - 导航系统

import React from 'react';
import { NavigationContainer } from '@react-navigation/native';
import { createStackNavigator } from '@react-navigation/stack';
import { createBottomTabNavigator } from '@react-navigation/bottom-tabs';
import { createDrawerNavigator } from '@react-navigation/drawer';
import { Ionicons } from '@expo/vector-icons';

// Stack Navigator
const Stack = createStackNavigator();

const StackNavigator = () => {
  return (
    <Stack.Navigator
      initialRouteName="Home"
      screenOptions={{
        headerStyle: {
          backgroundColor: '#f4511e',
        },
        headerTintColor: '#fff',
        headerTitleStyle: {
          fontWeight: 'bold',
        },
      }}
    >
      <Stack.Screen
        name="Home"
        component={HomeScreen}
        options={{
          title: 'My Home',
          headerShown: false,
        }}
      />
      <Stack.Screen
        name="Details"
        component={DetailsScreen}
        options={{
          title: 'Details',
        }}
      />
      <Stack.Screen
        name="Profile"
        component={ProfileScreen}
        options={({ route }) => ({
          title: route.params?.name || 'Profile',
        })}
      />
    </Stack.Navigator>
  );
};

// Tab Navigator
const Tab = createBottomTabNavigator();

const TabNavigator = () => {
  return (
    <Tab.Navigator
      screenOptions={({ route }) => ({
        tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color, size }) => {
          let iconName;

          if (route.name === 'Home') {
            iconName = focused ? 'home' : 'home-outline';
          } else if (route.name === 'Settings') {
            iconName = focused ? 'settings' : 'settings-outline';
          } else if (route.name === 'Profile') {
            iconName = focused ? 'person' : 'person-outline';
          }

          return <Ionicons name={iconName} size={size} color={color} />;
        },
        tabBarActiveTintColor: 'tomato',
        tabBarInactiveTintColor: 'gray',
        headerShown: false,
      })}
    >
      <Tab.Screen name="Home" component={HomeScreen} />
      <Tab.Screen name="Settings" component={SettingsScreen} />
      <Tab.Screen name="Profile" component={ProfileScreen} />
    </Tab.Navigator>
  );
};

// Drawer Navigator
const Drawer = createDrawerNavigator();

const DrawerNavigator = () => {
  return (
    <Drawer.Navigator
      screenOptions={{
        drawerActiveBackgroundColor: '#f4511e',
        drawerActiveTintColor: '#fff',
        drawerInactiveTintColor: '#333',
        drawerPosition: 'left',
        drawerWidth: 250,
      }}
    >
      <Drawer.Screen
        name="Home"
        component={HomeScreen}
        options={{
          drawerIcon: ({ focused }) => (
            <Ionicons name="home" size={24} color={focused ? '#fff' : '#333'} />
          ),
        }}
      />
      <Drawer.Screen
        name="Profile"
        component={ProfileScreen}
        options={{
          drawerIcon: ({ focused }) => (
            <Ionicons name="person" size={24} color={focused ? '#fff' : '#333'} />
          ),
        }}
      />
      <Drawer.Screen
        name="Settings"
        component={SettingsScreen}
        options={{
          drawerIcon: ({ focused }) => (
            <Ionicons name="settings" size={24} color={focused ? '#fff' : '#333'} />
          ),
        }}
      />
    </Drawer.Navigator>
  );
};

// 屏幕组件
const HomeScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  return (
    <View style={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }}>
      <Text>Home Screen</Text>
      <Button
        title="Go to Details"
        onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Details')}
      />
      <Button
        title="Go to Profile with params"
        onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Profile', { name: 'John' })}
      />
    </View>
  );
};

const DetailsScreen = ({ navigation }) => {
  return (
    <View style={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }}>
      <Text>Details Screen</Text>
      <Button
        title="Go back"
        onPress={() => navigation.goBack()}
      />
      <Button
        title="Go to Home"
        onPress={() => navigation.navigate('Home')}
      />
    </View>
  );
};

const ProfileScreen = ({ route }) => {
  const { name } = route.params || {};

  return (
    <View style={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }}>
      <Text>Profile Screen</Text>
      {name && <Text>Welcome, {name}!</Text>}
    </View>
  );
};

const SettingsScreen = () => {
  return (
    <View style={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }}>
      <Text>Settings Screen</Text>
    </View>
  );
};

// 组合导航
const AppNavigator = () => {
  return (
    <NavigationContainer>
      <Stack.Navigator>
        <Stack.Screen name="Main" component={TabNavigator} />
        <Stack.Screen
          name="Details"
          component={DetailsScreen}
          options={{ headerShown: false }}
        />
      </Stack.Navigator>
    </NavigationContainer>
  );
};

const { View, Text, Button } = require('react-native');

export default AppNavigator;

3.2.3 React Native状态管理

// React Native 状态管理 - Redux Toolkit

import { configureStore, createSlice, createAsyncThunk } from '@reduxjs/toolkit';
import { Provider, useDispatch, useSelector } from 'react-redux';

// 1. 创建Slice
const counterSlice = createSlice({
  name: 'counter',
  initialState: {
    value: 0,
    status: 'idle',
    error: null,
  },
  reducers: {
    increment: (state) => {
      state.value += 1;
    },
    decrement: (state) => {
      state.value -= 1;
    },
    incrementByAmount: (state, action) => {
      state.value += action.payload;
    },
    reset: (state) => {
      state.value = 0;
    },
  },
  extraReducers: (builder) => {
    builder
      .addCase(incrementAsync.pending, (state) => {
        state.status = 'loading';
      })
      .addCase(incrementAsync.fulfilled, (state, action) => {
        state.status = 'idle';
        state.value += action.payload;
      })
      .addCase(incrementAsync.rejected, (state, action) => {
        state.status = 'failed';
        state.error = action.error.message;
      });
  },
});

// 异步Thunk
export const incrementAsync = createAsyncThunk(
  'counter/incrementAsync',
  async (amount) => {
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));
    return amount;
  }
);

export const { increment, decrement, incrementByAmount, reset } = counterSlice.actions;

// 2. 配置Store
const store = configureStore({
  reducer: {
    counter: counterSlice.reducer,
    // 可以添加更多reducer
    // users: usersSlice.reducer,
    // posts: postsSlice.reducer,
  },
  middleware: (getDefaultMiddleware) =>
    getDefaultMiddleware({
      serializableCheck: {
        // 忽略这些action types
        ignoredActions: ['counter/incrementAsync/fulfilled'],
      },
    }),
});

// 3. 使用组件
const CounterApp = () => {
  const count = useSelector((state) => state.counter.value);
  const status = useSelector((state) => state.counter.status);
  const dispatch = useDispatch();

  return (
    <Provider store={store}>
      <View style={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }}>
        <Text style={{ fontSize: 24, marginBottom: 20 }}>{count}</Text>

        <View style={{ flexDirection: 'row', gap: 10 }}>
          <Button
            title="Increment"
            onPress={() => dispatch(increment())}
          />
          <Button
            title="Decrement"
            onPress={() => dispatch(decrement())}
          />
        </View>

        <Button
          title="Async Increment"
          onPress={() => dispatch(incrementAsync(5))}
          disabled={status === 'loading'}
        />
      </View>
    </Provider>
  );
};

// 4. 选择器
const selectCount = (state) => state.counter.value;
const selectStatus = (state) => state.counter.status;

// 带参数的选择器工厂
const selectUserById = (userId) => (state) =>
  state.users.find((user) => user.id === userId);

// 5. 使用Context的轻量级方案
const CounterContext = React.createContext();

const CounterProvider = ({ children }) => {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);

  const increment = () => setCount((c) => c + 1);
  const decrement = () => setCount((c) => c - 1);

  return (
    <CounterContext.Provider value={{ count, increment, decrement }}>
      {children}
    </CounterContext.Provider>
  );
};

const useCounter = () => {
  const context = React.useContext(CounterContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useCounter must be used within CounterProvider');
  }
  return context;
};

const CounterDisplay = () => {
  const { count, increment, decrement } = useCounter();

  return (
    <View>
      <Text>Count: {count}</Text>
      <Button title="+" onPress={increment} />
      <Button title="-" onPress={decrement} />
    </View>
  );
};

const { Button } = require('react-native');

export { store, CounterApp, CounterProvider, useCounter };

3.3 Taro/Uni-app

3.3.1 Taro框架详解

// Taro 框架基础

import React, { useState, useEffect } from '@tarojs/taro';
import { View, Text, Button, Image, ScrollView, Input } from '@tarojs/components';
import Taro from '@tarojs/taro';

// 1. 页面组件
class Index extends React.Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
    this.state = {
      name: 'Taro',
      count: 0,
      list: [],
      loading: false,
    };
  }

  componentDidMount() {
    // 页面加载完成
    console.log('Page mounted');
    this.fetchData();
  }

  componentDidShow() {
    // 页面显示
  }

  componentDidHide() {
    // 页面隐藏
  }

  fetchData = async () => {
    this.setState({ loading: true });
    try {
      const res = await Taro.request({
        url: 'https://api.example.com/data',
        method: 'GET',
      });
      this.setState({ list: res.data });
    } catch (error) {
      Taro.showToast({
        title: '请求失败',
        icon: 'none',
      });
    } finally {
      this.setState({ loading: false });
    }
  };

  handleClick = () => {
    this.setState((prev) => ({
      count: prev.count + 1,
    }));
  };

  handleInput = (e) => {
    this.setState({
      name: e.detail.value,
    });
  };

  goToDetail = (id) => {
    Taro.navigateTo({
      url: `/pages/detail/index?id=${id}`,
    });
  };

  render() {
    const { name, count, list, loading } = this.state;

    return (
      <View className="index">
        <View className="header">
          <Text className="title">Hello {name}!</Text>
          <Text className="subtitle">Count: {count}</Text>
        </View>

        <Button onClick={this.handleClick}>Click Me</Button>

        <Input
          value={name}
          onInput={this.handleInput}
          placeholder="Enter your name"
        />

        {loading ? (
          <View className="loading">Loading...</View>
        ) : (
          <ScrollView scrollY className="list">
            {list.map((item) => (
              <View
                key={item.id}
                className="list-item"
                onClick={() => this.goToDetail(item.id)}
              >
                <Text>{item.title}</Text>
              </View>
            ))}
          </ScrollView>
        )}
      </View>
    );
  }
}

export default Index;

// 2. 使用Hooks
const HooksPage = () => {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);
  const [userInfo, setUserInfo] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    // 模拟请求
    setTimeout(() => {
      setUserInfo({ name: 'John', age: 25 });
    }, 1000);
  }, []);

  const handleEvent = () => {
    Taro.showToast({
      title: `Count: ${count}`,
      icon: 'none',
    });
  };

  return (
    <View className="page">
      <Text>Count: {count}</Text>
      <Button onClick={() => setCount(count + 1)}>Increment</Button>
      <Button onClick={() => setCount(count - 1)}>Decrement</Button>

      {userInfo && (
        <View>
          <Text>Name: {userInfo.name}</Text>
          <Text>Age: {userInfo.age}</Text>
        </View>
      )}
    </View>
  );
};

// 3. Taro API使用示例
const TaroApiExamples = () => {
  // 路由导航
  const navigateTo = () => {
    Taro.navigateTo({
      url: '/pages/about/index',
    });
  };

  const redirectTo = () => {
    Taro.redirectTo({
      url: '/pages/login/index',
    });
  };

  const switchTab = () => {
    Taro.switchTab({
