      '.ts': 'ts',
      '.tsx': 'tsx',
      '.css': 'css',
      '.json': 'json',
      '.png': 'file',
      '.svg': 'dataurl',
      '.txt': 'text'
    },

    // 定义变量
    define: {
      'process.env.NODE_ENV': '"production"',
      __VERSION__: '"1.0.0"'
    },

    // 别名
    alias: {
      '@': './src',
      'react': 'react/dist/react.js'
    },

    // 输出格式
    splitting: true,
    // 打包为单个文件
    // splitting: false,
    // chunk 文件名
    chunkNames: 'chunks/[name]-[hash]',
    // 入口文件名
    entryNames: '[name]',
    // 资源文件名
    assetNames: 'assets/[name]-[hash]',

    // 忽略注释
    ignoreAnnotations: false,

    // 主字段
    mainFields: ['browser', 'module', 'main'],

    // 条件导出
    conditions: ['browser', 'module'],

    // 外部导入
    externalImports: false,

    //  метаданные
    metafile: true,

    // 写入文件
    write: true,

    // 增量
    incremental: true,

    // 插件
    plugins: []
  });

  // 获取元数据
  if (result.metafile) {
    const text = await esbuild.analyzeMetafile(result.metafile);
    console.log(text);
  }

  console.log('构建完成');
}

build().catch(() => process.exit(1));

第六部分：构建工具对比与选型

6.1 核心对比

特性 Webpack Vite Rollup esbuild
定位 通用打包工具 现代化构建工具 库打包工具 极速构建工具
速度 较慢 快 中等 极快
生态 极其丰富 丰富 中等 较少
HMR 一般 优秀 差 差
Tree Shaking 支持 支持 优秀 支持
代码分割 优秀 优秀 一般 支持
配置复杂度 高 低 中 低
学习曲线 陡峭 平缓 中等 平缓

6.2 适用场景

Webpack 适用场景：

  • 大型复杂项目
  • 需要高度定制化
  • 丰富的生态支持
  • SSR 应用

Vite 适用场景：

  • 现代前端框架项目
  • 快速开发迭代
  • 中小型项目
  • 追求开发体验

Rollup 适用场景：

  • JavaScript 库打包
  • 组件库开发
  • 需要极致 Tree Shaking

esbuild 适用场景：

  • 追求极致构建速度
  • 简单打包需求
  • 构建工具底层实现

6.3 项目选型建议

// 不同场景的推荐配置

// 1. 大型 React 应用 - Webpack 5
const webpackConfig = {
  // 使用 Module Federation
  plugins: [
    new ModuleFederationPlugin({
      name: 'app',
      remotes: {},
      shared: { react: 'singleton', 'react-dom': 'singleton' }
    })
  ],
  // 持久化缓存
  cache: { type: 'filesystem' },
  // 优化
  optimization: {
    splitChunks: { chunks: 'all' },
    runtimeChunk: 'single'
  }
};

// 2. 现代 Vue 项目 - Vite
const viteConfig = {
  plugins: [
    vue(),
    // 自动导入
    AutoImport({ imports: ['vue', 'vue-router'] })
  ],
  // 依赖优化
  optimizeDeps: {
    include: ['vue', 'vue-router']
  }
};

// 3. 组件库 - Rollup
const rollupConfig = {
  input: 'src/index.ts',
  output: [
    { format: 'es', file: 'dist/index.esm.js' },
    { format: 'cjs', file: 'dist/index.cjs.js' },
    { format: 'umd', file: 'dist/index.umd.js', name: 'MyLib' }
  ],
  plugins: [
    typescript(),
    resolve(),
    commonjs()
  ]
};

// 4. 简单项目 - esbuild
const esbuildConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['src/index.js'],
  bundle: true,
  outfile: 'dist/bundle.js',
  minify: true
};

第七部分：性能优化深度讲解

7.1 构建优化策略

7.1.1 依赖预构建

// vite.config.js - 依赖预构建优化

export default defineConfig({
  optimizeDeps: {
    // 预构建的依赖
    include: [
      'react',
      'react-dom',
      'vue',
      'lodash',
      'axios',
      'dayjs'
    ],

    // 排除不需要预构建的
    exclude: ['@vitejs/plugin-react'],

    // 预构建入口
    entries: ['src/main.jsx'],

    // esbuild 选项
    esbuildOptions: {
      target: 'esnext',
      treeShaking: true
    }
  }
});

7.1.2 缓存优化

// Webpack 持久化缓存
module.exports = {
  cache: {
    type: 'filesystem',
    version: '1.0.0',
    buildDependencies: {
      config: [__filename],
      tsconfig: ['tsconfig.json']
    },
    cacheDirectory: path.resolve(__dirname, 'node_modules/.cache/webpack'),
    compression: 'gzip',
    hashAlgorithm: 'sha256'
  }
};

// Vite 缓存配置
export default defineConfig({
  cacheDir: 'node_modules/.vite',
  server: {
    hmr: {
      overlay: true
    }
  }
});

7.1.3 并行构建

// Webpack 多进程
const TerserPlugin = require('terser-webpack-plugin');
const ThreadLoader = require('thread-loader');

module.exports = {
  module: {
    rules: [
      {
        test: /\.js$/,
        use: [
          {
            loader: 'thread-loader',
            options: {
              workers: 4,
              workerParallelJobs: 50,
              poolTimeout: 2000
            }
          },
          {
            loader: 'babel-loader',
            options: {
              cacheDirectory: true
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  optimization: {
    minimizer: [
      new TerserPlugin({
        parallel: true,
        terserOptions: {
          compress: {
            drop_console: true
          }
        }
      })
    ]
  }
};

7.2 加载优化策略

7.2.1 代码分割

// Webpack 代码分割
module.exports = {
  optimization: {
    splitChunks: {
      chunks: 'all',
      maxInitialRequests: 25,
      maxAsyncRequests: 25,
      minSize: 20000,
      cacheGroups: {
        // React 核心库
        framework: {
          name: 'framework',
          test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/](react|react-dom|vue)[\\/]/,
          priority: 40,
          chunks: 'all'
        },
        // 其他第三方库
        lib: {
          test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]/,
          name: 'vendors',
          priority: 20,
          chunks: 'initial'
        },
        // 公共模块
        common: {
          minChunks: 2,
          priority: 10,
          reuseExistingChunk: true
        }
      }
    },
    runtimeChunk: 'single'
  }
};

// Vite 代码分割
export default defineConfig({
  build: {
    rollupOptions: {
      output: {
        manualChunks: {
          'react-vendor': ['react', 'react-dom'],
          'router': ['react-router-dom'],
          'utils': ['lodash', 'axios']
        }
      }
    }
  }
});

7.2.2 动态导入

// 路由级代码分割 - React
import { lazy, Suspense } from 'react';
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom';

const Home = lazy(() => import('./pages/Home'));
const About = lazy(() => import('./pages/About'));
const User = lazy(() => import('./pages/User'));

function App() {
  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <Suspense fallback={<Loading />}>
        <Routes>
          <Route path="/" element={<Home />} />
          <Route path="/about" element={<About />} />
          <Route path="/user/:id" element={<User />} />
        </Routes>
      </Suspense>
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

// 组件级代码分割
const HeavyComponent = lazy(() => import('./HeavyComponent'));

function MyComponent() {
  const [showHeavy, setShowHeavy] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div>
      <button onClick={() => setShowHeavy(true)}>
        Load Heavy Component
      </button>
      {showHeavy && (
        <Suspense fallback={<Loading />}>
          <HeavyComponent />
        </Suspense>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// Vue 路由级代码分割
// router/index.js
import { createRouter, createWebHistory } from 'vue-router';

const Home = () => import(/* webpackChunkName: "home" */ '../views/Home.vue');
const About = () => import(/* webpackChunkName: "about" */ '../views/About.vue');

const routes = [
  { path: '/', component: Home },
  { path: '/about', component: About }
];

export default createRouter({
  history: createWebHistory(),
  routes
});

7.2.3 预加载与预获取

<!-- 预加载关键资源 -->
<link rel="preload" href="bundle.js" as="script">
<link rel="preload" href="styles.css" as="style">

<!-- 预获取未来可能的资源 -->
<link rel="prefetch" href="next-page.js">

<!-- DNS 预解析 -->
<link rel="dns-prefetch" href="//api.example.com">

<!-- 预连接到服务器 -->
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.example.com">

// Vite 配置预加载
export default defineConfig({
  build: {
    rollupOptions: {
      output: {
        // 手动分块
        manualChunks: (id) => {
          if (id.includes('node_modules')) {
            if (id.includes('react')) {
              return 'react';
            }
            return 'vendors';
          }
        }
      }
    },
    // 模块预加载
    modulePreload: {
      polyfill: true,
      resolveDepOrigin: (id) => {
        // 自定义解析
      }
    }
  }
});

7.2.4 资源内联与压缩

// 图片优化 - 自动转 Base64
module.exports = {
  module: {
    rules: [
      {
        test: /\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp)$/i,
        type: 'asset',
        parser: {
          dataUrlCondition: {
            maxSize: 8 * 1024 // 8KB 以下内联
          }
        }
      }
    ]
  }
};

// Gzip 压缩
// vite.config.js
import viteCompression from 'vite-plugin-compression';

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    viteCompression({
      algorithm: 'gzip',
      ext: '.gz',
      threshold: 10240
    })
  ]
});

// Brotli 压缩（更好的压缩率）
export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    viteCompression({
      algorithm: 'brotliCompress',
      ext: '.br',
      threshold: 10240
    })
  ]
});

7.3 运行时优化

7.3.1 Tree Shaking

// 确保启用 Tree Shaking
module.exports = {
  mode: 'production',
  optimization: {
    usedExports: true, // 启用
    sideEffects: true // 标记副作用
  }
};

// package.json 标记副作用
{
  "name": "my-package",
  "sideEffects": [
    "*.css",
    "*.scss"
  ]
  // 或 false 表示无副作用
  // 或数组指定
}

// 代码中使用 ES Module
import { cloneDeep, debounce } from 'lodash-es'; // 保留
import { Component } from './component'; // 可被 shake

7.3.2 作用域提升

// Webpack 作用域提升
module.exports = {
  optimization: {
    concatenateModules: true,
    moduleIds: 'deterministic'
  }
};

// 效果：合并模块，减少函数闭包
// 输入
// a.js
export const a = 1;

// b.js
import { a } from './a';
export const b = a + 1;

// 输出
const a = 1;
const b = a + 1;
export { a, b };

7.3.3 资源懒加载

// 图片懒加载
// 使用 Intersection Observer
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
  entries.forEach(entry => {
    if (entry.isIntersecting) {
      const img = entry.target;
      img.src = img.dataset.src;
      observer.unobserve(img);
    }
  });
});

// 使用 loading="lazy"
<img src="large.jpg" loading="lazy" alt="">

// 字体优化
// font-display: swap
@font-face {
  font-family: 'MyFont';
  src: url('/fonts/myfont.woff2') format('woff2');
  font-display: swap;
}

// 预加载字体
<link rel="preload" href="/fonts/myfont.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin>

第八部分：插件系统原理

8.1 插件架构概述

构建工具的插件系统通常遵循以下模式：

构建工具核心 → 插件容器 → 钩子系统 → 插件执行

8.2 插件生命周期

// 典型的插件生命周期

class Plugin {
  constructor(options) {
    this.options = options;
  }

  // 应用插件
  apply(compiler) {
    // 1. 初始化
    compiler.hooks.run.tap('Plugin', () => {
      // 构建开始
    });

    // 2. 编译
    compiler.hooks.compile.tap('Plugin', () => {
      // 开始编译
    });

    // 3. 发射
    compiler.hooks.emit.tap('Plugin', (compilation) => {
      // 输出前
    });

    // 4. 完成
    compiler.hooks.done.tap('Plugin', (stats) => {
      // 构建完成
    });
  }
}

8.3 常见插件场景

8.3.1 文件处理插件

// 处理特定文件类型的插件
class FileProcessorPlugin {
  constructor(options) {
    this.extensions = options.extensions || ['.txt', '.json'];
  }

  apply(compiler) {
    compiler.hooks.compilation.tap('FileProcessorPlugin', (compilation) => {
      compilation.hooks.optimizeChunkAssets.tap(
        'FileProcessorPlugin',
        (chunks) => {
          // 处理资源
        }
      );
    });
  }
}

8.3.2 注入代码插件

// 注入代码的插件
class InjectCodePlugin {
  constructor(code, position = 'head') {
    this.code = code;
    this.position = position;
  }

  apply(compiler) {
    compiler.hooks.compilation.tap('InjectCodePlugin', (compilation) => {
      compilation.hooks.htmlWebpackPluginAfterHtmlProcessing.tap(
        'InjectCodePlugin',
        (data) => {
          const script = `<script>${this.code}</script>`;

          if (this.position === 'head') {
            data.html = data.html.replace('</head>', `${script}</head>`);
          } else {
            data.html = data.html.replace('</body>', `${script}</body>`);
          }

          return data;
        }
      );
    });
  }
}

第九部分：最佳实践与实战

9.1 企业级项目配置

// 完整的企业级 Webpack 配置
// webpack.config.js

const path = require('path');
const webpack = require('webpack');
const HtmlWebpackPlugin = require('html-webpack-plugin');
const MiniCssExtractPlugin = require('mini-css-extract-plugin');
const CssMinimizerPlugin = require('css-minimizer-webpack-plugin');
const TerserPlugin = require('terser-webpack-plugin');
const { ModuleFederationPlugin } = require('webpack').container;
const CopyPlugin = require('copy-webpack-plugin');
const { CleanWebpackPlugin } = require('clean-webpack-plugin');

module.exports = (env, argv) => {
  const isProduction = argv.mode === 'production';
  const isAnalyze = argv.analyze;

  return {
    // 模式
    mode: argv.mode || 'development',

    // 入口
    entry: {
      main: './src/index.js',
      polyfill: './src/polyfill.js'
    },

    // 输出
    output: {
      path: path.resolve(__dirname, 'dist'),
      filename: isProduction
        ? 'js/[name].[contenthash:8].js'
        : 'js/[name].js',
      chunkFilename: isProduction
        ? 'js/[name].[contenthash:8].chunk.js'
        : 'js/[name].chunk.js',
      assetModuleFilename: 'assets/[name].[hash:8][ext]',
      publicPath: '/',
      pathinfo: !isProduction,
      clean: isProduction
    },

    // 解析
    resolve: {
      extensions: ['.js', '.jsx', '.ts', '.tsx', '.json', '.vue'],
      alias: {
        '@': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src'),
        'react-dom': 'react-dom'
      },
      modules: [path.resolve(__dirname, 'src'), 'node_modules']
    },

    // 模块
    module: {
      rules: [
        {
          test: /\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$/,
          exclude: /node_modules/,
          use: {
            loader: 'babel-loader',
            options: {
              cacheDirectory: true,
              cacheCompression: false
            }
          }
        },
        {
          test: /\.css$/,
          use: [
            isProduction ? MiniCssExtractPlugin.loader : 'style-loader',
            'css-loader',
            'postcss-loader'
          ]
        },
        {
          test: /\.(png|jpe?g|gif|webp|svg)$/i,
          type: 'asset',
          parser: { dataUrlCondition: { maxSize: 8 * 1024 } }
        },
        {
          test: /\.(woff2?|eot|ttf|otf)$/i,
          type: 'asset/resource'
        }
      ]
    },

    // 插件
    plugins: [
      new CleanWebpackPlugin(),
      new HtmlWebpackPlugin({
        template: './public/index.html',
        minify: isProduction
      }),
      isProduction && new MiniCssExtractPlugin({
        filename: 'css/[name].[contenthash:8].css'
      }),
      new webpack.DefinePlugin({
        'process.env.NODE_ENV': JSON.stringify(argv.mode)
      })
    ],

    // 优化
    optimization: {
      minimize: isProduction,
      minimizer: [
        new TerserPlugin(),
        new CssMinimizerPlugin()
      ],
      splitChunks: {
        chunks: 'all',
        cacheGroups: {
          framework: {
            test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/](react|react-dom)[\\/]/,
            name: 'framework',
            priority: 30
          },
          vendors: {
            test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]/,
            name: 'vendors',
            priority: 20
          }
        }
      },
      runtimeChunk: 'single'
    },

    // 开发服务器
    devServer: {
      port: 3000,
      hot: true,
      historyApiFallback: true,
      proxy: {
        '/api': 'http://localhost:8080'
      }
    },

    // 开发工具
    devtool: isProduction ? 'source-map' : 'eval-cheap-module-source-map',

    // 性能
    performance: {
      hints: isProduction ? 'warning' : false,
      maxEntrypointSize: 512000,
      maxAssetSize: 512000
    },

    // 缓存
    cache: {
      type: 'filesystem',
      buildDependencies: { config: [__filename] }
    },

    // 统计
    stats: 'normal'
  };
};

9.2 组件库打包配置

// Rollup 组件库配置
// rollup.config.js

import resolve from '@rollup/plugin-node-resolve';
import commonjs from '@rollup/plugin-commonjs';
import typescript from '@rollup/plugin-typescript';
import babel from '@rollup/plugin-babel';
import json from '@rollup/plugin-json';
import { terser } from '@rollup/plugin-terser';

const packageJson = require('./package.json');

export default {
  input: 'src/index.ts',
  output: [
    // ESM
    {
      file: packageJson.exports['.'].import,
      format: 'esm',
      sourcemap: true
    },
    // CJS
    {
      file: packageJson.exports['.'].require,
      format: 'cjs',
      sourcemap: true
    },
    // UMD
    {
      file: 'dist/my-lib.umd.js',
      format: 'umd',
      name: 'MyLib',
      globals: {
        react: 'React',
        'react-dom': 'ReactDOM'
      }
    }
  ],
  external: [
    'react',
    'react-dom',
    ...Object.keys(packageJson.dependencies || {})
  ],
  plugins: [
    resolve({
      extensions: ['.ts', '.js']
    }),
    commonjs(),
    typescript({
      tsconfig: './tsconfig.json',
      declaration: true,
      declarationDir: 'dist/types'
    }),
    babel({
      babelHelpers: 'bundled',
      extensions: ['.js', '.ts'],
      exclude: 'node_modules/**'
    }),
    json(),
    terser()
  ]
};

9.3 SSR 项目配置

// Vite SSR 配置
// vite.config.ssr.js

import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
import vue from '@vitejs/plugin-vue';
import { resolve } from 'path';

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [vue()],
  resolve: {
    alias: {
      '@': resolve(__dirname, 'src')
    }
  },
  build: {
    lib: {
      entry: resolve(__dirname, 'src/server/index.js'),
      formats: ['cjs'],
      fileName: () => 'server.js'
    },
    rollupOptions: {
      external: [
        'fs',
        'path',
        'url',
        'vue',
        'vue-server-renderer'
      ],
      output: {
        entryFileNames: 'server.js'
      }
    },
    ssr: true,
    minify: false
  },
  ssr: {
    external: ['vue', 'vue-server-renderer']
  }
});

第十部分：常见问题与解决方案

10.1 构建问题排查

// 问题排查清单

// 1. 模块解析失败
// 解决方案：
resolve: {
  extensions: ['.js', '.jsx', '.ts', '.tsx'],
  alias: {
    '@': path.resolve(__dirname, 'src')
  }
}

// 2. 循环依赖
// 解决方案：
// - 重构代码消除循环
// - 使用 Webpack 的 webpackIgnoreComment
// - 使用 dynamic import

// 3. 内存溢出
// 解决方案：
// - 增加 Node 内存限制
// - NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 webpack

// 4. 构建速度慢
// 解决方案：
// - 使用持久化缓存
// - 排除 node_modules
// - 使用 thread-loader
// - 升级到 Vite/esbuild

10.2 兼容性处理

// 兼容旧浏览器
// .browserslistrc
> 1%
last 2 versions
not dead
not IE 11

// babel 配置
// .babelrc
{
  "presets": [
    ["@babel/preset-env", {
      "targets": {
        "browsers": ["> 1%", "last 2 versions"]
      },
      "useBuiltIns": "usage",
      "corejs": 3
    }]
  ]
}

// Polyfill 自动导入
import 'core-js/stable';
import 'regenerator-runtime/runtime';

总结

本文详细介绍了前端构建工具的核心概念、配置方法与最佳实践：

  1. Webpack：功能最全面，生态最丰富，适合大型复杂项目
  2. Vite：现代开发体验优秀，开发速度快，适合快速迭代
  3. Rollup：专注于库打包，Tree Shaking 效果最好
  4. esbuild：极致速度，简单易用

在实际项目中，需要根据项目特点、团队熟悉度和性能要求进行合理选型和配置。通过本文的学习，应该能够：

  • 理解构建工具的核心原理
  • 熟练配置各种构建工具
  • 开发自定义 Loader 和 Plugin
  • 进行性能优化
  • 解决常见构建问题

持续关注构建工具的发展，选择最适合你项目的方案！

文件路径: 前端面试题汇总\03-工程实战\3-3 实际工程应用.md

实际工程应用场景解决方案 (拼多多高频)

一、性能优化：5s 优化到 1s 以内

1.1 如何实现首屏加载极致优化？

策略清单：

  1. 资源瘦身：
    • Gzip/Brotli 压缩。
    • Tree Shaking 剔除无用代码。
    • 图片优化：WebP 格式、CDN 裁剪、懒加载。
  2. 减少阻塞：
    • 代码分割 (Code Splitting)：使用 React.lazy 或 dynamic import 减小主 Bundle。
    • CSS 放在头部，JS 放在尾部 (defer/async)。
  3. 缓存利用：
    • 强缓存 + 协商缓存。
    • Service Worker 实现离线缓存。
  4. 渲染提速：
    • SSR (服务端渲染) 或 SSG (静态生成)。
    • 骨架屏 (Skeleton Screen) 提升感知速度。

1.2 首屏优化实战代码示例

1.2.1 Webpack/Vite 配置优化

// webpack.config.js - 生产环境优化配置
const CompressionPlugin = require('compression-webpack-plugin');
const TerserPlugin = require('terser-webpack-plugin');
const { BundleAnalyzerPlugin } = require('webpack-bundle-analyzer');

module.exports = {
  mode: 'production',
  optimization: {
    // 开启 tree shaking
    usedExports: true,
    // 代码分割策略
    splitChunks: {
      chunks: 'all',
      cacheGroups: {
        // 分离 vendor 代码
        vendor: {
          test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]/,
          name: 'vendors',
          priority: 10,
          reuseExistingChunk: true,
        },
        // 分离公共代码
        common: {
          minChunks: 2,
          priority: 5,
          reuseExistingChunk: true,
        },
        // 分离 UI 组件库
        uiLibrary: {
          test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/](antd|element-ui|mui)[\\/]/,
          name: 'ui-lib',
          priority: 20,
        },
        // 分离大文件
        largeModules: {
          test: /[\\/]node_modules[\\/]/,
          name(module) {
            const packageName = module.context.match(
              /[\\/]node_modules[\\/](.*?)([\\/]|$)/
            )[1];
            return `npm.${packageName.replace('@', '')}`;
          },
          priority: 15,
          chunks: 'initial',
        },
      },
    },
    // 压缩配置
    minimizer: [
      new TerserPlugin({
        terserOptions: {
          compress: {
            drop_console: true,
            drop_debugger: true,
            pure_funcs: ['console.log', 'console.info'],
          },
          output: {
            comments: false,
          },
        },
        extractComments: false,
      }),
    ],
    // 模块标识符优化
    moduleIds: 'deterministic',
    // 运行时Chunk优化
    runtimeChunk: 'single',
  },
  plugins: [
    // 开启 Gzip 压缩
    new CompressionPlugin({
      algorithm: 'gzip',
      test: /\.(js|css|html|svg)$/,
      threshold: 10240,
      minRatio: 0.8,
    }),
    // 打包分析（开发时使用）
    // new BundleAnalyzerPlugin(),
  ],
  // 持久化缓存
  cache: {
    type: 'filesystem',
    buildDependencies: {
      config: [__filename],
    },
  },
};

1.2.2 Vite 配置优化

// vite.config.js
import { defineConfig } from 'vite';
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react';
import { resolve } from 'path';
import compression from 'vite-plugin-compression';

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [
    react(),
    // Gzip 压缩
    compression({
      algorithm: 'gzip',
      ext: '.gz',
      threshold: 10240,
    }),
    // Brotli 压缩（可选，比 Gzip 压缩率更高）
    compression({
      algorithm: 'brotliCompress',
      ext: '.br',
      threshold: 10240,
    }),
  ],
  build: {
    // 目标浏览器
    target: 'es2015',
    // 输出目录
    outDir: 'dist',
    // 资源目录
    assetsDir: 'assets',
    // 代码分割
    rollupOptions: {
      output: {
        // 手动分包
        manualChunks: {
          'react-vendor': ['react', 'react-dom', 'react-router-dom'],
          'ui-vendor': ['antd', '@ant-design/icons'],
          'utils-vendor': ['lodash', 'axios', 'dayjs'],
        },
        // 文件名哈希
        entryFileNames: 'js/[name].[hash].js',
        chunkFileNames: 'js/[name].[hash].js',
        assetFileNames: '[ext]/[name].[hash].[ext]',
        // CDN 路径配置
        publicPath: 'https://cdn.example.com/',
      },
    },
    // 压缩配置
    minify: 'terser',
    terserOptions: {
      compress: {
        drop_console: true,
        drop_debugger: true,
      },
    },
    // CSS 代码分割
    cssCodeSplit: true,
    // 生成 sourcemap
    sourcemap: false,
    // 块大小警告阈值
    chunkSizeWarningLimit: 500,
    // 启用 gzip 报告
    reportCompressedSize: true,
  },
  // 依赖预构建
  optimizeDeps: {
    include: ['react', 'react-dom', 'react-router-dom', 'axios', 'lodash'],
    exclude: ['some-big-library'],
  },
  // 开发服务器配置
  server: {
    port: 3000,
    proxy: {
      '/api': {
        target: 'http://localhost:8080',
        changeOrigin: true,
        rewrite: (path) => path.replace(/^\/api/, ''),
      },
    },
  },
  // 预览服务器配置
  preview: {
    port: 4173,
    proxy: {
      '/api': 'http://localhost:8080',
    },
  },
});

1.2.3 HTML 入口文件优化

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta name="description" content="优质商品，优质服务">
  <title>电商平台</title>

  <!-- 关键 CSS 内联 -->
  <style>
    /* 首屏必须的关键样式 */
    .header { height: 60px; background: #fff; }
    .hero { min-height: 400px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); }
    .loading-skeleton { background: #f0f0f0; animation: pulse 1.5s infinite; }
    @keyframes pulse {
      0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
      50% { opacity: 0.5; }
    }
  </style>

  <!-- 预连接关键域名 -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://cdn.example.com">
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://api.example.com">

  <!-- DNS 预解析 -->
  <link rel="dns-prefetch" href="//cdn.example.com">
  <link rel="dns-prefetch" href="//api.example.com">

  <!-- 预加载关键资源 -->
  <link rel="preload" href="/assets/main.css" as="style">
  <link rel="preload" href="/assets/vendor.js" as="script">

  <!-- 主样式表 -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="/assets/main.css">

  <!-- 图标字体预加载 -->
  <link rel="preload" href="/assets/icon-font.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin>

  <!-- 关键 JS 预加载 -->
  <link rel="modulepreload" href="/assets/vendor.js">
  <link rel="modulepreload" href="/assets/main.js">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root">
    <!-- 骨架屏 - 提升感知速度 -->
    <div class="app-skeleton">
      <header class="header">
        <div class="skeleton-logo"></div>
        <div class="skeleton-nav"></div>
      </header>
      <main class="hero">
        <div class="skeleton-title"></div>
        <div class="skeleton-desc"></div>
        <div class="skeleton-button"></div>
      </main>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- 关键 JS 使用 defer 加载 -->
  <script type="module" src="/assets/main.js"></script>

  <!-- 离线 Service Worker -->
  <script>
    if ('serviceWorker' in navigator) {
      window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js')
          .then(registration => {
            console.log('SW registered:', registration.scope);
          })
          .catch(error => {
            console.log('SW registration failed:', error);
          });
      });
    }
  </script>
</body>
</html>

1.3 图片优化策略

// 图片优化工具函数

/**
 * 生成 CDN 图片 URL
 * @param {string} url 原始图片 URL
 * @param {object} options 裁剪选项
 * @returns {string} 优化后的 URL
 */
export function getOptimizedImageUrl(url, options = {}) {
  const {
    width,
    height,
    quality = 80,
    format = 'webp',
    mode = 'fill', // fill, fit, limit, scale
  } = options;

  // 如果不是 CDN 图片，直接返回原图
  if (!url.includes('cdn.example.com')) {
    return url;
  }

  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  if (width) params.append('w', width);
  if (height) params.append('h', height);
  if (quality) params.append('q', quality);
  if (format) params.append('fm', format);
  if (mode) params.append('m', mode);

  const paramString = params.toString();
  return paramString ? `${url}?${paramString}` : url;
}

/**
 * 响应式图片组件 - React 示例
 */
export const ResponsiveImage = ({ src, srcSet, alt, sizes, className }) => {
  const generateSrcSet = (url) => {
    const widths = [320, 640, 960, 1280, 1920];
    return widths
      .map(w => `${getOptimizedImageUrl(url, { width: w })} ${w}w`)
      .join(', ');
  };

  return (
    <img
      src={getOptimizedImageUrl(src, { width: 640 })}
      srcSet={generateSrcSet(src)}
      sizes={sizes || '(max-width: 640px) 100vw, (max-width: 1280px) 50vw, 33vw'}
      alt={alt}
      className={className}
      loading="lazy"
      decoding="async"
    />
  );
};

/**
 * 图片懒加载组件 - Intersection Observer 实现
 */
export class LazyImage extends React.Component {
  constructor(props) {
    super(props);
    this.imageRef = React.createRef();
    this.state = { isLoaded: false, isInView: false };
  }

  componentDidMount() {
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            this.setState({ isInView: true });
            observer.disconnect();
          }
        });
      },
      { rootMargin: '50px' }
    );

    if (this.imageRef.current) {
      observer.observe(this.imageRef.current);
    }
  }

  render() {
    const { src, alt, placeholder, ...props } = this.props;
    const { isLoaded, isInView } = this.state;

    return (
      <div ref={this.imageRef} style={{ position: 'relative' }}>
        {!isLoaded && (
          <div style={{
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            width: '100%',
            height: '100%',
            background: '#f0f0f0'
          }}>
            {placeholder}
          </div>
        )}
        {isInView && (
          <img
            src={src}
            alt={alt}
            onLoad={() => this.setState({ isLoaded: true })}
            {...props}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }
}

1.4 首屏加载性能指标与优化目标

// 性能指标监控与优化目标

/**
 * 性能指标类型
 */
const PerformanceMetrics = {
  // 首次内容绘制 (FCP)
  FCP: 'first-contentful-paint',
  // 首次有意义绘制 (FMP)
  FMP: 'first-meaningful-paint',
  // 最大内容绘制 (LCP)
  LCP: 'largest-contentful-paint',
  // 首次输入延迟 (FID)
  FID: 'first-input-delay',
  // 累积布局偏移 (CLS)
  CLS: 'cumulative-layout-shift',
  // 交互到绘制 (TTI)
  TTI: 'time-to-interactive',
  // 首字节时间 (TTFB)
  TTFB: 'ttfb',
};

/**
 * 性能优化目标配置
 */
const PerformanceTargets = {
  // 首屏加载目标（秒）
  FCP: 1.8,
  LCP: 2.5,
  TTI: 3.8,
  // 首次输入延迟目标（毫秒）
  FID: 100,
  // 累积布局偏移目标
  CLS: 0.1,
  // 首字节时间目标（秒）
  TTFB: 0.6,
};

/**
 * 性能监控 Hook - React
 */
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';

export function usePerformanceMetrics() {
  const [metrics, setMetrics] = useState({});

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!('PerformanceObserver' in window)) return;

    // 观察 LCP
    const lcpObserver = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
      const entries = list.getEntries();
      const lastEntry = entries[entries.length - 1];
      setMetrics(prev => ({
        ...prev,
        LCP: lastEntry.renderTime || lastEntry.loadTime,
      }));
    });
    lcpObserver.observe({ entryType: 'largest-contentful-paint' });

    // 观察 CLS
    const clsObserver = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
      let clsScore = 0;
      for (const entry of list.getEntries()) {
        if (!entry.hadRecentInput) {
          clsScore += entry.value;
        }
      }
      setMetrics(prev => ({ ...prev, CLS: clsScore }));
    });
    clsObserver.observe({ entryType: 'layout-shift' });

    // 观察 FID
    const fidObserver = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
      const firstEntry = list.getEntries()[0];
      if (firstEntry) {
        setMetrics(prev => ({
          ...prev,
          FID: firstEntry.processingStart - firstEntry.startTime,
        }));
      }
    });
    fidObserver.observe({ entryType: 'first-input' });

    // 获取其他性能指标
    const paintEntries = performance.getEntriesByType('paint');
    paintEntries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.name === 'first-contentful-paint') {
        setMetrics(prev => ({ ...prev, FCP: entry.startTime }));
      }
    });

    return () => {
      lcpObserver.disconnect();
      clsObserver.disconnect();
      fidObserver.disconnect();
    };
  }, []);

  return metrics;
}

/**
 * 性能报告上传
 */
export function reportPerformance(metrics) {
  const performanceData = {
    url: window.location.href,
    timestamp: Date.now(),
    network: {
      downlink: navigator.connection?.downlink,
      effectiveType: navigator.connection?.effectiveType,
      rtt: navigator.connection?.rtt,
    },
    metrics: {
      ...metrics,
      // 计算是否达标
      FCP_PASS: metrics.FCP <= PerformanceTargets.FCP * 1000,
      LCP_PASS: metrics.LCP <= PerformanceTargets.LCP * 1000,
      FID_PASS: metrics.FID <= PerformanceTargets.FID,
      CLS_PASS: metrics.CLS <= PerformanceTargets.CLS,
    },
  };

  // 使用 sendBeacon 上报，不阻塞页面关闭
  if (navigator.sendBeacon) {
    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(performanceData)], {
      type: 'application/json',
    });
    navigator.sendBeacon('/api/metrics/performance', blob);
  } else {
    // 降级方案
    fetch('/api/metrics/performance', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify(performanceData),
      keepalive: true,
    });
  }
}

二、架构设计：可撤销/重做 (Undo/Redo)

2.1 方案选型

方案对比：

  1. 状态快照流 (Snapshot)：
    • 原理：每次操作保存一个完整的 state 到历史栈。
    • 缺点：内存开销大。
    • 适用场景：状态较小、操作不频繁的场景。
  2. 命令模式 (Command Pattern)：
    • 原理：将操作封装为对象，包含 execute() 和 undo() 方法。
    • 优点：节省空间，可精确回滚。
    • 适用场景：复杂操作、状态较大的场景。

2.2 命令模式实现 - 完整代码

// types.ts - 类型定义

// 命令接口
export interface Command<T = any> {
  execute(): T;
  undo(): T;
  redo(): T;
}

// 可序列化的命令（用于持久化）
export interface SerializableCommand<T = any> extends Command<T> {
  type: string;
  payload: any;
  timestamp: number;
}

// 文档状态
export interface DocumentState {
  content: string;
  selection: { start: number; end: number };
  history: string[];
}

// 编辑器状态
export interface EditorState {
  documents: Record<string, DocumentState>;
  activeDocumentId: string | null;
  clipboard: string[];
}

// command.ts - 命令实现

import { Command, SerializableCommand, DocumentState } from './types';

/**
 * 插入文本命令
 */
export class InsertTextCommand implements SerializableCommand {
  type = 'INSERT_TEXT';
  timestamp = Date.now();

  constructor(
    private documentId: string,
    private position: number,
    private text: string,
    private previousState?: DocumentState
  ) {}

  get payload() {
    return {
      documentId: this.documentId,
      position: this.position,
      text: this.text,
    };
  }

  execute(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    const doc = state.documents[this.documentId];
    if (!doc) return state;

    const newContent =
      doc.content.slice(0, this.position) +
      this.text +
      doc.content.slice(this.position);

    return {
      ...state,
      documents: {
        ...state.documents,
        [this.documentId]: {
          ...doc,
          content: newContent,
          selection: {
            start: this.position + this.text.length,
            end: this.position + this.text.length,
          },
          history: [...doc.history, doc.content],
        },
      },
    };
  }

  undo(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    const doc = state.documents[this.documentId];
    if (!doc || doc.history.length === 0) return state;

    const previousContent = doc.history[doc.history.length - 1];
    const newHistory = doc.history.slice(0, -1);

    return {
      ...state,
      documents: {
        ...state.documents,
        [this.documentId]: {
          ...doc,
          content: previousContent,
          history: newHistory,
          selection: {
            start: this.position,
            end: this.position,
          },
        },
      },
    };
  }

  redo(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    return this.execute(state);
  }

  static fromJSON(json: any): InsertTextCommand {
    return new InsertTextCommand(
      json.payload.documentId,
      json.payload.position,
      json.payload.text
    );
  }
}

/**
 * 删除文本命令
 */
export class DeleteTextCommand implements SerializableCommand {
  type = 'DELETE_TEXT';
  timestamp = Date.now();

  constructor(
    private documentId: string,
    private position: number,
    private length: number,
    private deletedText?: string
  ) {}

  get payload() {
    return {
      documentId: this.documentId,
      position: this.position,
      length: this.length,
      deletedText: this.deletedText,
    };
  }

  execute(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    const doc = state.documents[this.documentId];
    if (!doc) return state;

    const deletedText = doc.content.slice(
      this.position,
      this.position + this.length
    );
    const newContent =
      doc.content.slice(0, this.position) +
      doc.content.slice(this.position + this.length);

    return {
      ...state,
      documents: {
        ...state.documents,
        [this.documentId]: {
          ...doc,
          content: newContent,
          selection: {
            start: this.position,
            end: this.position,
          },
          history: [...doc.history, doc.content],
        },
      },
    };
  }

  undo(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    const doc = state.documents[this.documentId];
    if (!doc || doc.history.length === 0) return state;

    const previousContent = doc.history[doc.history.length - 1];
    const newHistory = doc.history.slice(0, -1);

    return {
      ...state,
      documents: {
        ...state.documents,
        [this.documentId]: {
          ...doc,
          content: previousContent,
          history: newHistory,
          selection: {
            start: this.position,
            end: this.position + (this.deletedText?.length || this.length),
          },
        },
      },
    };
  }

  redo(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    return this.execute(state);
  }

  static fromJSON(json: any): DeleteTextCommand {
    return new DeleteTextCommand(
      json.payload.documentId,
      json.payload.position,
      json.payload.length,
      json.payload.deletedText
    );
  }
}

/**
 * 格式化命令
 */
export class FormatCommand implements SerializableCommand {
  type = 'FORMAT';
  timestamp = Date.now();

  constructor(
    private documentId: string,
    private format: string,
    private start: number,
    private end: number
  ) {}

  get payload() {
    return {
      documentId: this.documentId,
      format: this.format,
      start: this.start,
      end: this.end,
    };
  }

  execute(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    const doc = state.documents[this.documentId];
    if (!doc) return state;

    // 格式化逻辑...
    return {
      ...state,
      documents: {
        ...state.documents,
        [this.documentId]: {
          ...doc,
          history: [...doc.history, doc.content],
        },
      },
    };
  }

  undo(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    const doc = state.documents[this.documentId];
    if (!doc || doc.history.length === 0) return state;

    const previousContent = doc.history[doc.history.length - 1];
    return {
      ...state,
      documents: {
        ...state.documents,
        [this.documentId]: {
          ...doc,
          content: previousContent,
          history: doc.history.slice(0, -1),
        },
      },
    };
  }

  redo(state: EditorState): EditorState {
    return this.execute(state);
  }
}

// history-manager.ts - 历史管理器

import { Command, SerializableCommand, EditorState } from './types';
import {
  InsertTextCommand,
  DeleteTextCommand,
  FormatCommand,
} from './command';

/**
 * 命令注册表
 */
const CommandRegistry: Record<string, any> = {
  INSERT_TEXT: InsertTextCommand,
  DELETE_TEXT: DeleteTextCommand,
  FORMAT: FormatCommand,
};

/**
 * 历史记录管理器
 */
export class HistoryManager {
  private undoStack: SerializableCommand[] = [];
  private redoStack: SerializableCommand[] = [];
  private maxHistorySize: number;
  private state: EditorState;
  private listeners: Set<(state: EditorState) => void> = new Set();

  constructor(initialState: EditorState, maxHistorySize = 100) {
    this.state = initialState;
    this.maxHistorySize = maxHistorySize;
  }

  /**
   * 执行命令
   */
  executeCommand(command: Command): void {
    // 执行命令
    this.state = command.execute(this.state);

    // 将命令推入撤销栈
    if (this.isUndoableCommand(command)) {
      this.undoStack.push(command as SerializableCommand);
      // 限制历史记录大小
      if (this.undoStack.length > this.maxHistorySize) {
        this.undoStack.shift();
      }
    }

    // 清空重做栈（执行新命令后重做栈应该被清空）
    this.redoStack = [];

    // 通知监听器
    this.notifyListeners();
  }

  /**
   * 撤销
   */
  undo(): boolean {
    if (!this.canUndo()) return false;

    const command = this.undoStack.pop()!;
    this.state = command.undo(this.state);
    this.redoStack.push(command);

    this.notifyListeners();
    return true;
  }

  /**
   * 重做
   */
  redo(): boolean {
    if (!this.canRedo()) return false;

    const command = this.redoStack.pop()!;
    this.state = command.redo(this.state);
    this.undoStack.push(command);

    this.notifyListeners();
    return true;
  }

  /**
   * 是否可以撤销
   */
  canUndo(): boolean {
    return this.undoStack.length > 0;
  }

  /**
   * 是否可以重做
   */
  canRedo(): boolean {
    return this.redoStack.length > 0;
  }

  /**
   * 获取当前状态
   */
  getState(): EditorState {
    return this.state;
  }

  /**
   * 获取撤销栈长度
   */
  getUndoStackSize(): number {
    return this.undoStack.length;
  }

  /**
   * 获取重做栈长度
   */
  getRedoStackSize(): number {
    return this.redoStack.length;
  }

  /**
   * 订阅状态变化
   */
  subscribe(listener: (state: EditorState) => void): () => void {
    this.listeners.add(listener);
    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);
  }

  /**
   * 通知所有监听器
   */
  private notifyListeners(): void {
    this.listeners.forEach((listener) => listener(this.state));
  }

  /**
   * 判断命令是否可撤销
   */
  private isUndoableCommand(command: Command): boolean {
    return 'type' in command && 'payload' in command;
  }

  /**
   * 序列化历史记录（用于持久化）
   */
  serialize(): string {
    return JSON.stringify({
      undoStack: this.undoStack,
      redoStack: this.redoStack,
    });
  }

  /**
   * 反序列化历史记录
   */
  static deserialize(json: string, initialState: EditorState): HistoryManager {
    const data = JSON.parse(json);
    const manager = new HistoryManager(initialState);

    // 反序列化命令
    manager.undoStack = data.undoStack.map((cmd: any) => {
      const CommandClass = CommandRegistry[cmd.type];
      if (!CommandClass) {
        console.warn(`Unknown command type: ${cmd.type}`);
        return null;
      }
      return CommandClass.fromJSON(cmd);
    }).filter(Boolean);

    manager.redoStack = data.redoStack.map((cmd: any) => {
      const CommandClass = CommandRegistry[cmd.type];
      if (!CommandClass) return null;
      return CommandClass.fromJSON(cmd);
    }).filter(Boolean);

    return manager;
  }

  /**
   * 跳转到指定历史点
   */
  jumpTo(index: number): void {
    if (index < 0 || index >= this.undoStack.length) return;

    // 计算需要撤销/重做的次数
    const steps = this.undoStack.length - 1 - index;

    if (steps > 0) {
      // 撤销多次
      for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
        this.undo();
      }
    } else if (steps < 0) {
      // 重做多次
      for (let i = 0; i < Math.abs(steps); i++) {
        this.redo();
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * 清除历史记录
   */
  clear(): void {
    this.undoStack = [];
    this.redoStack = [];
    this.notifyListeners();
  }
}

// useHistory.ts - React Hook 封装

import { useState, useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { HistoryManager } from './history-manager';
import { Command, EditorState } from './types';

export interface UseHistoryOptions {
  maxHistorySize?: number;
  enableAutoSave?: boolean;
  autoSaveKey?: string;
}

export interface UseHistoryReturn {
  state: EditorState;
  undo: () => boolean;
  redo: () => boolean;
  canUndo: boolean;
  canRedo: boolean;
  executeCommand: (command: Command) => void;
  goToStep: (step: number) => void;
  historySteps: number;
  currentStep: number;
}

/**
 * 历史记录 Hook
 */
export function useHistory(
  initialState: EditorState,
  options: UseHistoryOptions = {}
): UseHistoryReturn {
  const {
    maxHistorySize = 100,
    enableAutoSave = true,
    autoSaveKey = 'editor-history',
  } = options;

  const historyRef = useRef<HistoryManager | null>(null);

  // 初始化历史管理器
  if (!historyRef.current) {
    // 尝试从 localStorage 恢复
    if (enableAutoSave) {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(autoSaveKey);
      if (saved) {
        try {
          historyRef.current = HistoryManager.deserialize(saved, initialState);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Failed to restore history:', e);
          historyRef.current = new HistoryManager(initialState, maxHistorySize);
        }
      } else {
        historyRef.current = new HistoryManager(initialState, maxHistorySize);
      }
    } else {
      historyRef.current = new HistoryManager(initialState, maxHistorySize);
    }
  }

  const [state, setState] = useState<EditorState>(
    historyRef.current.getState()
  );
  const [canUndo, setCanUndo] = useState(false);
  const [canRedo, setCanRedo] = useState(false);
  const [historySteps, setHistorySteps] = useState(0);
  const [currentStep, setCurrentStep] = useState(0);

  // 订阅状态变化
  useEffect(() => {
    const unsubscribe = historyRef.current!.subscribe((newState) => {
      setState(newState);
      setCanUndo(historyRef.current!.canUndo());
      setCanRedo(historyRef.current!.canRedo());
      setHistorySteps(historyRef.current!.getUndoStackSize());
    });

    // 初始化状态
    setCanUndo(historyRef.current!.canUndo());
    setCanRedo(historyRef.current!.canRedo());
    setHistorySteps(historyRef.current!.getUndoStackSize());

    return unsubscribe;
  }, []);

  // 自动保存
  useEffect(() => {
    if (enableAutoSave) {
      const serialized = historyRef.current!.serialize();
      localStorage.setItem(autoSaveKey, serialized);
    }
  }, [state, enableAutoSave, autoSaveKey]);

  // 执行命令
  const executeCommand = useCallback((command: Command) => {
    historyRef.current!.executeCommand(command);
  }, []);

  // 撤销
  const undo = useCallback(() => {
    return historyRef.current!.undo();
  }, []);

  // 重做
  const redo = useCallback(() => {
    return historyRef.current!.redo();
  }, []);

  // 跳转到指定步骤
  const goToStep = useCallback((step: number) => {
    historyRef.current!.jumpTo(step);
  }, []);

  return {
    state,
    undo,
    redo,
    canUndo,
    canRedo,
    executeCommand,
    goToStep,
    historySteps,
    currentStep: historyRef.current!.getUndoStackSize() - 1,
  };
}

// Editor.tsx - 使用示例

import React, { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useHistory, UseHistoryReturn } from './useHistory';
import { InsertTextCommand, DeleteTextCommand } from './command';
import { EditorState } from './types';

const initialState: EditorState = {
  documents: {
    'doc-1': {
      content: '',
      selection: { start: 0, end: 0 },
      history: [],
    },
  },
  activeDocumentId: 'doc-1',
  clipboard: [],
};

export const Editor: React.FC = () => {
  const {
    state,
    undo,
    redo,
    canUndo,
    canRedo,
    executeCommand,
  }: UseHistoryReturn = useHistory(initialState);

  const activeDoc = state.documents[state.activeDocumentId!];

  // 处理文本输入
  const handleTextInput = useCallback(
    (text: string) => {
      const command = new InsertTextCommand(
        state.activeDocumentId!,
        activeDoc.selection.start,
        text
      );
      executeCommand(command);
    },
    [state.activeDocumentId, activeDoc.selection.start, executeCommand]
  );

  // 处理删除
  const handleDelete = useCallback(
    (length: number) => {
      const command = new DeleteTextCommand(
        state.activeDocumentId!,
        activeDoc.selection.start,
        length
      );
      executeCommand(command);
    },
    [state.activeDocumentId, activeDoc.selection.start, executeCommand]
  );

  // 处理键盘快捷键
  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
      if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'z') {
        if (e.shiftKey) {
          redo();
        } else {
          undo();
        }
        e.preventDefault();
      }

      if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'y') {
        redo();
        e.preventDefault();
      }
    },
    [undo, redo]
  );

  return (
    <div className="editor" onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}>
      <div className="toolbar">
        <button onClick={undo} disabled={!canUndo}>
          撤销
        </button>
        <button onClick={redo} disabled={!canRedo}>
          重做
        </button>
      </div>

      <div className="content">
        <textarea
          value={activeDoc.content}
          onChange={(e) => handleTextInput(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="在此输入文本..."
        />
      </div>

      <div className="status">
        字数: {activeDoc.content.length}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

2.3 状态快照模式实现

// snapshot-history.ts - 快照模式实现

import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';

/**
 * 快照历史管理器
 * 每次操作保存完整的应用状态快照
 */
export class SnapshotHistoryManager<T> {
  private past: T[] = [];
  private future: T[] = [];
  private maxSize: number;
  private current: T;

  constructor(initialState: T, maxSize = 50) {
    this.current = initialState;
    this.maxSize = maxSize;
  }

  /**
   * 保存状态快照
   */
  snapshot(state: T): void {
    // 将当前状态推入历史
    this.past.push(this.current);

    // 限制历史大小
    if (this.past.length > this.maxSize) {
      this.past.shift();
    }

    // 更新当前状态
    this.current = state;

    // 清空未来状态（保存新快照后不能重做）
    this.future = [];
  }

  /**
   * 撤销
   */
  undo(): T | null {
    if (this.past.length === 0) return null;

    // 将当前状态推入未来
    this.future.push(this.current);

    // 弹出上一个状态
    const previousState = this.past.pop()!;
    this.current = previousState;

    return this.current;
  }

  /**
   * 重做
   */
  redo(): T | null {
    if (this.future.length === 0) return null;

    // 将当前状态推入历史
    this.past.push(this.current);

    // 弹出下一个状态
    const nextState = this.future.pop()!;
    this.current = nextState;

    return this.current;
  }

  /**
   * 获取当前状态
   */
  getState(): T {
    return this.current;
  }

  /**
   * 是否可以撤销
   */
  canUndo(): boolean {
    return this.past.length > 0;
  }

  /**
   * 是否可以重做
   */
  canRedo(): boolean {
    return this.future.length > 0;
  }

  /**
   * 获取历史长度
   */
  getHistoryLength(): number {
    return this.past.length;
  }

  /**
   * 跳转到指定历史索引
   */
  goTo(index: number): T | null {
    if (index < 0 || index >= this.past.length) return null;

    // 计算需要移动的步数
    const steps = this.past.length - 1 - index;

    if (steps > 0) {
      // 向后移动（撤销）
      for (let i = 0; i < steps; i++) {
        this.future.push(this.past.pop()!);
        this.current = this.past[this.past.length - 1] || this.current;
      }
    }

    return this.current;
  }

  /**
   * 清除历史
   */
  clear(): void {
    this.past = [];
    this.future = [];
  }

  /**
   * 序列化
   */
  serialize(): string {
    return JSON.stringify({
      past: this.past,
      future: this.future,
      current: this.current,
    });
  }

  /**
   * 反序列化
   */
  static deserialize<T>(json: string): SnapshotHistoryManager<T> {
    const data = JSON.parse(json);
    const manager = new SnapshotHistoryManager<T>(data.current);
    manager.past = data.past;
    manager.future = data.future;
    return manager;
  }
}

/**
 * 使用快照历史的 React Hook
 */
export function useSnapshotHistory<T>(
  initialState: T,
  options: {
    maxSize?: number;
    enableDebounce?: boolean;
    debounceMs?: number;
  } = {}
) {
  const { maxSize = 50, enableDebounce = true, debounceMs = 500 } = options;

  const managerRef = useRef<SnapshotHistoryManager<T> | null>(null);
  const debounceRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  if (!managerRef.current) {
    managerRef.current = new SnapshotHistoryManager(initialState, maxSize);
  }

  const [state, setState] = useState<T>(initialState);
  const [canUndo, setCanUndo] = useState(false);
  const [canRedo, setCanRedo] = useState(false);

  const updateState = useCallback((newState: T) => {
    setState(newState);
    setCanUndo(managerRef.current!.canUndo());
    setCanRedo(managerRef.current!.canRedo());
  }, []);

  /**
   * 更新状态并保存快照
   */
  const setStateWithSnapshot = useCallback(
    (newState: T | ((prev: T) => T)) => {
      const resolvedState =
        typeof newState === 'function'
          ? (newState as (prev: T) => T)(managerRef.current!.getState())
          : newState;

      if (enableDebounce) {
        // 防抖保存
        if (debounceRef.current) {
          clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
        }
        debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
          managerRef.current!.snapshot(resolvedState);
          updateState(resolvedState);
        }, debounceMs);
      } else {
        managerRef.current!.snapshot(resolvedState);
        updateState(resolvedState);
      }
    },
    [enableDebounce, debounceMs, updateState]
  );

  /**
   * 撤销
   */
  const undo = useCallback(() => {
    const previousState = managerRef.current!.undo();
    if (previousState !== null) {
      updateState(previousState);
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }, [updateState]);

  /**
   * 重做
   */
  const redo = useCallback(() => {
    const nextState = managerRef.current!.redo();
    if (nextState !== null) {
      updateState(nextState);
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }, [updateState]);

  /**
   * 清除历史
   */
  const clearHistory = useCallback(() => {
    managerRef.current!.clear();
    setCanUndo(false);
    setCanRedo(false);
  }, []);

  // 清理防抖定时器
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (debounceRef.current) {
        clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);
      }
    };
  }, []);

  return {
    state,
    setState: setStateWithSnapshot,
    undo,
    redo,
    canUndo,
    canRedo,
    clearHistory,
    historyLength: managerRef.current.getHistoryLength(),
  };
}

三、精准埋点数据采集

3.1 埋点方案对比

方案对比：

方案 优点 缺点 适用场景
代码埋点 数据精确 开发成本高 核心业务指标
可视化埋点 埋点效率高 只能监听到的元素 运营活动页面
无痕埋点 无需开发介入 数据量大，噪音多 用户行为分析

3.2 代码埋点实现

// tracker.ts - 埋点 SDK

/**
 * 埋点事件类型
 */
export enum EventType {
  // 页面事件
  PAGE_VIEW = 'page_view',
  PAGE_LEAVE = 'page_leave',

  // 点击事件
  CLICK = 'click',
  TAP = 'tap',

  // 自定义事件
  CUSTOM = 'custom',

  // 性能事件
  PERFORMANCE = 'performance',

  // 错误事件
  ERROR = 'error',
}

/**
 * 埋点数据基础结构
 */
export interface TrackEvent {
  // 事件类型
  event: EventType;
  // 事件触发时间
  timestamp: number;
  // 用户 ID
  userId?: string;
  // 会话 ID
  sessionId: string;
  // 页面 URL
  url: string;
  // 页面标题
  title: string;
  // 设备信息
  device: DeviceInfo;
  // 事件属性
  properties: Record<string, any>;
}

/**
 * 设备信息
 */
export interface DeviceInfo {
  // 操作系统
  os: string;
  // 操作系统版本
  osVersion: string;
  // 浏览器
  browser: string;
  // 浏览器版本
  browserVersion: string;
  // 屏幕宽度
  screenWidth: number;
  // 屏幕高度
  screenHeight: number;
  // 设备类型
  deviceType: 'mobile' | 'tablet' | 'desktop';
  // 语言
  language: string;
  // 网络类型
  networkType?: string;
}

/**
 * 埋点配置
 */
export interface TrackerConfig {
  // 上报地址
  serverUrl: string;
  // 应用 ID
  appId: string;
  // 应用版本
  appVersion: string;
  // 环境
  env: 'development' | 'production';
  // 是否开启调试
  debug: boolean;
  // 自动采集页面事件
  autoTrackPageView: boolean;
  // 自动采集性能
  autoTrackPerformance: boolean;
  // 自动采集错误
  autoTrackError: boolean;
  // 批量上报阈值
  batchSize: number;
  // 上报间隔（毫秒）
  uploadInterval: number;
  // 最大缓存数量
  maxCacheSize: number;
}

/**
 * 埋点 SDK
 */
export class Tracker {
  private config: TrackerConfig;
  private queue: TrackEvent[] = [];
  private sessionId: string;
  private userId?: string;
  private deviceInfo: DeviceInfo;
  private uploadTimer?: NodeJS.Timeout;
  private isOnline = true;

  constructor(config: Partial<TrackerConfig> = {}) {
    // 默认配置
    this.config = {
      serverUrl: '',
      appId: '',
      appVersion: '1.0.0',
      env: 'production',
      debug: false,
      autoTrackPageView: true,
      autoTrackPerformance: true,
      autoTrackError: true,
      batchSize: 10,
      uploadInterval: 5000,
      maxCacheSize: 100,
      ...config,
    };

    // 初始化会话 ID
    this.sessionId = this.generateSessionId();

    // 获取设备信息
    this.deviceInfo = this.getDeviceInfo();

    // 初始化
    this.init();
  }

  /**
   * 初始化
   */
  private init(): void {
    // 自动采集页面事件
    if (this.config.autoTrackPageView) {
      this.trackPageView();
      this.setupPageViewListeners();
    }

    // 自动采集性能
    if (this.config.autoTrackPerformance) {
      this.trackPerformance();
    }

    // 自动采集错误
    if (this.config.autoTrackError) {
      this.trackError();
    }

    // 监听网络状态
    this.setupNetworkListeners();

    // 启动定时上传
    this.startUploadTimer();

    // 页面卸载时上传
    this.setupBeforeUnload();
  }

  /**
   * 生成会话 ID
   */
  private generateSessionId(): string {
    return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  }

  /**
   * 获取设备信息
   */
  private getDeviceInfo(): DeviceInfo {
    const ua = navigator.userAgent;

    // 操作系统
    let os = 'Unknown';
    let osVersion = 'Unknown';
    if (/Windows/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'Windows';
      osVersion = /Windows NT ([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Mac OS X/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'macOS';
      osVersion = /Mac OS X ([\d._]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1]?.replace(/_/g, '.') || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Android/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'Android';
      osVersion = /Android ([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/iPhone|iPad|iPod/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'iOS';
      osVersion = /OS ([\d_]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1]?.replace(/_/g, '.') || 'Unknown';
    }

    // 浏览器
    let browser = 'Unknown';
    let browserVersion = 'Unknown';
    if (/Chrome/.test(ua) && !/Edge/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Chrome';
      browserVersion = /Chrome\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Safari/.test(ua) && !/Chrome/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Safari';
      browserVersion = /Version\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Firefox/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Firefox';
      browserVersion = /Firefox\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Edge/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Edge';
      browserVersion = /Edge\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    }

    // 设备类型
    let deviceType: 'mobile' | 'tablet' | 'desktop' = 'desktop';
    if (/Mobile|Android|iPhone|iPod/.test(ua)) {
      deviceType = 'mobile';
    } else if (/Tablet|iPad/.test(ua)) {
      deviceType = 'tablet';
    }

    // 网络类型
    const connection = (navigator as any).connection;

    return {
      os,
      osVersion,
      browser,
      browserVersion,
      screenWidth: window.screen.width,
      screenHeight: window.screen.height,
      deviceType,
      language: navigator.language,
      networkType: connection?.effectiveType,
    };
  }

  /**
   * 设置用户 ID
   */
  setUserId(userId: string): void {
    this.userId = userId;
  }

  /**
   * 清除用户 ID
   */
  clearUserId(): void {
    this.userId = undefined;
  }

  /**
   * 页面浏览
   */
  trackPageView(properties?: Record<string, any>): void {
    this.track(EventType.PAGE_VIEW, {
      ...properties,
      url: window.location.href,
      title: document.title,
      referrer: document.referrer,
    });
  }

  /**
   * 自定义事件
   */
  track(eventName: string, properties: Record<string, any> = {}): void {
    const event: TrackEvent = {
      event: eventName as EventType,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
      userId: this.userId,
      sessionId: this.sessionId,
      url: window.location.href,
      title: document.title,
      device: this.deviceInfo,
      properties: {
        ...this.config,
        ...properties,
      },
    };

    // 加入队列
    this.queue.push(event);

    // 检查是否需要立即上传
    if (this.queue.length >= this.config.batchSize) {
      this.upload();
    }

    // 调试模式打印
    if (this.config.debug) {
      console.log('[Tracker]', event);
    }
  }

  /**
   * 点击事件
   */
  trackClick(
    element: HTMLElement,
    properties: Record<string, any> = {}
  ): void {
    this.track(EventType.CLICK, {
      ...properties,
      element: this.getElementInfo(element),
    });
  }

  /**
   * 获取元素信息
   */
  private getElementInfo(element: HTMLElement): any {
    return {
      tagName: element.tagName.toLowerCase(),
      id: element.id || undefined,
      className: element.className || undefined,
      text: element.textContent?.slice(0, 100) || undefined,
      href: (element as HTMLAnchorElement).href || undefined,
      // 生成唯一路径
      path: this.generateElementPath(element),
    };
  }

  /**
   * 生成元素路径
   */
  private generateElementPath(element: HTMLElement): string {
    const path: string[] = [];
    let current: HTMLElement | null = element;

    while (current && current !== document.body) {
      let selector = current.tagName.toLowerCase();

      if (current.id) {
        selector += `#${current.id}`;
        path.unshift(selector);
        break;
      } else if (current.className) {
        const classes = current.className
          .split(' ')
          .filter((c) => c)
          .slice(0, 2)
          .join('.');
        if (classes) {
          selector += `.${classes}`;
        }
      }

      // 添加索引
      const parent = current.parentElement;
      if (parent) {
        const children = Array.from(parent.children).filter(
          (child) => child.tagName === current!.tagName
        );
        if (children.length > 1) {
          const index = children.indexOf(current) + 1;
          selector += `:nth-of-type(${index})`;
        }
      }

      path.unshift(selector);
      current = current.parentElement;
    }

    return path.join(' > ');
  }

  /**
   * 性能追踪
   */
  private trackPerformance(): void {
    // 等待页面加载完成
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        const timing = performance.timing;
        const navigation = performance.getEntriesByType(
          'navigation'
        )[0] as PerformanceNavigationTiming;

        this.track(EventType.PERFORMANCE, {
          // 页面加载时间
          loadTime: timing.loadEventEnd - timing.navigationStart,
          // DOM 构建时间
          domReadyTime: timing.domContentLoadedEventEnd - timing.navigationStart,
          // 首次绘制时间
          firstPaint: (performance as any).getEntriesByType('paint')[0]?.startTime,
          // 首屏渲染时间
          firstContentfulPaint: (performance as any)
            .getEntriesByType('paint')
            ?.find((e: any) => e.name === 'first-contentful-paint')?.startTime,
          // DNS 解析时间
          dnsTime: timing.domainLookupEnd - timing.domainLookupStart,
          // TCP 连接时间
          tcpTime: timing.connectEnd - timing.connectStart,
          // SSL 建立时间
          sslTime: timing.secureConnectionStart
            ? timing.connectEnd - timing.secureConnectionStart
            : 0,
          // 请求响应时间
          responseTime: timing.responseEnd - timing.requestStart,
          // 内容传输时间
          transferTime: timing.responseEnd - timing.responseStart,
          // DOM 解析时间
          domParseTime: timing.domInteractive - timing.domLoading,
          // 资源加载时间
          resourceLoadTime: timing.loadEventEnd - timing.domContentLoadedEventEnd,
          // 页面大小
          pageSize: Math.round(
            (navigation?.transferSize || 0) / 1024
          ),
        });
      }, 0);
    });
  }

  /**
   * 错误追踪
   */
  private trackError(): void {
    // 监听 JS 错误
    window.addEventListener('error', (event) => {
      this.track(EventType.ERROR, {
        type: 'javascript',
        message: event.message,
        filename: event.filename,
        lineno: event.lineno,
        colno: event.colno,
        stack: (event as any).error?.stack,
      });
    });

    // 监听 Promise 拒绝
    window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (event) => {
      this.track(EventType.ERROR, {
        type: 'promise',
        message: event.reason?.message || event.reason,
        stack: event.reason?.stack,
      });
    });

    // 监听资源加载失败
    window.addEventListener('error', (event) => {
      if (event.target !== window) {
        const target = event.target as HTMLScriptElement | HTMLLinkElement;
        this.track(EventType.ERROR, {
          type: 'resource',
          url: target.src || target.href,
          tagName: target.tagName,
        });
      }
    }, true);
  }

  /**
   * 监听页面跳转
   */
  private setupPageViewListeners(): void {
    // 监听 popstate（浏览器前进后退）
    window.addEventListener('popstate', () => {
      this.trackPageView();
    });

    // 覆盖 pushState
    const originalPushState = window.history.pushState;
    window.history.pushState = (...args) => {
      originalPushState.apply(window.history, args);
      this.trackPageView();
    };

    // 覆盖 replaceState
    const originalReplaceState = window.history.replaceState;
    window.history.replaceState = (...args) => {
      originalReplaceState.apply(window.history, args);
      this.trackPageView();
    };
  }

  /**
   * 监听网络状态
   */
  private setupNetworkListeners(): void {
    window.addEventListener('online', () => {
      this.isOnline = true;
      this.upload();
    });

    window.addEventListener('offline', () => {
      this.isOnline = false;
    });
  }

  /**
   * 启动定时上传
   */
  private startUploadTimer(): void {
    this.uploadTimer = setInterval(() => {
      if (this.queue.length > 0 && this.isOnline) {
        this.upload();
      }
    }, this.config.uploadInterval);
  }

  /**
   * 页面卸载时上传
   */
  private setupBeforeUnload(): void {
    window.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
      if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && this.queue.length > 0) {
        this.upload(true);
      }
    });

    window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
      if (this.queue.length > 0) {
        this.upload(true);
      }
    });
  }

  /**
   * 上传数据
   */
  private upload(isImmediate = false): void {
    if (this.queue.length === 0) return;

    const data = this.queue.splice(0, this.config.batchSize);

    // 使用 sendBeacon
    if (isImmediate && navigator.sendBeacon) {
      const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data)], {
        type: 'application/json',
      });
      navigator.sendBeacon(this.config.serverUrl, blob);
      return;
    }

    // 使用 fetch
    fetch(this.config.serverUrl, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
      keepalive: true,
    }).catch((error) => {
      // 上传失败，放回队列
      this.queue.unshift(...data);
      if (this.config.debug) {
        console.error('[Tracker] Upload failed:', error);
      }
    });
  }

  /**
   * 销毁
   */
  destroy(): void {
    if (this.uploadTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.uploadTimer);
    }
    // 上传剩余数据
    this.upload(true);
  }
}

// 创建全局实例
let trackerInstance: Tracker | null = null;

/**
 * 初始化埋点
 */
export function initTracker(config: Partial<TrackerConfig>): Tracker {
  if (trackerInstance) {
    console.warn('[Tracker] Already initialized');
    return trackerInstance;
  }

  trackerInstance = new Tracker(config);
  return trackerInstance;
}

/**
 * 获取埋点实例
 */
export function getTracker(): Tracker | null {
  return trackerInstance;
}

/**
 * 便捷方法 - 页面浏览
 */
export function trackPageView(properties?: Record<string, any>): void {
  trackerInstance?.trackPageView(properties);
}

/**
 * 便捷方法 - 自定义事件
 */
export function track(
  eventName: string,
  properties?: Record<string, any>
): void {
  trackerInstance?.track(eventName, properties);
}

/**
 * 便捷方法 - 点击事件
 */
export function trackClick(
  element: HTMLElement,
  properties?: Record<string, any>
): void {
  trackerInstance?.trackClick(element, properties);
}

3.3 可视化埋点实现

// visual-tracker.ts - 可视化埋点实现

import { Tracker, TrackEvent } from './tracker';

/**
 * 可视化埋点配置
 */
export interface VisualTrackerConfig {
  // 埋点 SDK 实例
  tracker: Tracker;
  // 埋点标记类名
  markerClassName: string;
  // 自动标记的元素选择器
  autoTrackSelectors: string[];
  // 排除的元素选择器
  excludeSelectors: string[];
  // 是否启用
  enabled: boolean;
}

/**
 * 埋点标记
 */
interface TrackMarker {
  // 事件名称
  eventName: string;
  // 事件属性
  properties: Record<string, any>;
}

/**
 * 可视化埋点类
 */
export class VisualTracker {
  private config: VisualTrackerConfig;
  private markers: Map<HTMLElement, TrackMarker> = new Map();
  private clickHandler: (event: MouseEvent) => void;

  constructor(config: VisualTrackerConfig) {
    this.config = {
      markerClassName: 'track-marker',
      autoTrackSelectors: ['button', 'a', '.trackable'],
      excludeSelectors: ['[data-track-ignore]'],
      enabled: true,
      ...config,
    };

    this.clickHandler = this.handleClick.bind(this);
    this.init();
  }

  /**
   * 初始化
   */
  private init(): void {
    if (!this.config.enabled) return;

    // 标记已存在的元素
    this.markElements();

    // 监听 DOM 变化，标记新元素
    this.observeDOM();

    // 绑定点击事件
    document.addEventListener('click', this.clickHandler, true);
  }

  /**
   * 标记元素
   */
  private markElements(): void {
    const selector = this.config.autoTrackSelectors.join(',');
    const elements = document.querySelectorAll(selector);

    elements.forEach((element) => {
      if (this.shouldTrack(element as HTMLElement)) {
        this.markElement(element as HTMLElement);
      }
    });
  }

  /**
   * 标记单个元素
   */
  markElement(element: HTMLElement, eventName?: string, properties?: Record<string, any>): void {
    // 生成事件名称
    const event = eventName || this.generateEventName(element);

    // 生成属性
    const props = properties || this.generateProperties(element);

    // 存储标记
    this.markers.set(element, {
      eventName: event,
      properties: props,
    });

    // 添加标记类名
    element.classList.add(this.config.markerClassName);
  }

  /**
   * 移除标记
   */
  unmarkElement(element: HTMLElement): void {
    this.markers.delete(element);
    element.classList.remove(this.config.markerClassName);
  }

  /**
   * 判断是否应该追踪
   */
  private shouldTrack(element: HTMLElement): boolean {
    // 检查排除选择器
    for (const selector of this.config.excludeSelectors) {
      if (element.matches(selector) || element.closest(selector)) {
        return false;
      }
    }

    // 检查是否有 data-track-ignore 属性
    if (element.hasAttribute('data-track-ignore')) {
      return false;
    }

    return true;
  }

  /**
   * 生成事件名称
   */
  private generateEventName(element: HTMLElement): string {
    const tagName = element.tagName.toLowerCase();

    // 优先使用 data-track-event 属性
    if (element.hasAttribute('data-track-event')) {
      return element.getAttribute('data-track-event')!;
    }

    // 生成默认事件名
    const id = element.id ? `#${element.id}` : '';
    const className = element.className
      .split(' ')
      .filter((c) => c && c !== this.config.markerClassName)
      .slice(0, 2)
      .join('.');

    return `${tagName}${id}${className ? '.' + className : ''}_click`;
  }

  /**
   * 生成事件属性
   */
  private generateProperties(element: HTMLElement): Record<string, any> {
    const props: Record<string, any> = {};

    // 从 data-track-properties 读取 JSON
    if (element.hasAttribute('data-track-properties')) {
      try {
        const json = element.getAttribute('data-track-properties');
        Object.assign(props, JSON.parse(json!));
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[VisualTracker] Invalid JSON in data-track-properties');
      }
    }

    // 添加元素信息
    if (element.id) {
      props.elementId = element.id;
    }

    if (element.className) {
      props.elementClass = element.className;
    }

    if (element.textContent) {
      props.elementText = element.textContent.slice(0, 50);
    }

    if (element.tagName === 'A') {
      const anchor = element as HTMLAnchorElement;
      props.href = anchor.href;
      props.target = anchor.target;
    }

    return props;
  }

  /**
   * 处理点击事件
   */
  private handleClick(event: MouseEvent): void {
    const target = event.target as HTMLElement;

    // 找到最近的已标记元素
    const markedElement = target.closest(`.${this.config.markerClassName}`) as HTMLElement;

    if (markedElement && this.markers.has(markedElement)) {
      const marker = this.markers.get(markedElement)!;

      // 上报事件
      this.config.tracker.track(marker.eventName, {
        ...marker.properties,
        // 添加点击位置信息
        clickX: event.clientX,
        clickY: event.clientY,
        // 添加时间戳
        timestamp: Date.now(),
      });

      event.stopPropagation();
    }
  }

  /**
   * 监听 DOM 变化
   */
  private observeDOM(): void {
    const observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
      mutations.forEach((mutation) => {
        // 处理新增节点
        mutation.addedNodes.forEach((node) => {
          if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
            const element = node as HTMLElement;
            const selector = this.config.autoTrackSelectors.join(',');

            if (element.matches(selector) && this.shouldTrack(element)) {
              this.markElement(element);
            }

            // 检查子元素
            const children = element.querySelectorAll(selector);
            children.forEach((child) => {
              if (this.shouldTrack(child as HTMLElement)) {
                this.markElement(child as HTMLElement);
              }
            });
          }
        });

        // 处理移除节点
        mutation.removedNodes.forEach((node) => {
          if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
            const element = node as HTMLElement;
            this.unmarkElement(element);
          }
        });
      });
    });

    observer.observe(document.body, {
      childList: true,
      subtree: true,
    });
  }

  /**
   * 销毁
   */
  destroy(): void {
    document.removeEventListener('click', this.clickHandler, true);
    this.markers.clear();
  }
}

3.4 React 埋点 Hook

// useTrack.ts - React 埋点 Hook

import { useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { track, trackPageView, TrackEvent } from './tracker';

/**
 * 埋点 Hook 配置
 */
export interface UseTrackOptions {
  // 页面名称
  pageName?: string;
  // 自动追踪页面浏览
  autoTrackPageView?: boolean;
  // 自动追踪性能
  autoTrackPerformance?: boolean;
  // 自动追踪错误
  autoTrackError?: boolean;
}

/**
 * 埋点 Hook
 */
export function useTrack(options: UseTrackOptions = {}) {
  const {
    pageName,
    autoTrackPageView = true,
    autoTrackPerformance = true,
    autoTrackError = true,
  } = options;

  const pageNameRef = useRef(pageName);

  // 更新页面名称
  useEffect(() => {
    if (pageName) {
      pageNameRef.current = pageName;
    }
  }, [pageName]);

  // 自动追踪页面浏览
  useEffect(() => {
    if (autoTrackPageView && pageNameRef.current) {
      trackPageView({
        pageName: pageNameRef.current,
      });
    }
  }, [autoTrackPageView]);

  /**
   * 追踪事件
   */
  const trackEvent = useCallback(
    (eventName: string, properties?: Record<string, any>) => {
      track(eventName, {
        ...properties,
        pageName: pageNameRef.current,
      });
    },
    []
  );

  /**
   * 追踪点击
   */
  const trackClick = useCallback(
    (element: HTMLElement, properties?: Record<string, any>) => {
      track('click', {
        ...properties,
        pageName: pageNameRef.current,
      });
    },
    []
  );

  /**
   * 追踪曝光
   */
  const trackExposure = useCallback(
    (elementId: string, properties?: Record<string, any>) => {
      track('exposure', {
        ...properties,
        elementId,
        pageName: pageNameRef.current,
      });
    },
    []
  );

  return {
    track: trackEvent,
    trackClick,
    trackExposure,
  };
}

/**
 * 自动曝光追踪 Hook
 */
export function useExposureTracker(
  ref: React.RefObject<HTMLElement>,
  eventName: string,
  properties?: Record<string, any>
) {
  const hasTracked = useRef(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const element = ref.current;
    if (!element || hasTracked.current) return;

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        entries.forEach((entry) => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting && !hasTracked.current) {
            hasTracked.current = true;
            track(eventName, {
              ...properties,
              exposureTime: Date.now(),
            });
            observer.disconnect();
          }
        });
      },
      {
        threshold: 0.5, // 50% 可见
      }
    );

    observer.observe(element);

    return () => {
      observer.disconnect();
    };
  }, [ref, eventName, properties]);
}

/**
 * 自动点击追踪 Hook
 */
export function useClickTracker(
  ref: React.RefObject<HTMLElement>,
  eventName: string,
  properties?: Record<string, any>
) {
  useEffect(() => {
    const element = ref.current;
    if (!element) return;

    const handleClick = () => {
      track(eventName, properties);
    };

    element.addEventListener('click', handleClick);

    return () => {
      element.removeEventListener('click', handleClick);
    };
  }, [ref, eventName, properties]);
}

四、权限路由系统

4.1 路由权限设计

// permission.ts - 权限类型定义

/**
 * 权限类型
 */
export enum PermissionType {
  // 菜单权限
  MENU = 'menu',
  // 按钮权限
  BUTTON = 'button',
  // API 权限
  API = 'api',
  // 字段权限
  FIELD = 'field',
}

/**
 * 权限定义
 */
export interface Permission {
  // 权限 ID
  id: string;
  // 权限代码
  code: string;
  // 权限名称
  name: string;
  // 权限类型
  type: PermissionType;
  // 父权限 ID
  parentId?: string;
  // 描述
  description?: string;
}

/**
 * 角色定义
 */
export interface Role {
  // 角色 ID
  id: string;
  // 角色代码
  code: string;
  // 角色名称
  name: string;
  // 权限列表
  permissions: Permission[];
  // 是否启用
  enabled: boolean;
}

/**
 * 用户信息
 */
export interface User {
  // 用户 ID
  id: string;
  // 用户名
  username: string;
  // 昵称
  nickname?: string;
  // 头像
  avatar?: string;
  // 邮箱
  email?: string;
  // 手机
  phone?: string;
  // 角色列表
  roles: Role[];
  // 权限列表
  permissions: Permission[];
  // 用户类型
  userType?: string;
}

/**
 * 路由配置
 */
export interface RouteConfig {
  // 路由路径
  path: string;
  // 路由名称
  name?: string;
  // 组件路径
  component?: string;
  // 重定向
  redirect?: string;
  // 路由元信息
  meta?: RouteMeta;
  // 子路由
  children?: RouteConfig[];
}

/**
 * 路由元信息
 */
export interface RouteMeta {
  // 标题
  title?: string;
  // 图标
  icon?: string;
  // 是否可见
  visible?: boolean;
  // 是否缓存
  keepAlive?: boolean;
  // 权限代码
  permission?: string | string[];
  // 角色代码
  roles?: string[];
  // 排序
  order?: number;
  // 快捷菜单
  shortcut?: boolean;
  // 面包屑
  breadcrumb?: boolean;
}

4.2 路由权限管理实现

// permission-manager.ts - 权限管理

import {
  Permission,
  Role,
  User,
  RouteConfig,
  RouteMeta,
  PermissionType,
} from './permission';

/**
 * 权限管理器
 */
export class PermissionManager {
  private user: User | null = null;
  private permissionCache: Set<string> = new Set();
  private roleCache: Set<string> = new Set();

  /**
   * 设置当前用户
   */
  setUser(user: User | null): void {
    this.user = user;
    this.refreshCache();
  }

  /**
   * 获取当前用户
   */
  getUser(): User | null {
    return this.user;
  }

  /**
   * 刷新权限缓存
   */
  private refreshCache(): void {
    this.permissionCache.clear();
    this.roleCache.clear();

    if (!this.user) return;

    // 缓存角色
    this.user.roles.forEach((role) => {
      this.roleCache.add(role.code);
    });

    // 缓存权限
    this.user.permissions.forEach((perm) => {
      this.permissionCache.add(perm.code);
    });
  }

  /**
   * 检查是否有权限
   */
  hasPermission(permission: string | string[]): boolean {
    if (!this.user) return false;

    // 超级管理员拥有所有权限
    if (this.isAdmin()) return true;

    const permissions = Array.isArray(permission)
      ? permission
      : [permission];

    return permissions.some((perm) => this.permissionCache.has(perm));
  }

  /**
   * 检查是否有角色
   */
  hasRole(role: string | string[]): boolean {
    if (!this.user) return false;

    // 超级管理员拥有所有角色
    if (this.isAdmin()) return true;

    const roles = Array.isArray(role) ? role : [role];

    return roles.some((r) => this.roleCache.has(r));
  }

  /**
   * 是否为管理员
   */
  isAdmin(): boolean {
    if (!this.user) return false;

    return (
      this.user.roles.some((role) => role.code === 'admin') ||
      this.user.permissions.some((perm) => perm.code === '*')
    );
  }

  /**
   * 过滤路由 - 返回有权限的路由
   */
  filterRoutes(routes: RouteConfig[]): RouteConfig[] {
    return routes
      .map((route) => this.filterRoute(route))
      .filter((route) => route !== null) as RouteConfig[];
  }

  /**
   * 过滤单个路由
   */
  private filterRoute(route: RouteConfig): RouteConfig | null {
    // 检查角色权限
    if (route.meta?.roles && route.meta.roles.length > 0) {
      const hasRole = route.meta.roles.some((role) =>
        this.roleCache.has(role)
      );
      if (!hasRole) return null;
    }

    // 检查权限代码
    if (route.meta?.permission) {
      const permission = route.meta.permission;
      const hasPermission = this.hasPermission(permission);
      if (!hasPermission) return null;
    }

    // 过滤子路由
    const filteredChildren = route.children
      ?.map((child) => this.filterRoute(child))
      .filter((child) => child !== null) as RouteConfig[] | undefined;

    const filteredRoute: RouteConfig = {
      ...route,
      children: filteredChildren,
    };

    // 如果是叶子路由且没有权限，返回 null
    if (
      !filteredRoute.component &&
      (!filteredChildren || filteredChildren.length === 0)
    ) {
      return route.meta?.visible === false ? null : route;
    }

    return filteredRoute;
  }

  /**
   * 获取用户可访问的菜单
   */
  getAccessibleMenus(routes: RouteConfig[]): RouteConfig[] {
    const accessibleRoutes = this.filterRoutes(routes);

    // 过滤掉隐藏的菜单
    return accessibleRoutes.filter((route) => {
      if (route.meta?.visible === false) return false;
      return true;
    });
  }

  /**
   * 权限检查函数 - 用于 Vue/React 组件
   */
  permissionChecker(permission: string | string[]): boolean {
    return this.hasPermission(permission);
  }

  /**
   * 角色检查函数
   */
  roleChecker(role: string | string[]): boolean {
    return this.hasRole(role);
  }
}

// 创建全局实例
let permissionManagerInstance: PermissionManager | null = null;

/**
 * 获取权限管理器实例
 */
