export function getPermissionManager(): PermissionManager {
  if (!permissionManagerInstance) {
    permissionManagerInstance = new PermissionManager();
  }
  return permissionManagerInstance;
}

/**
 * 初始化权限管理器
 */
export function initPermissionManager(user: User | null): void {
  const manager = getPermissionManager();
  manager.setUser(user);
}

/**
 * 检查权限
 */
export function hasPermission(permission: string | string[]): boolean {
  return getPermissionManager().hasPermission(permission);
}

/**
 * 检查角色
 */
export function hasRole(role: string | string[]): boolean {
  return getPermissionManager().hasRole(role);
}

/**
 * 是否为管理员
 */
export function isAdmin(): boolean {
  return getPermissionManager().isAdmin();
}

4.3 Vue Router 权限路由实现

// vue-router-permission.ts - Vue Router 权限路由

import Vue from 'vue';
import VueRouter, { Route, NavigationGuardNext } from 'vue-router';
import { getPermissionManager } from './permission-manager';
import { User, RouteConfig } from './permission';
import { store } from './store'; // Vuex store

// 静态路由（不需要权限）
const constantRoutes: RouteConfig[] = [
  {
    path: '/login',
    name: 'Login',
    component: () => import('@/views/Login.vue'),
    meta: { title: '登录', visible: false },
  },
  {
    path: '/403',
    name: 'Forbidden',
    component: () => import('@/views/403.vue'),
    meta: { title: '无权限', visible: false },
  },
  {
    path: '/404',
    name: 'NotFound',
    component: () => import('@/views/404.vue'),
    meta: { title: '页面不存在', visible: false },
  },
];

// 动态路由（需要权限）
const asyncRoutes: RouteConfig[] = [
  {
    path: '/',
    redirect: '/dashboard',
    meta: { title: '首页' },
  },
  {
    path: '/dashboard',
    name: 'Dashboard',
    component: () => import('@/views/Dashboard.vue'),
    meta: { title: '控制台', icon: 'dashboard' },
  },
  {
    path: '/system',
    name: 'System',
    redirect: '/system/user',
    meta: {
      title: '系统管理',
      icon: 'setting',
      roles: ['admin'],
    },
    children: [
      {
        path: '/system/user',
        name: 'UserManagement',
        component: () => import('@/views/system/User.vue'),
        meta: {
          title: '用户管理',
          permission: 'system:user:list',
          roles: ['admin'],
        },
      },
      {
        path: '/system/role',
        name: 'RoleManagement',
        component: () => import('@/views/system/Role.vue'),
        meta: {
          title: '角色管理',
          permission: 'system:role:list',
          roles: ['admin'],
        },
      },
      {
        path: '/system/menu',
        name: 'MenuManagement',
        component: () => import('@/views/system/Menu.vue'),
        meta: {
          title: '菜单管理',
          permission: 'system:menu:list',
          roles: ['admin'],
        },
      },
    ],
  },
  {
    path: '/order',
    name: 'Order',
    component: () => import('@/views/Order.vue'),
    meta: {
      title: '订单管理',
      permission: 'order:list',
    },
  },
];

// 创建路由实例
const createRouter = () =>
  new VueRouter({
    mode: 'history',
    base: process.env.BASE_URL,
    scrollBehavior: () => ({ y: 0 }),
    routes: constantRoutes,
  });

const router = createRouter();

/**
 * 重置路由
 */
export function resetRouter(): void {
  const newRouter = createRouter();
  (router as any).matcher = (newRouter as any).matcher;
}

/**
 * 动态添加路由
 */
export function addRoutes(routes: RouteConfig[]): Promise<Route[]> {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const addedRoutes = router.addRoutes(routes);
    resolve(addedRoutes);
  });
}

/**
 * 获取可访问的路由
 */
function getAccessibleRoutes(routes: RouteConfig[]): RouteConfig[] {
  const permissionManager = getPermissionManager();
  return permissionManager.filterRoutes(routes);
}

/**
 * 加载动态路由
 */
export async function loadDynamicRoutes(): Promise<void> {
  const permissionManager = getPermissionManager();

  // 获取用户信息
  const user = store?.getters['user/userInfo'];
  if (!user) {
    console.warn('User not logged in');
    return;
  }

  // 设置用户权限
  permissionManager.setUser(user as User);

  // 过滤动态路由
  const accessibleRoutes = getAccessibleRoutes(asyncRoutes);

  // 添加路由
  await addRoutes(accessibleRoutes);
}

/**
 * 路由守卫 - 权限验证
 */
router.beforeEach(
  async (
    to: Route,
    from: Route,
    next: NavigationGuardNext<Vue>
  ) => {
    // 设置页面标题
    const title = to.meta?.title as string;
    if (title) {
      document.title = `${title} - ${process.env.VUE_APP_TITLE}`;
    }

    // 获取用户 token
    const token = store?.getters['user/token'];

    // 未登录
    if (!token) {
      if (to.path === '/login') {
        next();
      } else {
        next(`/login?redirect=${to.path}`);
      }
      return;
    }

    // 已登录，尝试访问登录页
    if (to.path === '/login') {
      next({ path: '/' });
      return;
    }

    // 获取用户信息
    const user = store?.getters['user/userInfo'];

    // 用户信息不存在，尝试获取
    if (!user) {
      try {
        await store.dispatch('user/getUserInfo');
      } catch (error) {
        // 获取用户信息失败，重新登录
        await store.dispatch('user/logout');
        next(`/login?redirect=${to.path}`);
        return;
      }
    }

    // 检查路由权限
    const hasPermission = checkRoutePermission(to);

    if (!hasPermission) {
      // 无权限，跳转到 403 页面
      next({ path: '/403', replace: true });
      return;
    }

    next();
  }
);

/**
 * 检查路由权限
 */
function checkRoutePermission(to: Route): boolean {
  const permissionManager = getPermissionManager();

  // 检查角色权限
  const requiredRoles = to.meta?.roles as string[] | undefined;
  if (requiredRoles && requiredRoles.length > 0) {
    const hasRole = permissionManager.hasRole(requiredRoles);
    if (!hasRole) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  // 检查权限代码
  const requiredPermission = to.meta?.permission;
  if (requiredPermission) {
    const hasPermission = permissionManager.hasPermission(requiredPermission);
    if (!hasPermission) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  return true;
}

export default router;

4.4 React Router 权限路由实现

// react-router-permission.tsx - React Router 权限路由

import React, { useEffect, useState, createContext, useContext } from 'react';
import {
  BrowserRouter,
  Switch,
  Route,
  Redirect,
  useHistory,
  useLocation,
  RouteProps,
  RouteComponentProps,
} from 'react-router-dom';
import { getPermissionManager, hasPermission } from './permission-manager';
import { User, RouteConfig, RouteMeta } from './permission';

// 用户上下文
const UserContext = createContext<{
  user: User | null;
  loading: boolean;
}>({
  user: null,
  loading: true,
});

/**
 * 路由权限配置
 */
interface ProtectedRouteProps extends RouteProps {
  // 权限代码
  permission?: string | string[];
  // 角色代码
  roles?: string[];
  // 跳转路径
  redirectTo?: string;
  // 加载组件
  fallback?: React.ReactNode;
}

/**
 * 受保护的路由组件
 */
export const ProtectedRoute: React.FC<ProtectedRouteProps> = ({
  children,
  permission,
  roles,
  redirectTo = '/403',
  fallback,
  ...rest
}) => {
  const { user, loading } = useContext(UserContext);
  const location = useLocation();

  // 加载中
  if (loading) {
    return <>{fallback || <LoadingSpinner />}</>;
  }

  // 未登录
  if (!user) {
    return (
      <Redirect
        to={`/login?redirect=${location.pathname}${location.search}`}
      />
    );
  }

  // 检查权限
  const permissionManager = getPermissionManager();
  let hasAccess = true;

  // 检查角色权限
  if (roles && roles.length > 0) {
    hasAccess = permissionManager.hasRole(roles);
  }

  // 检查权限代码
  if (hasAccess && permission) {
    hasAccess = permissionManager.hasPermission(permission);
  }

  // 无权限
  if (!hasAccess) {
    return <Redirect to={redirectTo} />;
  }

  return <Route {...rest}>{children}</Route>;
};

/**
 * 权限按钮组件
 */
interface PermissionButtonProps {
  // 权限代码
  permission?: string | string[];
  // 角色代码
  roles?: string[];
  // 隐藏模式（无权限时不显示）
  hidden?: boolean;
  // 禁用模式（无权限时显示禁用）
  disabled?: boolean;
  // 按钮点击事件
  onClick?: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void;
  // 子元素
  children: React.ReactNode;
  // 其他属性
  [key: string]: any;
}

export const PermissionButton: React.FC<PermissionButtonProps> = ({
  permission,
  roles,
  hidden = false,
  disabled = false,
  onClick,
  children,
  ...rest
}) => {
  const { user, loading } = useContext(UserContext);

  // 加载中，不做任何处理
  if (loading) {
    return null;
  }

  // 未登录，隐藏或禁用
  if (!user) {
    if (hidden) return null;
    return (
      <button
        {...rest}
        onClick={onClick}
        disabled={disabled || true}
      >
        {children}
      </button>
    );
  }

  // 检查权限
  const permissionManager = getPermissionManager();
  let hasAccess = true;

  if (roles && roles.length > 0) {
    hasAccess = permissionManager.hasRole(roles);
  }

  if (hasAccess && permission) {
    hasAccess = permissionManager.hasPermission(permission);
  }

  // 无权限处理
  if (!hasAccess) {
    if (hidden) return null;
    return (
      <button {...rest} onClick={onClick} disabled={disabled || true}>
        {children}
      </button>
    );
  }

  return (
    <button {...rest} onClick={onClick}>
      {children}
    </button>
  );
};

/**
 * 权限检查 Hook
 */
export function usePermission() {
  const { user, loading } = useContext(UserContext);

  /**
   * 检查是否有权限
   */
  const checkPermission = (permission: string | string[]): boolean => {
    if (loading || !user) return false;
    return hasPermission(permission);
  };

  /**
   * 检查是否有角色
   */
  const checkRole = (role: string | string[]): boolean => {
    if (loading || !user) return false;
    return getPermissionManager().hasRole(role);
  };

  /**
   * 是否为管理员
   */
  const isAdmin = (): boolean => {
    if (loading || !user) return false;
    return getPermissionManager().isAdmin();
  };

  return {
    user,
    loading,
    checkPermission,
    checkRole,
    isAdmin,
  };
}

/**
 * 动态路由配置
 */
interface DynamicRouteConfig extends RouteConfig {
  // 组件（懒加载）
  component?: React.ComponentType<any>;
}

/**
 * 路由渲染组件
 */
interface RouteRendererProps {
  // 路由配置
  route: DynamicRouteConfig;
  // 路径前缀
  pathPrefix?: string;
}

const RouteRenderer: React.FC<RouteRendererProps> = ({
  route,
  pathPrefix = '',
}) => {
  const fullPath = pathPrefix + route.path;

  // 有子路由，渲染 Switch
  if (route.children && route.children.length > 0) {
    return (
      <Route
        path={fullPath}
        render={(props) => (
          <route.component! {...props}>
            <Switch>
              {route.children!.map((child) => (
                <RouteRenderer
                  key={child.path}
                  route={child}
                  pathPrefix={fullPath}
                />
              ))}
            </Switch>
          </route.component>
        )}
      />
    );
  }

  // 叶子路由
  if (route.meta?.permission || route.meta?.roles) {
    return (
      <ProtectedRoute
        path={fullPath}
        permission={route.meta.permission}
        roles={route.meta.roles}
      >
        <route.component />
      </ProtectedRoute>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Route path={fullPath} component={route.component} />
  );
};

/**
 * 权限路由应用
 */
interface PermissionRouterProps {
  // 用户信息
  user: User | null;
  // 路由配置
  routes: DynamicRouteConfig[];
  // 加载状态
  loading?: boolean;
  // 登录页路径
  loginPath?: string;
  // 403 页面
  forbiddenComponent?: React.ReactNode;
  // 404 页面
  notFoundComponent?: React.ReactNode;
  // 子组件
  children?: React.ReactNode;
}

export const PermissionRouter: React.FC<PermissionRouterProps> = ({
  user,
  routes,
  loading = false,
  loginPath = '/login',
  forbiddenComponent,
  notFoundComponent,
  children,
}) => {
  const permissionManager = getPermissionManager();

  // 设置用户权限
  useEffect(() => {
    permissionManager.setUser(user);
  }, [user]);

  return (
    <UserContext.Provider value={{ user, loading }}>
      <BrowserRouter>
        <Switch>
          {routes.map((route) => (
            <RouteRenderer key={route.path} route={route} />
          ))}

          {/* 403 页面 */}
          {forbiddenComponent && (
            <Route path="/403" component={() => forbiddenComponent} />
          )}

          {/* 404 页面 */}
          {notFoundComponent && (
            <Route path="/404" component={() => notFoundComponent} />
          )}

          {/* 首页重定向 */}
          <Redirect from="/" to="/dashboard" exact />

          {/* 404 重定向 */}
          <Redirect to="/404" />
        </Switch>
      </BrowserRouter>
    </UserContext.Provider>
  );
};

/**
 * 加载中组件
 */
const LoadingSpinner: React.FC = () => (
  <div
    style={{
      display: 'flex',
      justifyContent: 'center',
      alignItems: 'center',
      height: '100vh',
    }}
  >
    <div className="spinner" />
  </div>
);

五、前端监控系统设计

5.1 监控指标体系

// monitor-types.ts - 监控类型定义

/**
 * 监控指标类型
 */
export enum MetricType {
  // JavaScript 错误
  JS_ERROR = 'js_error',
  // 资源加载错误
  RESOURCE_ERROR = 'resource_error',
  // API 请求错误
  API_ERROR = 'api_error',
  // Promise 拒绝
  UNHANDLED_REJECTION = 'unhandled_rejection',
  // 页面性能
  PERFORMANCE = 'performance',
  // 用户行为
  BEHAVIOR = 'behavior',
  // 慢请求
  SLOW_REQUEST = 'slow_request',
}

/**
 * JS 错误数据
 */
export interface JSErrorData {
  // 错误类型
  type: string;
  // 错误消息
  message: string;
  // 错误堆栈
  stack?: string;
  // 发生错误的文件名
  filename?: string;
  // 行号
  lineno?: number;
  // 列号
  colno?: number;
  // 错误分类
  category?: string;
}

/**
 * 性能数据
 */
export interface PerformanceData {
  // 页面 URL
  url: string;
  // 时间戳
  timestamp: number;
  // 首次内容绘制
  fcp?: number;
  // 首次有意义绘制
  fmp?: number;
  // 最大内容绘制
  lcp?: number;
  // 首次输入延迟
  fid?: number;
  // 累积布局偏移
  cls?: number;
  // 交互到绘制
  tti?: number;
  // 首字节时间
  ttfb?: number;
  // 页面加载时间
  loadTime?: number;
  // DOM 构建时间
  domReadyTime?: number;
  // DNS 解析时间
  dnsTime?: number;
  // TCP 连接时间
  tcpTime?: number;
  // SSL 建立时间
  sslTime?: number;
  // 请求响应时间
  responseTime?: number;
  // 内容传输时间
  transferTime?: number;
  // DOM 解析时间
  domParseTime?: number;
  // 资源加载时间
  resourceLoadTime?: number;
  // 页面大小
  pageSize?: number;
}

/**
 * API 请求数据
 */
export interface APIRequestData {
  // 请求 URL
  url: string;
  // 请求方法
  method: string;
  // 请求状态码
  status: number;
  // 响应时间（毫秒）
  duration: number;
  // 请求大小
  requestSize?: number;
  // 响应大小
  responseSize?: number;
  // 是否成功
  success: boolean;
  // 错误消息
  errorMessage?: string;
  // 时间戳
  timestamp: number;
}

/**
 * 用户行为数据
 */
export interface BehaviorData {
  // 行为类型
  type: 'click' | 'scroll' | 'input' | 'navigation' | 'custom';
  // 行为数据
  data: Record<string, any>;
  // 时间戳
  timestamp: number;
  // 页面 URL
  url: string;
}

/**
 * 监控事件
 */
export interface MonitorEvent {
  // 事件 ID
  id: string;
  // 事件类型
  type: MetricType;
  // 事件数据
  data: JSErrorData | PerformanceData | APIRequestData | BehaviorData;
  // 用户 ID
  userId?: string;
  // 会话 ID
  sessionId: string;
  // 设备信息
  device: DeviceInfo;
  // 页面信息
  page: PageInfo;
  // 时间戳
  timestamp: number;
}

/**
 * 设备信息
 */
export interface DeviceInfo {
  // 操作系统
  os: string;
  // 操作系统版本
  osVersion: string;
  // 浏览器
  browser: string;
  // 浏览器版本
  browserVersion: string;
  // 屏幕宽度
  screenWidth: number;
  // 屏幕高度
  screenHeight: number;
  // 设备类型
  deviceType: 'mobile' | 'tablet' | 'desktop';
  // 语言
  language: string;
  // 网络类型
  networkType?: string;
  // 内存
  memory?: number;
}

/**
 * 页面信息
 */
export interface PageInfo {
  // 页面 URL
  url: string;
  // 页面标题
  title: string;
  // 来源页面
  referrer: string;
  // 页面加载开始时间
  startTime: number;
}

5.2 监控系统实现

// monitor.ts - 前端监控系统

import {
  MetricType,
  JSErrorData,
  PerformanceData,
  APIRequestData,
  BehaviorData,
  MonitorEvent,
  DeviceInfo,
  PageInfo,
} from './monitor-types';

/**
 * 监控系统配置
 */
export interface MonitorConfig {
  // 上报地址
  serverUrl: string;
  // 应用 ID
  appId: string;
  // 应用版本
  appVersion: string;
  // 是否启用
  enabled: boolean;
  // 采样率 (0-1)
  sampleRate: number;
  // 是否自动上报性能
  autoReportPerformance: boolean;
  // 是否自动上报错误
  autoReportError: boolean;
  // 是否自动上报 API
  autoReportAPI: boolean;
  // 性能上报阈值（毫秒）
  performanceThreshold: number;
  // 慢请求阈值（毫秒）
  slowRequestThreshold: number;
  // 批量上报数量
  batchSize: number;
  // 上报间隔（毫秒）
  uploadInterval: number;
}

/**
 * 监控系统类
 */
export class Monitor {
  private config: MonitorConfig;
  private queue: MonitorEvent[] = [];
  private sessionId: string;
  private userId?: string;
  private deviceInfo: DeviceInfo;
  private pageInfo: PageInfo;
  private uploadTimer?: NodeJS.Timeout;
  private isOnline = true;

  constructor(config: Partial<MonitorConfig> = {}) {
    // 默认配置
    this.config = {
      serverUrl: '',
      appId: '',
      appVersion: '1.0.0',
      enabled: true,
      sampleRate: 1,
      autoReportPerformance: true,
      autoReportError: true,
      autoReportAPI: true,
      performanceThreshold: 3000,
      slowRequestThreshold: 3000,
      batchSize: 10,
      uploadInterval: 5000,
      ...config,
    };

    // 初始化会话 ID
    this.sessionId = this.generateSessionId();

    // 获取设备信息
    this.deviceInfo = this.getDeviceInfo();

    // 获取页面信息
    this.pageInfo = this.getPageInfo();

    // 初始化
    this.init();
  }

  /**
   * 生成会话 ID
   */
  private generateSessionId(): string {
    return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  }

  /**
   * 获取设备信息
   */
  private getDeviceInfo(): DeviceInfo {
    const ua = navigator.userAgent;
    let os = 'Unknown';
    let osVersion = 'Unknown';

    if (/Windows/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'Windows';
      osVersion = /Windows NT ([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Mac OS X/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'macOS';
      osVersion = /Mac OS X ([\d._]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1]?.replace(/_/g, '.') || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Android/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'Android';
      osVersion = /Android ([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/iPhone|iPad|iPod/.test(ua)) {
      os = 'iOS';
      osVersion = /OS ([\d_]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1]?.replace(/_/g, '.') || 'Unknown';
    }

    let browser = 'Unknown';
    let browserVersion = 'Unknown';
    if (/Chrome/.test(ua) && !/Edge/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Chrome';
      browserVersion = /Chrome\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Safari/.test(ua) && !/Chrome/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Safari';
      browserVersion = /Version\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Firefox/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Firefox';
      browserVersion = /Firefox\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    } else if (/Edge/.test(ua)) {
      browser = 'Edge';
      browserVersion = /Edge\/([\d.]+)/.exec(ua)?.[1] || 'Unknown';
    }

    let deviceType: 'mobile' | 'tablet' | 'desktop' = 'desktop';
    if (/Mobile|Android|iPhone|iPod/.test(ua)) {
      deviceType = 'mobile';
    } else if (/Tablet|iPad/.test(ua)) {
      deviceType = 'tablet';
    }

    const connection = (navigator as any).connection;

    return {
      os,
      osVersion,
      browser,
      browserVersion,
      screenWidth: window.screen.width,
      screenHeight: window.screen.height,
      deviceType,
      language: navigator.language,
      networkType: connection?.effectiveType,
      memory: (navigator as any).deviceMemory,
    };
  }

  /**
   * 获取页面信息
   */
  private getPageInfo(): PageInfo {
    return {
      url: window.location.href,
      title: document.title,
      referrer: document.referrer,
      startTime: Date.now(),
    };
  }

  /**
   * 初始化
   */
  private init(): void {
    if (!this.config.enabled) return;

    // 采样判断
    if (Math.random() > this.config.sampleRate) {
      console.log('[Monitor] Sampling - disabled');
      return;
    }

    // 自动上报错误
    if (this.config.autoReportError) {
      this.setupErrorListeners();
    }

    // 自动上报性能
    if (this.config.autoReportPerformance) {
      this.setupPerformanceListeners();
    }

    // 自动上报 API
    if (this.config.autoReportAPI) {
      this.setupAPIListeners();
    }

    // 监听网络状态
    this.setupNetworkListeners();

    // 启动定时上传
    this.startUploadTimer();

    // 页面卸载时上传
    this.setupBeforeUnload();
  }

  /**
   * 设置错误监听
   */
  private setupErrorListeners(): void {
    // 监听 JS 错误
    window.addEventListener('error', (event) => {
      // 排除资源加载错误
      if (event.target !== window) {
        return;
      }

      const errorData: JSErrorData = {
        type: 'error',
        message: event.message,
        filename: event.filename,
        lineno: event.lineno,
        colno: event.colno,
        stack: (event as any).error?.stack,
      };

      this.report(MetricType.JS_ERROR, errorData);
    });

    // 监听 Promise 拒绝
    window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', (event) => {
      const errorData: JSErrorData = {
        type: 'unhandledrejection',
        message: event.reason?.message || String(event.reason),
        stack: event.reason?.stack,
      };

      this.report(MetricType.UNHANDLED_REJECTION, errorData);
    });
  }

  /**
   * 设置性能监听
   */
  private setupPerformanceListeners(): void {
    // 页面加载完成后上报性能数据
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        this.reportPerformance();
      }, 0);
    });

    // 监听 LCP 变化
    if ('PerformanceObserver' in window) {
      try {
        const lcpObserver = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
          const entries = list.getEntries();
          const lastEntry = entries[entries.length - 1] as any;
          this.report(MetricType.PERFORMANCE, {
            url: window.location.href,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            lcp: lastEntry.renderTime || lastEntry.loadTime,
          });
        });
        lcpObserver.observe({ entryType: 'largest-contentful-paint' });
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[Monitor] LCP observer not supported');
      }

      // 监听 CLS
      try {
        let clsScore = 0;
        const clsObserver = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
          for (const entry of list.getEntries()) {
            if (!(entry as any).hadRecentInput) {
              clsScore += (entry as any).value;
            }
          }
        });
        clsObserver.observe({ entryType: 'layout-shift' });
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[Monitor] CLS observer not supported');
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * 上报性能数据
   */
  private reportPerformance(): void {
    const timing = performance.timing;
    const navigation = performance.getEntriesByType(
      'navigation'
    )[0] as PerformanceNavigationTiming;

    const perfData: PerformanceData = {
      url: window.location.href,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
      loadTime: timing.loadEventEnd - timing.navigationStart,
      domReadyTime: timing.domContentLoadedEventEnd - timing.navigationStart,
      ttfb: timing.responseStart - timing.requestStart,
      dnsTime: timing.domainLookupEnd - timing.domainLookupStart,
      tcpTime: timing.connectEnd - timing.connectStart,
      responseTime: timing.responseEnd - timing.requestStart,
      domParseTime: timing.domInteractive - timing.domLoading,
      pageSize: Math.round((navigation?.transferSize || 0) / 1024),
    };

    // 检查是否超过阈值
    if (perfData.loadTime && perfData.loadTime > this.config.performanceThreshold) {
      this.report(MetricType.PERFORMANCE, perfData);
    }
  }

  /**
   * 设置 API 监听
   */
  private setupAPIListeners(): void {
    // 拦截 fetch
    const originalFetch = window.fetch;
    window.fetch = async (...args) => {
      const startTime = Date.now();
      const url = typeof args[0] === 'string' ? args[0] : args[0]?.url;
      const method = args[1]?.method || 'GET';

      try {
        const response = await originalFetch(...args);
        const duration = Date.now() - startTime;
        const clone = response.clone();

        // 读取响应大小
        let responseSize = 0;
        try {
          const blob = await clone.blob();
          responseSize = Math.round(blob.size / 1024);
        } catch (e) {
          // 忽略
        }

        const apiData: APIRequestData = {
          url,
          method,
          status: response.status,
          duration,
          responseSize,
          success: response.ok,
          timestamp: startTime,
        };

        // 慢请求上报
        if (duration > this.config.slowRequestThreshold) {
          this.report(MetricType.SLOW_REQUEST, apiData);
        }

        return response;
      } catch (error: any) {
        const duration = Date.now() - startTime;

        const apiData: APIRequestData = {
          url,
          method,
          status: 0,
          duration,
          success: false,
          errorMessage: error?.message || 'Network Error',
          timestamp: startTime,
        };

        this.report(MetricType.API_ERROR, apiData);
        throw error;
      }
    };

    // 拦截 XMLHttpRequest
    const originalXHROpen = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open;
    const originalXHRSend = XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send;

    XMLHttpRequest.prototype.open = function (
      method: string,
      url: string,
      ...rest: any[]
    ) {
      (this as any)._monitor_url = url;
      (this as any)._monitor_method = method;
      (this as any)._monitor_startTime = Date.now();
      return originalXHROpen.apply(this, [method, url, ...rest]);
    };

    XMLHttpRequest.prototype.send = function (...args: any[]) {
      const xhr = this as XMLHttpRequest;
      const startTime = (xhr as any)._monitor_startTime;

      xhr.addEventListener('loadend', () => {
        const duration = Date.now() - startTime;
        const responseHeaders = xhr.getAllResponseHeaders();
        const contentLength = responseHeaders.match(/content-length:\s*(\d+)/i);

        const apiData: APIRequestData = {
          url: (xhr as any)._monitor_url,
          method: (xhr as any)._monitor_method,
          status: xhr.status,
          duration,
          responseSize: contentLength
            ? Math.round(parseInt(contentLength[1]) / 1024)
            : 0,
          success: xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status < 300,
          timestamp: startTime,
        };

        // 慢请求或错误上报
        if (duration > this.config.slowRequestThreshold) {
          this.report(MetricType.SLOW_REQUEST, apiData);
        } else if (!apiData.success) {
          this.report(MetricType.API_ERROR, apiData);
        }
      });

      return originalXHRSend.apply(this, args);
    };
  }

  /**
   * 设置网络监听
   */
  private setupNetworkListeners(): void {
    window.addEventListener('online', () => {
      this.isOnline = true;
      this.upload();
    });

    window.addEventListener('offline', () => {
      this.isOnline = false;
    });
  }

  /**
   * 启动定时上传
   */
  private startUploadTimer(): void {
    this.uploadTimer = setInterval(() => {
      if (this.queue.length > 0 && this.isOnline) {
        this.upload();
      }
    }, this.config.uploadInterval);
  }

  /**
   * 页面卸载时上传
   */
  private setupBeforeUnload(): void {
    window.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => {
      if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && this.queue.length > 0) {
        this.upload(true);
      }
    });

    window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => {
      if (this.queue.length > 0) {
        this.upload(true);
      }
    });
  }

  /**
   * 上报事件
   */
  report(type: MetricType, data: any): void {
    const event: MonitorEvent = {
      id: this.generateEventId(),
      type,
      data,
      userId: this.userId,
      sessionId: this.sessionId,
      device: this.deviceInfo,
      page: this.pageInfo,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    };

    this.queue.push(event);

    // 检查是否需要立即上传
    if (this.queue.length >= this.config.batchSize) {
      this.upload();
    }
  }

  /**
   * 生成事件 ID
   */
  private generateEventId(): string {
    return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
  }

  /**
   * 设置用户 ID
   */
  setUserId(userId: string): void {
    this.userId = userId;
  }

  /**
   * 清除用户 ID
   */
  clearUserId(): void {
    this.userId = undefined;
  }

  /**
   * 上传数据
   */
  private upload(isImmediate = false): void {
    if (this.queue.length === 0) return;

    const data = this.queue.splice(0, this.config.batchSize);

    // 使用 sendBeacon
    if (isImmediate && navigator.sendBeacon) {
      const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data)], {
        type: 'application/json',
      });
      navigator.sendBeacon(this.config.serverUrl, blob);
      return;
    }

    // 使用 fetch
    fetch(this.config.serverUrl, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(data),
      keepalive: true,
    }).catch((error) => {
      // 上传失败，放回队列
      this.queue.unshift(...data);
      console.error('[Monitor] Upload failed:', error);
    });
  }

  /**
   * 销毁
   */
  destroy(): void {
    if (this.uploadTimer) {
      clearInterval(this.uploadTimer);
    }
    this.upload(true);
  }
}

// 创建全局实例
let monitorInstance: Monitor | null = null;

/**
 * 初始化监控
 */
export function initMonitor(config: Partial<MonitorConfig>): Monitor {
  if (monitorInstance) {
    console.warn('[Monitor] Already initialized');
    return monitorInstance;
  }

  monitorInstance = new Monitor(config);
  return monitorInstance;
}

/**
 * 获取监控实例
 */
export function getMonitor(): Monitor | null {
  return monitorInstance;
}

/**
 * 便捷方法 - 上报事件
 */
export function report(type: MetricType, data: any): void {
  monitorInstance?.report(type, data);
}

/**
 * 便捷方法 - 上报性能
 */
export function reportPerformance(data: PerformanceData): void {
  monitorInstance?.report(MetricType.PERFORMANCE, data);
}

/**
 * 便捷方法 - 上报错误
 */
export function reportError(data: JSErrorData): void {
  monitorInstance?.report(MetricType.JS_ERROR, data);
}

/**
 * 便捷方法 - 上报 API 错误
 */
export function reportAPIError(data: APIRequestData): void {
  monitorInstance?.report(MetricType.API_ERROR, data);
}

六、实际项目架构

6.1 项目结构设计

// 项目目录结构设计
/*
src/
├── api/                    # API 接口层
│   ├── axios/              # axios 配置和拦截器
│   ├── modules/            # 按业务模块划分
│   │   ├── user.ts
│   │   ├── order.ts
│   │   └── product.ts
│   └── index.ts            # API 统一导出
│
├── assets/                 # 静态资源
│   ├── images/
│   ├── fonts/
│   └── styles/
│
├── components/             # 公共组件
│   ├── common/             # 通用组件
│   │   ├── Button/
│   │   ├── Modal/
│   │   └── Table/
│   ├── business/           # 业务组件
│   │   ├── UserCard/
│   │   └── OrderDetail/
│   └── index.ts            # 组件统一导出
│
├── composables/            # Vue Composable / React Hooks
│   ├── useRequest.ts
│   ├── usePagination.ts
│   ├── useModal.ts
│   └── usePermission.ts
│
├── config/                 # 配置文件
│   ├── index.ts
│   ├── constants.ts
│   └── env.d.ts
│
├── directives/             # 自定义指令
│   ├── permission.ts
│   └── lazyload.ts
│
├── hooks/                  # 全局 Hooks
│   └── index.ts
│
├── layouts/                # 布局组件
│   ├── MainLayout/
│   ├── BlankLayout/
│   └── AuthLayout/
│
├── router/                 # 路由配置
│   ├── index.ts
│   ├── guard.ts
│   ├── routes/
│   │   ├── static.ts
│   │   └── dynamic.ts
│   └── permission.ts
│
├── services/               # 业务服务层
│   ├── user/
│   │   ├── index.ts
│   │   ├── types.ts
│   │   └── user.service.ts
│   └── order/
│       ├── index.ts
│       ├── types.ts
│       └── order.service.ts
│
├── store/                  # 状态管理
│   ├── index.ts
│   ├── modules/
│   │   ├── user.ts
│   │   ├── app.ts
│   │   └── permission.ts
│   └── plugins/
│       ├── persist.ts
│       └── logger.ts
│
├── types/                  # TypeScript 类型定义
│   ├── api.d.ts
│   ├── user.d.ts
│   └── common.d.ts
│
├── utils/                  # 工具函数
│   ├── index.ts
│   ├── storage.ts
│   ├── validate.ts
│   ├── format.ts
│   └── crypto.ts
│
├── views/                  # 页面组件
│   ├── dashboard/
│   │   └── index.vue
│   ├── user/
│   │   ├── List.vue
│   │   └── Detail.vue
│   ├── order/
│   │   ├── List.vue
│   │   └── Detail.vue
│   └── error/
│       ├── 403.vue
│       ├── 404.vue
│       └── 500.vue
│
├── App.vue                 # 根组件
├── main.ts                 # 入口文件
└── env.d.ts                # 环境变量类型
*/

6.2 状态管理方案

// store/index.ts - 状态管理配置

import { createStore, Store, useStore as useVuexStore } from 'vuex';
import { InjectionKey } from 'vue';

// 模块类型
import { userStore, UserState } from './modules/user';
import { appStore, AppState } from './modules/app';
import { permissionStore, PermissionState } from './modules/permission';

/**
 * 根状态类型
 */
export interface RootState {
  user: UserState;
  app: AppState;
  permission: PermissionState;
}

// 创建 injection key
export const storeKey: InjectionKey<Store<RootState>> = Symbol('store');

/**
 * 创建 store
 */
export function createAppStore() {
  const store = createStore<RootState>({
    // 开启严格模式
    strict: process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production',

    // 状态
    state: {
      user: {},
      app: {},
      permission: {},
    },

    // 模块
    modules: {
      user: userStore,
      app: appStore,
      permission: permissionStore,
    },

    // 插件
    plugins: [
      // 持久化插件
      createPersistPlugin(),
      // 日志插件（开发环境）
      ...(process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production'
        ? [createLoggerPlugin()]
        : []),
    ],
  });

  return store;
}

/**
 * 持久化插件
 */
function createPersistPlugin() {
  return (store: Store<RootState>) => {
    // 读取本地存储
    const storedState = localStorage.getItem('vuex-persist');
    if (storedState) {
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(storedState);
        // 恢复需要持久化的状态
        if (parsed.user) {
          store.commit('user/RESTORE_STATE', parsed.user);
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('Failed to restore vuex state:', e);
      }
    }

    // 监听状态变化，保存到本地存储
    store.subscribe((mutation, state) => {
      const persistState = {
        user: {
          token: state.user.token,
          userInfo: state.user.userInfo,
        },
      };
      localStorage.setItem('vuex-persist', JSON.stringify(persistState));
    });
  };
}

/**
 * 日志插件（开发环境）
 */
function createLoggerPlugin() {
  return (store: Store<RootState>) => {
    store.subscribe((mutation, state) => {
      console.log('[Vuex Mutation]', mutation.type, mutation.payload);
      console.log('[Vuex State]', state);
    });
  };
}

// 重新导出 store 实例
export const store = createAppStore();

// 类型化的 useStore
export function useStore(): Store<RootState> {
  return useVuexStore(storeKey);
}

// store/modules/user.ts - 用户状态模块

import { Module } from 'vuex';
import { RootState } from '../index';
import { User, LoginParams, LoginResult } from '@/types/user';
import { userService } from '@/services/user';

/**
 * 用户状态
 */
export interface UserState {
  // 用户信息
  userInfo: User | null;
  // Token
  token: string | null;
  // 用户角色
  roles: string[];
  // 用户权限
  permissions: string[];
  // 加载状态
  loading: boolean;
}

/**
 * 用户模块
 */
export const userStore: Module<UserState, RootState> = {
  namespaced: true,

  state: {
    userInfo: null,
    token: localStorage.getItem('token') || null,
    roles: [],
    permissions: [],
    loading: false,
  },

  getters: {
    // 获取用户信息
    userInfo: (state) => state.userInfo,
    // 获取 Token
    token: (state) => state.token,
    // 是否已登录
    isLoggedIn: (state) => !!state.token,
    // 获取用户角色
    roles: (state) => state.roles,
    // 获取用户权限
    permissions: (state) => state.permissions,
    // 获取用户名称
    username: (state) => state.userInfo?.username || '',
    // 获取用户头像
    avatar: (state) => state.userInfo?.avatar || '',
    // 是否是管理员
    isAdmin: (state) => state.roles.includes('admin'),
  },

  mutations: {
    // 设置用户信息
    SET_USER_INFO(state, userInfo: User | null) {
      state.userInfo = userInfo;
    },

    // 设置 Token
    SET_TOKEN(state, token: string | null) {
      state.token = token;
      if (token) {
        localStorage.setItem('token', token);
      } else {
        localStorage.removeItem('token');
      }
    },

    // 设置角色
    SET_ROLES(state, roles: string[]) {
      state.roles = roles;
    },

    // 设置权限
    SET_PERMISSIONS(state, permissions: string[]) {
      state.permissions = permissions;
    },

    // 设置加载状态
    SET_LOADING(state, loading: boolean) {
      state.loading = loading;
    },

    // 恢复状态（持久化）
    RESTORE_STATE(state, savedState: Partial<UserState>) {
      if (savedState.token) {
        state.token = savedState.token;
      }
      if (savedState.userInfo) {
        state.userInfo = savedState.userInfo;
      }
    },
  },

  actions: {
    /**
     * 登录
     */
    async login({ commit }, params: LoginParams) {
      commit('SET_LOADING', true);
      try {
        const result = await userService.login(params);
        commit('SET_TOKEN', result.token);
        commit('SET_USER_INFO', result.user);
        return result;
      } finally {
        commit('SET_LOADING', false);
      }
    },

    /**
     * 获取用户信息
     */
    async getUserInfo({ commit, state }) {
      if (!state.token) {
        throw new Error('No token');
      }

      commit('SET_LOADING', true);
      try {
        const userInfo = await userService.getUserInfo();
        // 从用户信息中提取角色和权限
        const roles = userInfo.roles?.map((r) => r.code) || [];
        const permissions = userInfo.permissions?.map((p) => p.code) || [];

        commit('SET_USER_INFO', userInfo);
        commit('SET_ROLES', roles);
        commit('SET_PERMISSIONS', permissions);

        return userInfo;
      } finally {
        commit('SET_LOADING', false);
      }
    },

    /**
     * 登出
     */
    async logout({ commit }) {
      try {
        await userService.logout();
      } finally {
        commit('SET_TOKEN', null);
        commit('SET_USER_INFO', null);
        commit('SET_ROLES', []);
        commit('SET_PERMISSIONS', []);
      }
    },

    /**
     * 更新用户信息
     */
    async updateUserInfo({ commit }, userInfo: Partial<User>) {
      const updated = await userService.updateUserInfo(userInfo);
      commit('SET_USER_INFO', updated);
      return updated;
    },
  },
};

// store/modules/permission.ts - 权限状态模块

import { Module } from 'vuex';
import { RootState } from '../index';
import { RouteConfig } from '@/types/router';
import { getPermissionManager } from '@/services/permission';
import { asyncRoutes } from '@/router/routes';

/**
 * 权限状态
 */
export interface PermissionState {
  // 路由列表
  routes: RouteConfig[];
  // 动态添加的路由
  addRoutes: RouteConfig[];
  // 菜单列表
  menus: RouteConfig[];
  // 是否已加载路由
  isRoutesLoaded: boolean;
}

/**
 * 权限模块
 */
export const permissionStore: Module<PermissionState, RootState> = {
  namespaced: true,

  state: {
    routes: [],
    addRoutes: [],
    menus: [],
    isRoutesLoaded: false,
  },

  getters: {
    // 获取所有路由
    routes: (state) => state.routes,
    // 获取菜单
    menus: (state) => state.menus,
    // 获取动态路由
    addRoutes: (state) => state.addRoutes,
    // 是否已加载路由
    isRoutesLoaded: (state) => state.isRoutesLoaded,
  },

  mutations: {
    // 设置路由
    SET_ROUTES(state, routes: RouteConfig[]) {
      state.routes = routes;
      // 合并静态路由和动态路由
      state.addRoutes = routes;
    },

    // 设置菜单
    SET_MENUS(state, menus: RouteConfig[]) {
      state.menus = menus;
    },

    // 设置路由加载状态
    SET_ROUTES_LOADED(state, loaded: boolean) {
      state.isRoutesLoaded = loaded;
    },

    // 清空路由
    CLEAR_ROUTES(state) {
      state.routes = [];
      state.addRoutes = [];
      state.menus = [];
      state.isRoutesLoaded = false;
    },
  },

  actions: {
    /**
     * 生成权限路由
     */
    async generateRoutes({ commit }) {
      const permissionManager = getPermissionManager();

      // 过滤有权限的路由
      const accessedRoutes = permissionManager.filterRoutes(asyncRoutes);

      // 过滤显示的菜单
      const accessibleMenus = permissionManager.getAccessibleMenus(asyncRoutes);

      commit('SET_ROUTES', accessedRoutes);
      commit('SET_MENUS', accessibleMenus);
      commit('SET_ROUTES_LOADED', true);

      return accessedRoutes;
    },

    /**
     * 重置权限
     */
    resetPermission({ commit }) {
      commit('CLEAR_ROUTES');
    },
  },
};

6.3 API 设计

// api/axios/config.ts - Axios 配置

import axios, { AxiosInstance, AxiosRequestConfig, AxiosResponse } from 'axios';
import { ElMessage } from 'element-plus';

// 请求配置
export interface RequestConfig extends AxiosRequestConfig {
  // 是否显示 loading
  showLoading?: boolean;
  // 是否忽略认证错误
  ignoreAuthError?: boolean;
  // 请求重试次数
  retry?: number;
  // 请求重试延迟
  retryDelay?: number;
}

// 响应数据类型
export interface ResponseData<T = any> {
  // 状态码
  code: number;
  // 消息
  message: string;
  // 数据
  data: T;
  // 时间戳
  timestamp: number;
}

// 创建 axios 实例
const createAxiosInstance = (): AxiosInstance => {
  const instance = axios.create({
    // 基础 URL
    baseURL: process.env.VUE_APP_API_BASE_URL || '/api',
    // 请求超时
    timeout: 30000,
    // 请求头
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json;charset=UTF-8',
    },
    // 是否允许跨域带凭证
    withCredentials: true,
  });

  // 请求拦截器
  instance.interceptors.request.use(
    (config: RequestConfig) => {
      // 获取 Token
      const token = localStorage.getItem('token');
      if (token) {
        (config.headers as any).Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`;
      }

      // 添加租户 ID（多租户场景）
      const tenantId = localStorage.getItem('tenantId');
      if (tenantId) {
        (config.headers as any)['X-Tenant-Id'] = tenantId;
      }

      // 添加请求 ID（链路追踪）
      (config.headers as any)['X-Request-Id'] = generateRequestId();

      // 显示 loading
      if (config.showLoading) {
        showLoading();
      }

      return config;
    },
    (error) => {
      return Promise.reject(error);
    }
  );

  // 响应拦截器
  instance.interceptors.response.use(
    async (response: AxiosResponse<ResponseData>) => {
      const config = response.config as RequestConfig;

      // 隐藏 loading
      if (config.showLoading) {
        hideLoading();
      }

      const { data } = response;

      // 请求成功
      if (data.code === 200 || data.code === 0) {
        return data;
      }

      // 处理业务错误
      switch (data.code) {
        case 401:
          // 未授权
          if (!config.ignoreAuthError) {
            handleUnauthorized();
          }
          break;
        case 403:
          // 无权限
          ElMessage.error('您没有权限执行此操作');
          break;
        case 404:
          // 资源不存在
          ElMessage.error('请求的资源不存在');
          break;
        case 500:
          // 服务器错误
          ElMessage.error('服务器内部错误');
          break;
        default:
          ElMessage.error(data.message || '请求失败');
      }

      return Promise.reject(new Error(data.message || '请求失败'));
    },
    async (error) => {
      const config = error.config as RequestConfig;

      // 隐藏 loading
      if (config?.showLoading) {
        hideLoading();
      }

      // 处理网络错误
      if (error.code === 'ECONNABORTED') {
        // 请求超时
        ElMessage.error('请求超时，请稍后重试');
      } else if (!navigator.onLine) {
        // 网络断开
        ElMessage.error('网络已断开，请检查网络连接');
      } else if (error.response) {
        // HTTP 错误
        const status = error.response.status;
        switch (status) {
          case 400:
            ElMessage.error('请求参数错误');
            break;
          case 401:
            if (!config?.ignoreAuthError) {
              handleUnauthorized();
            }
            break;
          case 403:
            ElMessage.error('您没有权限执行此操作');
            break;
          case 404:
            ElMessage.error('请求的资源不存在');
            break;
          case 500:
            ElMessage.error('服务器内部错误');
            break;
          case 502:
            ElMessage.error('网关错误');
            break;
          case 503:
            ElMessage.error('服务不可用');
            break;
          default:
            ElMessage.error('请求失败，请稍后重试');
        }
      } else {
        ElMessage.error('网络错误，请检查网络连接');
      }

      // 请求重试
      if (config && config.retry) {
        const { retry, retryDelay = 1000 } = config;
        config.retry -= 1;

        // 延迟后重试
        await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, retryDelay));
        return axios(config);
      }

      return Promise.reject(error);
    }
  );

  return instance;
};

// 生成请求 ID
function generateRequestId(): string {
  return `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
}

// 处理未授权
function handleUnauthorized(): void {
  // 清除 token
  localStorage.removeItem('token');
  // 跳转到登录页
  window.location.href = `/login?redirect=${window.location.pathname}`;
}

// Loading 计数
let loadingCount = 0;
let loadingInstance: any = null;

// 显示 loading
function showLoading(): void {
  loadingCount++;
  if (!loadingInstance) {
    loadingInstance = ElLoading.service({
      lock: true,
      text: '加载中...',
      background: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)',
    });
  }
}

// 隐藏 loading
function hideLoading(): void {
  loadingCount--;
  if (loadingCount <= 0 && loadingInstance) {
    loadingInstance.close();
    loadingInstance = null;
    loadingCount = 0;
  }
}

// 导出 axios 实例
export const request = createAxiosInstance();

// 封装请求方法
export const requestMethods = {
  get<T = any>(url: string, config?: RequestConfig): Promise<ResponseData<T>> {
    return request.get(url, config);
  },

  post<T = any>(url: string, data?: any, config?: RequestConfig): Promise<ResponseData<T>> {
    return request.post(url, data, config);
  },

  put<T = any>(url: string, data?: any, config?: RequestConfig): Promise<ResponseData<T>> {
    return request.put(url, data, config);
  },

  delete<T = any>(url: string, config?: RequestConfig): Promise<ResponseData<T>> {
    return request.delete(url, config);
  },

  patch<T = any>(url: string, data?: any, config?: RequestConfig): Promise<ResponseData<T>> {
    return request.patch(url, data, config);
  },
};

// api/modules/user.ts - 用户 API

import { request } from '../axios/config';

/**
 * 登录参数
 */
export interface LoginParams {
  username: string;
  password: string;
  // 验证码
  captcha?: string;
  // 验证码 ID
  captchaId?: string;
}

/**
 * 登录结果
 */
export interface LoginResult {
  token: string;
  user: UserInfo;
  // Token 过期时间
  expiresIn: number;
  // 刷新 Token
  refreshToken: string;
}

/**
 * 用户信息
 */
export interface UserInfo {
  id: string;
  username: string;
  nickname: string;
  email?: string;
  phone?: string;
  avatar?: string;
  roles: Role[];
  permissions: Permission[];
  // 创建时间
  createTime: string;
  // 更新时间
  updateTime: string;
}

/**
 * 角色
 */
export interface Role {
  id: string;
  code: string;
  name: string;
}

/**
 * 权限
 */
export interface Permission {
  id: string;
  code: string;
  name: string;
  type: 'menu' | 'button' | 'api';
}

/**
 * 用户 API
 */
export const userApi = {
  /**
   * 登录
   */
  login(params: LoginParams) {
    return request.post<LoginResult>('/user/login', params);
  },

  /**
   * 登出
   */
  logout() {
    return request.post('/user/logout');
  },

  /**
   * 获取用户信息
   */
  getUserInfo() {
    return request.get<UserInfo>('/user/info');
  },

  /**
   * 更新用户信息
   */
  updateUserInfo(data: Partial<UserInfo>) {
    return request.put<UserInfo>('/user/info', data);
  },

  /**
   * 修改密码
   */
  changePassword(data: { oldPassword: string; newPassword: string }) {
    return request.post('/user/change-password', data);
  },

  /**
   * 获取用户列表
   */
  getUserList(params: {
    page: number;
    pageSize: number;
    username?: string;
    nickname?: string;
    status?: number;
  }) {
    return request.get<{ list: UserInfo[]; total: number }>('/user/list', {
      params,
    });
  },

  /**
   * 创建用户
   */
  createUser(data: Partial<UserInfo> & { password: string }) {
    return request.post<UserInfo>('/user', data);
  },

  /**
   * 更新用户
   */
  updateUser(id: string, data: Partial<UserInfo>) {
    return request.put<UserInfo>(`/user/${id}`, data);
  },

  /**
   * 删除用户
   */
  deleteUser(id: string) {
    return request.delete(`/user/${id}`);
  },

  /**
   * 重置密码
   */
  resetPassword(id: string) {
    return request.post(`/user/${id}/reset-password`);
  },

  /**
   * 分配角色
   */
  assignRoles(userId: string, roleIds: string[]) {
    return request.post(`/user/${userId}/roles`, { roleIds });
  },

  /**
   * 刷新 Token
   */
  refreshToken(refreshToken: string) {
    return request.post<{ token: string; expiresIn: number }>(
      '/user/refresh-token',
      { refreshToken }
    );
  },
};

七、性能优化实战

7.1 首屏优化详细方案

// 首屏优化 - 代码分割策略

/**
 * 路由级代码分割
 * 使用 React.lazy 或 Vue.defineAsyncComponent
 */
import React, { Suspense, lazy } from 'react';

// 路由懒加载
export const Dashboard = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "dashboard" */ '@/views/Dashboard'));
export const UserList = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "user" */ '@/views/UserList'));
export const UserDetail = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "user" */ '@/views/UserDetail'));
export const OrderList = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "order" */ '@/views/OrderList'));
export const OrderDetail = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "order" */ '@/views/OrderDetail'));
export const Settings = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "settings" */ '@/views/Settings'));

/**
 * 路由懒加载组件包装
 */
export const LazyRoute: React.FC<{ component: React.ComponentType<any> }> = ({ component: Component }) => {
  return (
    <Suspense fallback={<LoadingFallback />}>
      <Component />
    </Suspense>
  );
};

/**
 * 加载中占位符
 */
const LoadingFallback: React.FC = () => {
  return (
    <div style={{
      display: 'flex',
      justifyContent: 'center',
      alignItems: 'center',
      height: '100vh',
      background: '#f5f5f5',
    }}>
      <div className="loading-spinner" />
    </div>
  );
};

/**
 * 组件级代码分割
 * 按需加载大型组件
 */

// 使用 React.lazy
const HeavyChart = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "chart" */ '@/components/HeavyChart'));
const DataTable = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "table" */ '@/components/DataTable'));
const RichTextEditor = lazy(() => import(/* webpackChunkName: "editor" */ '@/components/RichTextEditor'));

// 使用 dynamic import（更灵活）
const loadComponent = (componentPath: string) => {
  return import(/* webpackChunkName: "dynamic" */ componentPath);
};

/**
 * 图片懒加载组件
 */
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';

interface LazyImageProps {
  src: string;
  alt: string;
  placeholder?: string;
  className?: string;
  style?: React.CSSProperties;
}

export const LazyImage: React.FC<LazyImageProps> = ({
  src,
  alt,
  placeholder = 'data:image/svg+xml;base64,',
  className,
  style,
}) => {
  const [isLoaded, setIsLoaded] = useState(false);
  const [isInView, setIsInView] = useState(false);
  const imgRef = useRef<HTMLImageElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
      (entries) => {
        if (entries[0].isIntersecting) {
          setIsInView(true);
          observer.disconnect();
        }
      },
      {
        rootMargin: '100px', // 提前 100px 开始加载
        threshold: 0.1,
      }
    );

    if (imgRef.current) {
      observer.observe(imgRef.current);
    }

    return () => observer.disconnect();
  }, []);

  return (
    <img
      ref={imgRef}
      src={isInView ? src : placeholder}
      alt={alt}
      className={className}
      style={{
        ...style,
        opacity: isLoaded ? 1 : 0,
        transition: 'opacity 0.3s ease',
      }}
      onLoad={() => setIsLoaded(true)}
    />
  );
};

/**
 * 虚拟列表 - 处理大量数据渲染
 */
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';

interface VirtualListProps<T> {
  items: T[];
  height: number;
  itemHeight: number;
  renderItem: (item: T, index: number) => React.ReactNode;
  overscan?: number;
}

export function VirtualList<T>({
  items,
  height,
  itemHeight,
  renderItem,
  overscan = 3,
}: VirtualListProps<T>) {
  const [scrollTop, setScrollTop] = useState(0);
  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  const handleScroll = useCallback((e: Event) => {
    const target = e.target as HTMLDivElement;
    setScrollTop(target.scrollTop);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current;
    if (!container) return;

    container.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });
    return () => container.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll);
  }, [handleScroll]);

  // 计算可见区域
  const startIndex = Math.max(0, Math.floor(scrollTop / itemHeight) - overscan);
  const endIndex = Math.min(
    items.length - 1,
    Math.ceil((scrollTop + height) / itemHeight) + overscan
  );

  // 渲染可见项
  const visibleItems = [];
  for (let i = startIndex; i <= endIndex; i++) {
    visibleItems.push(
      <div
        key={i}
        style={{
          position: 'absolute',
          top: i * itemHeight,
          height: itemHeight,
          left: 0,
          right: 0,
        }}
      >
        {renderItem(items[i], i)}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div
      ref={containerRef}
      style={{
        height,
        overflow: 'auto',
        position: 'relative',
      }}
    >
      <div style={{ height: items.length * itemHeight, position: 'relative' }}>
        {visibleItems}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

7.2 运行时优化

// 运行时优化 - 内存管理和性能优化

/**
 * 缓存工具 - 内存缓存 + 持久化
 */
class CacheManager<T> {
  private cache: Map<string, { value: T; expire: number }> = new Map();
  private storageKey: string;
  private defaultExpire: number;

  constructor(storageKey: string, defaultExpire = 5 * 60 * 1000) {
    this.storageKey = storageKey;
    this.defaultExpire = defaultExpire;
    this.loadFromStorage();
  }

  /**
   * 设置缓存
   */
  set(key: string, value: T, expire?: number): void {
    const expireTime = Date.now() + (expire || this.defaultExpire);
    this.cache.set(key, { value, expire: expireTime });
    this.saveToStorage();
  }

  /**
   * 获取缓存
   */
  get(key: string): T | null {
    const item = this.cache.get(key);
    if (!item) return null;

    // 检查过期
    if (Date.now() > item.expire) {
      this.cache.delete(key);
      this.saveToStorage();
      return null;
    }

    return item.value;
  }

  /**
   * 删除缓存
   */
  delete(key: string): void {
    this.cache.delete(key);
    this.saveToStorage();
  }

  /**
   * 清空缓存
   */
  clear(): void {
    this.cache.clear();
    this.saveToStorage();
  }

  /**
   * 从存储加载
   */
  private loadFromStorage(): void {
    try {
      const stored = localStorage.getItem(this.storageKey);
      if (stored) {
        const data = JSON.parse(stored);
        Object.entries(data).forEach(([key, value]: [string, any]) => {
          if (value.expire > Date.now()) {
            this.cache.set(key, value);
          }
        });
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Failed to load cache from storage:', e);
    }
  }

  /**
   * 保存到存储
   */
  private saveToStorage(): void {
    try {
      const data: Record<string, any> = {};
      this.cache.forEach((value, key) => {
        data[key] = value;
      });
      localStorage.setItem(this.storageKey, JSON.stringify(data));
    } catch (e) {
      console.error('Failed to save cache to storage:', e);
    }
  }
}

// 创建缓存实例
export const apiCache = new CacheManager('api-cache', 5 * 60 * 1000);
export const dataCache = new CacheManager('data-cache', 10 * 60 * 1000);

/**
 * 防抖函数
 */
export function debounce<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(
  func: T,
  wait: number,
  immediate = false
): (...args: Parameters<T>) => void {
  let timeout: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;

  return function (this: any, ...args: Parameters<T>) {
    const context = this;

    const later = () => {
      timeout = null;
      if (!immediate) {
        func.apply(context, args);
      }
    };

    const callNow = immediate && !timeout;

    if (timeout) {
      clearTimeout(timeout);
    }

    timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);

    if (callNow) {
      func.apply(context, args);
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 节流函数
 */
export function throttle<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(
  func: T,
  wait: number
): (...args: Parameters<T>) => void {
  let timeout: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;
  let previous = 0;

  return function (this: any, ...args: Parameters<T>) {
    const context = this;
    const now = Date.now();

    if (!previous) {
      previous = now;
    }

    const remaining = wait - (now - previous);

    if (remaining <= 0 || remaining > wait) {
      if (timeout) {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        timeout = null;
      }
      previous = now;
      func.apply(context, args);
    } else if (!timeout) {
      timeout = setTimeout(() => {
        previous = Date.now();
        timeout = null;
        func.apply(context, args);
      }, remaining);
    }
  };
}

/**
 * 记忆化函数
 */
export function memoize<T extends (...args: any[]) => any>(
  func: T
): T {
  const cache = new Map<string, ReturnType<T>>();

  return ((...args: Parameters<T>) => {
    const key = JSON.stringify(args);
    if (cache.has(key)) {
      return cache.get(key)!;
    }
    const result = func(...args);
    cache.set(key, result);
    return result;
  }) as T;
}

/**
 * React useMemo 优化示例
 */
import { useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';

/**
 * 优化计算
 */
function ExpensiveComponent({ data, filter }: { data: number[]; filter: string }) {
  // 使用 useMemo 缓存计算结果
  const filteredData = useMemo(() => {
    console.log('Computing filtered data...');
    return data.filter((item) => {
      // 复杂过滤逻辑
      return item.toString().includes(filter);
    });
  }, [data, filter]); // 仅在 data 或 filter 变化时重新计算

  // 使用 useCallback 缓存函数引用
  const handleClick = useCallback((id: number) => {
    console.log('Item clicked:', id);
  }, []); // 空依赖数组，函数引用永远不变

  return (
    <ul>
      {filteredData.map((item) => (
        <li key={item} onClick={() => handleClick(item)}>
          {item}
        </li>
      ))}
    </ul>
  );
}

/**
 * 虚拟 DOM 优化 - React.memo
 */
interface ListItemProps {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  onClick: (id: number) => void;
}

// 使用 React.memo 优化列表项
const ListItem = React.memo<ListItemProps>(({ id, name, onClick }) => {
  console.log('Rendering list item:', id);
  return (
    <div onClick={() => onClick(id)}>
      {name}
    </div>
  );
}, (prevProps, nextProps) => {
  // 自定义比较逻辑
  return prevProps.id === nextProps.id && prevProps.name === nextProps.name;
});

/**
 * 列表渲染优化 - 使用 key
 */
function OptimizedList({ items }: { items: Array<{ id: string; name: string }> }) {
  return (
    <ul>
      {items.map((item) => (
        // 使用稳定的唯一 ID 作为 key
        <ListItem key={item.id} id={item.id} name={item.name} onClick={() => {}} />
      ))}
    </ul>
  );
}

/**
 * 避免不必要的渲染
 */
import { useRef, useEffect } from 'react';

function UseRefExample() {
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const countRef = useRef(0);

  // 使用 ref 存储不触发渲染的值
  useEffect(() => {
    countRef.current += 1;
    console.log('Render count:', countRef.current);
  });

  // 聚焦输入框
  const focusInput = () => {
    inputRef.current?.focus();
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <input ref={inputRef} type="text" />
      <button onClick={focusInput}>Focus</button>
    </div>
  );
}

7.3 监控与埋点

// 监控与埋点 - Web Vitals 监控

/**
 * Web Vitals 监控
 */
class WebVitalsMonitor {
  private serverUrl: string;

  constructor(serverUrl: string) {
    this.serverUrl = serverUrl;
  }

  /**
   * 初始化监控
   */
  init(): void {
    if (!('PerformanceObserver' in window)) return;

    // 监控 LCP
    this.observeLCP();

    // 监控 FID
    this.observeFID();

    // 监控 CLS
    this.observeCLS();
  }

  /**
   * 监控 LCP (Largest Contentful Paint)
   */
  private observeLCP(): void {
    try {
      const observer = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
        const entries = list.getEntries();
        const lastEntry = entries[entries.length - 1] as any;
        const lcp = lastEntry.renderTime || lastEntry.loadTime;

        this.report('LCP', {
          value: lcp,
          rating: this.getRating(lcp, 2500, 4000),
          element: lastEntry.element?.tagName,
        });
      });
      observer.observe({ entryType: 'largest-contentful-paint' });
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('LCP observation not supported');
    }
  }

  /**
   * 监控 FID (First Input Delay)
   */
  private observeFID(): void {
    try {
      const observer = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
        const firstEntry = list.getEntries()[0] as any;
        const fid = firstEntry.processingStart - firstEntry.startTime;

        this.report('FID', {
          value: fid,
          rating: this.getRating(fid, 100, 300),
          eventType: firstEntry.name,
        });
      });
      observer.observe({ entryType: 'first-input' });
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('FID observation not supported');
    }
  }

  /**
   * 监控 CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift)
   */
  private observeCLS(): void {
    try {
      let clsScore = 0;
      const entries: any[] = [];

      const observer = new PerformanceObserver((list) => {
        for (const entry of list.getEntries()) {
          if (!entry.hadRecentInput) {
            entries.push(entry);
            clsScore += entry.value;
          }
        }

        this.report('CLS', {
          value: clsScore,
          rating: this.getRating(clsScore, 0.1, 0.25),
          entries: entries.length,
        });
      });
      observer.observe({ entryType: 'layout-shift' });
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('CLS observation not supported');
    }
  }

  /**
   * 获取评级
   */
  private getRating(value: number, good: number, poor: number): string {
    if (value <= good) return 'good';
    if (value <= poor) return 'needs-improvement';
    return 'poor';
  }

  /**
   * 上报数据
   */
  private report(metric: string, data: any): void {
    const payload = {
      metric,
      ...data,
      url: window.location.href,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    };

    // 使用 sendBeacon 上报
    if (navigator.sendBeacon) {
      const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload)], {
        type: 'application/json',
      });
      navigator.sendBeacon(this.serverUrl, blob);
    } else {
      fetch(this.serverUrl, {
        method: 'POST',
        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
        keepalive: true,
      });
    }
  }
}

/**
 * 用户行为追踪
 */
class BehaviorTracker {
  private events: Array<{ type: string; data: any; timestamp: number }> = [];
  private maxEvents = 100;

  init(): void {
    // 追踪点击
    this.trackClicks();

    // 追踪页面滚动
    this.trackScroll();

    // 追踪页面停留时间
    this.trackPageStay();

    // 定期上报
    setInterval(() => this.report(), 30000);
  }

  /**
   * 追踪点击
   */
  private trackClicks(): void {
    document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
      const target = event.target as HTMLElement;
      const trackingData = {
        element: target.tagName.toLowerCase(),
        id: target.id,
        class: target.className,
        text: target.textContent?.slice(0, 50),
        x: event.clientX,
        y: event.clientY,
      };

      this.pushEvent('click', trackingData);
    });
  }

  /**
   * 追踪滚动
   */
  private trackScroll(): void {
    let scrollStart = 0;
    let maxScroll = 0;

    const handleScroll = () => {
      const scrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
      const scrollHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;

      // 记录最大滚动深度
      maxScroll = Math.max(maxScroll, scrollTop / scrollHeight);

      // 记录滚动开始
      if (scrollTop > 0 && scrollStart === 0) {
        scrollStart = scrollTop;
      }

      // 滚动到底部
      if (scrollTop + window.innerHeight >= document.documentElement.scrollHeight - 50) {
        this.pushEvent('scroll-bottom', { maxScroll });
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });
  }

  /**
   * 追踪页面停留
   */
  private trackPageStay(): void {
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const pageUrl = window.location.href;

    const handleBeforeUnload = () => {
      const stayTime = Date.now() - startTime;
      this.pushEvent('page-stay', {
        pageUrl,
        stayTime,
        timestamp: startTime,
      });
      this.report();
    };

    window.addEventListener('beforeunload', handleBeforeUnload);
  }

  /**
   * 添加事件
   */
  private pushEvent(type: string, data: any): void {
    this.events.push({
      type,
      data,
      timestamp: Date.now(),
    });

    // 限制事件数量
    if (this.events.length > this.maxEvents) {
      this.events.shift();
    }
  }

  /**
   * 上报事件
   */
  private report(): void {
    if (this.events.length === 0) return;

    const payload = {
      events: [...this.events],
      url: window.location.href,
    };

    this.events = [];

    if (navigator.sendBeacon) {
      const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(payload)], {
        type: 'application/json',
      });
      navigator.sendBeacon('/api/behavior', blob);
    }
  }
}

八、安全防护

8.1 XSS 防护

// 安全防护 - XSS 防护

/**
 * XSS 防护工具
 */
export class XSSSanitizer {
  /**
   * HTML 实体编码映射
   */
  private static entityMap: Record<string, string> = {
    '&': '&amp;',
    '<': '&lt;',
    '>': '&gt;',
    '"': '&quot;',
    "'": '&#39;',
    '/': '&#x2F;',
    '`': '&#x60;',
    '=': '&#x3D;',
  };

  /**
   * 转义 HTML 特殊字符
   */
  static escapeHtml(str: string): string {
    return str.replace(/[&<>"`=/]/g, (char) => this.entityMap[char] || char);
  }

  /**
   * 转义 HTML 属性
   */
  static escapeHtmlAttr(str: string): string {
    return str.replace(/["'&<>]/g, (char) => this.entityMap[char] || char);
  }

  /**
   * 转义 JavaScript 字符串
   */
  static escapeJs(str: string): string {
    return str
      .replace(/\\/g, '\\\\')
      .replace(/'/g, "\\'")
      .replace(/"/g, '\\"')
      .replace(/\n/g, '\\n')
      .replace(/\r/g, '\\r')
      .replace(/\u2028/g, '\\u2028')
      .replace(/\u2029/g, '\\u2029');
  }

  /**
   * 转义 URL 参数
   */
  static escapeUrlParam(str: string): string {
    return encodeURIComponent(str)
      .replace(/[!'()*]/g, (c) => `%${c.charCodeAt(0).toString(16).toUpperCase()}`);
  }

  /**
   * 清理富文本 HTML
   */
  static sanitizeHtml(dirty: string): string {
    // 允许的标签
    const allowedTags = [
      'h1', 'h2', 'h3', 'h4', 'h5', 'h6',
      'p', 'br', 'hr',
      'ul', 'ol', 'li',
      'strong', 'em', 'b', 'i', 'u', 's',
      'a', 'img',
      'table', 'thead', 'tbody', 'tr', 'th', 'td',
      'blockquote', 'pre', 'code',
    ];

    // 允许的属性
    const allowedAttrs = {
      'a': ['href', 'title', 'target'],
      'img': ['src', 'alt', 'title', 'width', 'height'],
      'td': ['colspan', 'rowspan'],
      'th': ['colspan', 'rowspan'],
    };

    // 创建 DOM 解析器
    const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(dirty, 'text/html');

    // 遍历所有元素
    const walk = (node: Node) => {
      if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {
        return node.textContent || '';
      }

      if (node.nodeType !== Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {
        return '';
      }

      const element = node as Element;
      const tagName = element.tagName.toLowerCase();

      // 检查是否允许的标签
      if (!allowedTags.includes(tagName)) {
        return element.textContent || '';
      }

      // 检查允许的属性
      const allowed = allowedAttrs[tagName as keyof typeof allowedAttrs] || [];
      let attrs = '';

      for (const attr of Array.from(element.attributes)) {
        if (allowed.includes(attr.name)) {
          // 检查 href/src 属性
          if (attr.name === 'href' || attr.name === 'src') {
            const value = attr.value.trim();
            // 检查危险协议
            if (
              value.startsWith('javascript:') ||
              value.startsWith('data:') ||
              value.startsWith('vbscript:')
            ) {
              continue;
            }
          }
          attrs += ` ${attr.name}="${this.escapeHtmlAttr(attr.value)}"`;
        }
      }

      // 处理子元素
      const children = Array.from(element.childNodes)
        .map((child) => walk(child))
        .join('');

      return `<${tagName}${attrs}>${children}</${tagName}>`;
    };

    return Array.from(doc.body.childNodes)
      .map((node) => walk(node))
      .join('');
  }

  /**
   * 验证 URL
   */
  static validateUrl(url: string): boolean {
    try {
      const parsed = new URL(url);
      // 只允许 http 和 https
      return ['http:', 'https:'].includes(parsed.protocol);
    } catch {
      return false;
    }
  }

  /**
   * 安全地设置 HTML
   */
  static setInnerHTML(element: HTMLElement, html: string): void {
    // 使用 DOMPurify 等专业库更好
    element.innerHTML = this.sanitizeHtml(html);
  }
}

/**
 * React XSS 防护组件
 */
import React, { useMemo } from 'react';

interface SafeHTMLProps {
  html: string;
  tagName?: keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements;
}

export const SafeHTML: React.FC<SafeHTMLProps> = ({ html, tagName = 'div' }) => {
  const sanitizedHtml = useMemo(() => {
    return XSSSanitizer.sanitizeHtml(html);
  }, [html]);

  const Component = tagName;

  return <Component dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: sanitizedHtml }} />;
};

/**
 * Vue XSS 防护指令
 */
import { Directive } from 'vue';

export const xssDirective: Directive = {
  beforeMount(el: HTMLElement, binding: DirectiveBinding) {
    el.innerHTML = XSSSanitizer.sanitizeHtml(binding.value);
  },
  updated(el: HTMLElement, binding: DirectiveBinding) {
    el.innerHTML = XSSSanitizer.sanitizeHtml(binding.value);
  },
};

/**
 * Content Security Policy 配置
 */
export const CSP_HEADER = {
  // 基础策略
  'default-src': ["'self'"],
  // 脚本源
  'script-src': ["'self'", "'unsafe-inline'", "'unsafe-eval'"],
  // 样式源
  'style-src': ["'self'", "'unsafe-inline'"],
  // 图片源
  'img-src': ["'self'", 'data:', 'https:'],
  // 字体源
  'font-src': ["'self'", 'data:'],
  // 连接源
  'connect-src': ["'self'", 'https://api.example.com'],
  // 框架源
  'frame-ancestors': ["'none'"],
  // 对象源
  'object-src': ["'none'"],
  // Base URI
  'base-uri': ["'self'"],
  // 表单行为
  'form-action': ["'self'"],
  // 升级不安全请求
  'upgrade-insecure-requests': [],
};

/**
 * 生成 CSP 头
 */
export function generateCSPHeader(): string {
  return Object.entries(CSP_HEADER)
    .map(([directive, sources]) => {
      if (sources.length === 0) {
        return directive;
      }
      return `${directive} ${sources.join(' ')}`;
    })
    .join('; ');
}

8.2 CSRF 防护

// 安全防护 - CSRF 防护

/**
 * CSRF Token 管理
 */
class CSRFTokenManager {
  private token: string | null = null;
  private tokenName: string = 'X-CSRF-Token';

  /**
   * 从 Cookie 或响应头获取 Token
   */
  async fetchToken(): Promise<string | null> {
    try {
      // 从服务器获取 CSRF Token
      const response = await fetch('/api/csrf-token', {
        credentials: 'include',
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        this.token = data.token;
        return this.token;
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch CSRF token:', error);
    }

    // 尝试从 Cookie 获取
    this.token = this.getTokenFromCookie();
    return this.token;
  }

  /**
   * 从 Cookie 获取 Token
   */
  private getTokenFromCookie(): string | null {
    const match = document.cookie.match(/CSRF-Token=([^;]+)/);
    return match ? match[1] : null;
  }

  /**
   * 获取当前 Token
   */
  getToken(): string | null {
    return this.token;
  }

  /**
   * 获取请求头
   */
  getHeaders(): Record<string, string> {
    if (!this.token) {
      console.warn('CSRF token not available');
    }
    return {
      [this.tokenName]: this.token || '',
    };
  }

  /**
   * 清除 Token
   */
  clearToken(): void {
    this.token = null;
  }
}

// 创建全局实例
const csrfManager = new CSRFTokenManager();

/**
 * 安全的 Fetch 包装
 */
export async function safeFetch(
  url: string,
  options: RequestInit = {}
): Promise<Response> {
  // 确保获取了 CSRF Token
  if (!csrfManager.getToken()) {
    await csrfManager.fetchToken();
  }

  // 添加 CSRF Token
  const headers = new Headers(options.headers);
  headers.set('X-CSRF-Token', csrfManager.getToken() || '');

  return fetch(url, {
    ...options,
    headers,
    credentials: 'same-origin',
  });
}

/**
 * CSRF 防护中间件（Node.js/Express）
 */
export const csrfMiddleware = (req: any, res: any, next: any) => {
  // 只处理非 GET 请求
  if (req.method === 'GET' || req.method === 'HEAD' || req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
    return next();
  }

  // 从请求头或 Cookie 获取 Token
  const requestToken = req.headers['x-csrf-token'] || req.cookies['CSRF-Token'];

  // 验证 Token
  const sessionToken = req.session?.csrfToken;

  if (!requestToken || requestToken !== sessionToken) {
    return res.status(403).json({
      code: 403,
      message: 'CSRF token validation failed',
    });
  }

  next();
};

/**
 * 生成 CSRF Token
 */
export function generateCSRFToken(): string {
  return (
    Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15) +
    Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 15)
  );
}

/**
 * SameSite Cookie 配置
 */
export const COOKIE_OPTIONS = {
  // 生产环境使用 'strict'，开发环境使用 'lax'
  sameSite: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production' ? 'strict' : 'lax',
  // 安全标志（仅 HTTPS）
  secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
  // HttpOnly（防止 XSS 访问）
  httpOnly: true,
  // 路径
  path: '/',
  // 过期时间
  maxAge: 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // 24 小时
};

8.3 鉴权方案

// 安全防护 - 鉴权方案

/**
 * 认证服务
 */
class AuthService {
  private tokenKey = 'auth_token';
  private refreshTokenKey = 'refresh_token';
  private tokenExpireKey = 'token_expire';

  /**
   * 保存认证信息
   */
  saveAuth(auth: {
    token: string;
    refreshToken: string;
    expiresIn: number;
  }): void {
    const expireTime = Date.now() + auth.expiresIn * 1000;

    localStorage.setItem(this.tokenKey, auth.token);
    localStorage.setItem(this.refreshTokenKey, auth.refreshToken);
    localStorage.setItem(this.tokenExpireKey, expireTime.toString());

    // 设置 Token 过期前自动刷新
    this.scheduleTokenRefresh(auth.expiresIn);
  }

  /**
   * 获取访问 Token
   */
  getToken(): string | null {
    const token = localStorage.getItem(this.tokenKey);
    const expireTime = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(this.tokenExpireKey) || '0');

    // Token 即将过期，尝试刷新
    if (token && expireTime - Date.now() < 5 * 60 * 1000) {
      this.refreshToken();
    }

    return token;
  }

  /**
   * 获取刷新 Token
   */
  getRefreshToken(): string | null {
    return localStorage.getItem(this.refreshTokenKey);
  }

  /**
   * 检查是否已登录
   */
  isAuthenticated(): boolean {
    const token = this.getToken();
    const expireTime = parseInt(localStorage.getItem(this.tokenExpireKey) || '0');

    return !!token && expireTime > Date.now();
  }

  /**
   * 刷新 Token
   */
  async refreshToken(): Promise<boolean> {
    const refreshToken = this.getRefreshToken();
    if (!refreshToken) {
      this.logout();
      return false;
    }

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/auth/refresh', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ refreshToken }),
      });

      if (response.ok) {
        const auth = await response.json();
        this.saveAuth(auth);
        return true;
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Token refresh failed:', error);
    }

    this.logout();
    return false;
  }

  /**
   * 计划 Token 刷新
   */
  private scheduleTokenRefresh(expiresIn: number): void {
    // 在 Token 过期前 5 分钟刷新
    const refreshTime = expiresIn * 1000 - 5 * 60 * 1000;

    setTimeout(() => {
      this.refreshToken();
    }, Math.max(refreshTime, 0));
  }

  /**
   * 登出
   */
  logout(): void {
    localStorage.removeItem(this.tokenKey);
    localStorage.removeItem(this.refreshTokenKey);
    localStorage.removeItem(this.tokenExpireKey);

    // 跳转到登录页
    window.location.href = '/login';
  }
}

// 创建全局实例
export const authService = new AuthService();

/**
 * JWT Token 解析
 */
export function parseJWT(token: string): {
  payload: any;
  expired: boolean;
  expiresAt: Date | null;
} {
  try {
    const parts = token.split('.');
    if (parts.length !== 3) {
      throw new Error('Invalid token format');
    }

    const payload = JSON.parse(atob(parts[1]));
    const expiresAt = payload.exp ? new Date(payload.exp * 1000) : null;
    const expired = expiresAt ? expiresAt < new Date() : false;

    return { payload, expired, expiresAt };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to parse JWT:', error);
    return { payload: null, expired: true, expiresAt: null };
  }
}

/**
 * 权限检查工具
 */
export function hasPermission(
  userPermissions: string[],
  requiredPermissions: string[]
): boolean {
  if (!requiredPermissions || requiredPermissions.length === 0) {
    return true;
  }

  return requiredPermissions.every((perm) =>
    userPermissions.includes(perm)
  );
}

/**
 * 角色检查工具
 */
export function hasRole(
  userRoles: string[],
  requiredRoles: string[]
): boolean {
  if (!requiredRoles || requiredRoles.length === 0) {
    return true;
  }

  return requiredRoles.some((role) => userRoles.includes(role));
}

/**
 * 路由守卫 - React
 */
import { Navigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';

interface AuthGuardProps {
  children: React.ReactNode;
  requiredPermissions?: string[];
  requiredRoles?: string[];
}

export const AuthGuard: React.FC<AuthGuardProps> = ({
  children,
  requiredPermissions = [],
  requiredRoles = [],
}) => {
  const location = useLocation();

  // 检查登录状态
  if (!authService.isAuthenticated()) {
    return (
      <Navigate
        to="/login"
        state={{ from: location }}
        replace
      />
    );
  }

  // 检查权限（需要从 store 获取用户信息）
  const userPermissions: string[] = [];
  const userRoles: string[] = [];

  if (requiredRoles.length > 0 && !hasRole(userRoles, requiredRoles)) {
    return <Navigate to="/403" replace />;
  }

  if (
    requiredPermissions.length > 0 &&
    !hasPermission(userPermissions, requiredPermissions)
  ) {
    return <Navigate to="/403" replace />;
  }

  return <>{children}</>;
};

/**
 * 路由守卫 - Vue
 */
export function createAuthGuard(router: any) {
  router.beforeEach(async (to: any, from: any, next: any) => {
    // 页面标题
    document.title = to.meta?.title || '应用';

    // 检查登录状态
    if (!authService.isAuthenticated()) {
      // 免登录页面
      if (to.meta?.public) {
        return next();
      }
      return next({
        path: '/login',
        query: { redirect: to.fullPath },
      });
    }

    // 需要权限的页面
    if (to.meta?.permission) {
      const userPermissions: string[] = [];
      if (!hasPermission(userPermissions, to.meta.permission)) {
        return next({ path: '/403' });
      }
    }

    next();
  });
}

资料整理自 2025 拼多多、美团、快手真实场景面试。

文件路径: 前端面试题汇总\03-工程实战\3-4 AI与大模型实战.md

AI 与大模型实战 (2025 前端面试题汇总)

2024-2025年，前端开发者必须掌握的AI技能树全解析。随着生成式AI的爆发式发展，AI已经从「工具」变成了「第二大脑」。本章节将从AI基础概念、前端AI应用、AI辅助开发三个维度，带你系统掌握前端工程师所需的AI技能。

重点考察方向: Prompt工程、LLM API调用、Server-Sent Events (SSE) 流式输出、WebGPU/WebAssembly本地AI推理、RAG检索增强生成等

更新时间: 2026-02-24

第一部分：AI 基础概念

1.1 机器学习基础

1.1.1 机器学习定义与分类

什么是机器学习？

机器学习（Machine Learning，ML）是人工智能的一个分支，它使计算机系统能够从数据中学习并改进性能，而无需被明确编程。机器学习的核心思想是通过算法让计算机从大量数据中发现规律、提取特征，并利用这些规律进行预测或决策。

机器学习的三大类型：

  1. 监督学习（Supervised Learning）

    • 定义：在有标签的数据集上进行训练，学习输入到输出的映射关系
    • 典型应用：分类、回归、目标检测
    • 常用算法：线性回归、逻辑回归、决策树、随机森林、支持向量机、神经网络
    • 示例场景：邮件spam分类、房价预测、图像识别

  2. 无监督学习（Unsupervised Learning）

    • 定义：在无标签的数据集上训练，发现数据的内在结构和模式
    • 典型应用：聚类、降维、异常检测
    • 常用算法：K-means聚类、主成分分析（PCA）、自编码器
    • 示例场景：用户分群、推荐系统、异常交易检测

  3. 强化学习（Reinforcement Learning）

    • 定义：通过与环境交互，学习最优策略以最大化奖励
    • 典型应用：游戏AI、机器人控制、自动驾驶
    • 常用算法：Q-learning、Deep Q Network (DQN)、Policy Gradient、Actor-Critic
    • 示例场景：AlphaGo、机器人路径规划、动态定价

机器学习工作流程：

# 机器学习典型工作流程（Python示例）
import numpy as np
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
from sklearn.metrics import mean_squared_error, r2_score

# 1. 数据收集
data = np.loadtxt('housing_data.txt')

# 2. 数据预处理
X = data[:, :-1]  # 特征
y = data[:, -1]   # 目标变量

# 处理缺失值
X = np.nan_to_num(X, nan=np.nanmean(X))

# 特征标准化
scaler = StandardScaler()
X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X)

# 3. 数据划分
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X_scaled, y, test_size=0.2, random_state=42
)

# 4. 模型选择与训练
model = LinearRegression()
model.fit(X_train, y_train)

# 5. 模型评估
y_pred = model.predict(X_test)
mse = mean_squared_error(y_test, y_pred)
r2 = r2_score(y_test, y_pred)

print(f"均方误差 (MSE): {mse:.4f}")
