    debugging: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个专业的调试专家，擅长找出并修复代码中的问题。`,

        template: `我遇到了以下{{language}}代码问题:

错误信息:
{{errorMessage}}

代码:
\`\`\`{{language}}
{{code}}
\`\`\`

请帮我:
1. 分析错误原因
2. 定位问题所在
3. 提供修复方案
4. 解释修复原理`
    },

    // 4. 技术解释
    technicalExplanation: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个技术专家，擅长用通俗易懂的方式解释复杂的技术概念。`,

        template: `请用{{style}}风格解释以下技术概念:

概念: {{concept}}

要求:
- {{style === 'simple' ? '通俗易懂，适合初学者' : ''}}
- {{style === 'technical' ? '专业详细，包含技术细节' : ''}}
- {{style === 'analogy' ? '使用类比，帮助理解' : ''}}
- 包含代码示例
- 包含实际应用场景`
    },

    // 5. 架构设计
    architecture: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个系统架构专家，擅长设计可扩展、高性能的系统架构。`,

        template: `请设计一个{{systemType}}系统:

需求:
{{requirements}}

约束条件:
- 规模: {{scale}}
- 技术栈: {{techStack}}
- 预算: {{budget}}

请提供:
1. 系统架构图（文字描述）
2. 核心组件设计
3. 数据模型设计
4. 技术选型理由
5. 性能优化方案
6. 扩展性考虑`
    },

    // 6. 数据处理
    dataProcessing: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个数据处理专家，擅长编写高效的数据处理逻辑。`,

        template: `请帮我处理以下数据:

输入数据:
\`\`\`
{{inputData}}
\`\`\`

期望输出:
\`\`\`
{{outputFormat}}
\`\`\`

请用{{language}}实现数据转换逻辑，{{tool ? '可以使用' + tool : ''}`
    },

    // 7. SQL查询
    sqlQuery: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个SQL专家，擅长编写高效的数据库查询。`,

        template: `请帮我编写SQL查询:

数据库: {{databaseType}}
表结构:
{{schema}}

需求: {{requirement}}

请:
1. 编写SQL
2. 解释查询逻辑
3. 建议索引优化`
    },

    // 8. 正则表达式
    regex: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个正则表达式专家。`,

        template: `请生成一个正则表达式:

用途: {{purpose}}

匹配示例:
{{positiveExamples}}

不匹配示例:
{{negativeExamples}}

请:
1. 给出正则表达式
2. 解释各部分含义
3. 提供各语言的用法示例`
    },

    // 9. API设计
    apiDesign: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个API设计专家，擅长设计RESTful风格的API。`,

        template: `请设计一个{{apiType}}的REST API:

功能需求:
{{requirements}}

请提供:
1. API端点设计
2. 请求/响应格式
3. 错误处理方案
4. 认证授权方案
5. 使用示例`
    },

    // 10. AI Prompt优化
    promptOptimization: {
        systemPrompt: `你是一个Prompt工程专家，擅长优化AI提示词。`,

        template: `请优化以下Prompt，使其更加清晰、有效:

原始Prompt:
{{originalPrompt}}

请:
1. 分析当前Prompt的问题
2. 优化后的Prompt
3. 优化建议`
    }
};

// Prompt生成器工厂
class PromptGenerator {
    static create(scenario, variables) {
        const template = BestPractices[scenario];
        if (!template) throw new Error(`Unknown scenario: ${scenario}`);

        let prompt = template.template;

        // 替换变量
        for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(variables)) {
            prompt = prompt.replace(new RegExp(`{{${key}}}`, 'g'), value);
        }

        return {
            systemPrompt: template.systemPrompt,
            userPrompt: prompt,
            fullPrompt: template.systemPrompt + '\n\n' + prompt
        };
    }
}

// 使用示例
const codeGenPrompt = PromptGenerator.create('codeGeneration', {
    language: 'JavaScript',
    requirement: '实现一个防抖函数',
    testingFramework: 'Jest'
});

console.log('系统提示:', codeGenPrompt.systemPrompt);
console.log('\n用户提示:', codeGenPrompt.userPrompt);

2.3 API调用

2.3.1 API Key与认证

// API Key管理与认证

class APIKeyManager {
    constructor() {
        this.keys = {
            openai: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY,
            anthropic: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY,
            deepseek: process.env.DEEPSEEK_API_KEY,
            qwen: process.env.QWEN_API_KEY
        };

        this.keyRotation = {
            openai: [],
            anthropic: []
        };
    }

    // 密钥加密存储（示例）
    static encrypt(key) {
        // 实际应使用 crypto 模块进行加密
        return Buffer.from(key).toString('base64');
    }

    static decrypt(encrypted) {
        return Buffer.from(encrypted, 'base64').toString('utf-8');
    }

    // 获取密钥
    getKey(provider) {
        const key = this.keys[provider];

        if (!key) {
            throw new Error(`API key not found for provider: ${provider}`);
        }

        return key;
    }

    // 密钥轮换
    rotateKey(provider, newKeys) {
        this.keyRotation[provider] = newKeys;
    }

    getNextKey(provider) {
        const keys = this.keyRotation[provider];
        if (!keys || keys.length === 0) {
            return this.getKey(provider);
        }

        // 简单轮换：每次取下一个
        const key = keys.shift();
        keys.push(key);
        return key;
    }

    // 验证密钥有效性
    async validateKey(provider, key) {
        const validators = {
            openai: async () => {
                const response = await fetch('https://api.openai.com/v1/models', {
                    headers: { 'Authorization': `Bearer ${key}` }
                });
                return response.ok;
            },
            anthropic: async () => {
                const response = await fetch('https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', {
                    method: 'POST',
                    headers: {
                        'x-api-key': key,
                        'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01'
                    },
                    body: JSON.stringify({
                        model: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307',
                        max_tokens: 1,
                        messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'hi' }]
                    })
                });
                return response.status !== 401;
            }
        };

        const validator = validators[provider];
        if (!validator) return true;

        return validator(key);
    }
}

// 环境变量配置
const ENV_CONFIG = `
# OpenAI
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-xxxxx
OPENAI_ORG_ID=org-xxxxx

# Anthropic
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-xxxxx

# DeepSeek
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=sk-xxxxx

# 阿里云 DashScope (Qwen)
DASHSCOPE_API_KEY=sk-xxxxx

# Google Gemini
GEMINI_API_KEY=AIzaSyxxxxx

# 本地模型 (Ollama)
OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434

# 环境配置
NODE_ENV=development
LOG_LEVEL=info
`;

// 安全的API调用包装器
class SecureAPICall {
    constructor(keyManager) {
        this.keyManager = keyManager;
        this.rateLimiter = new RateLimiter();
    }

    async call(provider, options) {
        // 检查速率限制
        await this.rateLimiter.check(provider);

        // 获取API密钥
        const apiKey = this.keyManager.getKey(provider);

        // 添加重试逻辑
        const maxRetries = 3;
        let lastError;

        for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {
            try {
                return await this.makeRequest(provider, apiKey, options);
            } catch (error) {
                lastError = error;

                // 如果是认证错误，不重试
                if (error.status === 401 || error.status === 403) {
                    throw error;
                }

                // 指数退避
                if (i < maxRetries - 1) {
                    await this.sleep(Math.pow(2, i) * 1000);
                }
            }
        }

        throw lastError;
    }

    async makeRequest(provider, apiKey, options) {
        const endpoints = {
            openai: 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions',
            anthropic: 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages',
            deepseek: 'https://api.deepseek.com/v1/chat/completions'
        };

        const headers = this.buildHeaders(provider, apiKey);
        const body = this.buildBody(provider, options);

        const response = await fetch(endpoints[provider], {
            method: 'POST',
            headers,
            body: JSON.stringify(body)
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
            const error = await response.json();
            throw {
                status: response.status,
                message: error.error?.message || 'API request failed',
                provider
            };
        }

        return response.json();
    }

    buildHeaders(provider, apiKey) {
        const headers = {
            'Content-Type': 'application/json'
        };

        switch (provider) {
            case 'openai':
            case 'deepseek':
                headers['Authorization'] = `Bearer ${apiKey}`;
                break;
            case 'anthropic':
                headers['x-api-key'] = apiKey;
                headers['anthropic-version'] = '2023-06-01';
                break;
        }

        return headers;
    }

    buildBody(provider, options) {
        const { messages, model, temperature, maxTokens, stream } = options;

        switch (provider) {
            case 'openai':
            case 'deepseek':
                return { model, messages, temperature, max_tokens: maxTokens, stream };
            case 'anthropic':
                return {
                    model,
                    messages,
                    max_tokens: maxTokens,
                    temperature
                };
            default:
                return { model, messages, temperature, max_tokens: maxTokens };
        }
    }

    sleep(ms) {
        return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
    }
}

// 速率限制器
class RateLimiter {
    constructor() {
        this.limits = {
            openai: { rpm: 500, rpd: 1000000 },      // 每分钟500次，每天100万
            anthropic: { rpm: 50, rpd: 100000 },
            deepseek: { rpm: 120, rpd: 100000 }
        };

        this.requests = {
            openai: { minute: [], day: [] },
            anthropic: { minute: [], day: [] },
            deepseek: { minute: [], day: [] }
        };
    }

    async check(provider) {
        const now = Date.now();
        const limits = this.limits[provider];
        const requests = this.requests[provider];

        // 清理过期请求记录
        const minuteAgo = now - 60000;
        const dayAgo = now - 86400000;

        requests.minute = requests.minute.filter(t => t > minuteAgo);
        requests.day = requests.day.filter(t => t > dayAgo);

        // 检查限制
        if (requests.minute.length >= limits.rpm) {
            throw new Error(`Rate limit exceeded. Please wait ${(requests.minute[0] - minuteAgo) / 1000} seconds`);
        }

        if (requests.day.length >= limits.rpd) {
            throw new Error('Daily rate limit exceeded');
        }

        // 记录请求
        requests.minute.push(now);
        requests.day.push(now);
    }
}

2.3.2 错误处理与重试

// 错误处理与重试机制

class RetryableError extends Error {
    constructor(message, status, code, retryable = false) {
        super(message);
        this.name = 'RetryableError';
        this.status = status;
        this.code = code;
        this.retryable = retryable;
    }
}

// 错误分类
const ErrorClassifier = {
    // 可重试的错误
    isRetryable: (error) => {
        const retryableStatuses = [408, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504];
        return retryableStatuses.includes(error.status) || error.retryable;
    },

    // 认证错误（不可重试）
    isAuthError: (error) => {
        return error.status === 401 || error.status === 403;
    },

    // 速率限制错误
    isRateLimitError: (error) => {
        return error.status === 429;
    },

    // 解析错误
    isParseError: (error) => {
        return error.name === 'SyntaxError' || error.message.includes('JSON');
    }
};

// 智能重试处理器
class RetryHandler {
    constructor(options = {}) {
        this.maxRetries = options.maxRetries || 3;
        this.baseDelay = options.baseDelay || 1000;
        this.maxDelay = options.maxDelay || 30000;
        this.exponentialBase = options.exponentialBase || 2;
        this.jitter = options.jitter !== false;
    }

    async execute(fn, context = '') {
        let lastError;

        for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= this.maxRetries; attempt++) {
            try {
                return await fn();
            } catch (error) {
                lastError = error;

                console.log(`Attempt ${attempt + 1} failed:`, error.message);

                // 不重试的情况
                if (!this.shouldRetry(error, attempt)) {
                    console.log('Not retrying - non-retryable error');
                    throw error;
                }

                // 计算延迟
                const delay = this.calculateDelay(attempt);
                console.log(`Retrying in ${delay}ms...`);

                await this.sleep(delay);
            }
        }

        throw lastError;
    }

    shouldRetry(error, attempt) {
        if (attempt >= this.maxRetries) return false;
        if (!ErrorClassifier.isRetryable(error)) return false;
        if (ErrorClassifier.isAuthError(error)) return false;
        return true;
    }

    calculateDelay(attempt) {
        // 指数退避
        let delay = this.baseDelay * Math.pow(this.exponentialBase, attempt);

        // 添加随机抖动
        if (this.jitter) {
            delay = delay * (0.5 + Math.random() * 0.5);
        }

        // 不超过最大延迟
        return Math.min(delay, this.maxDelay);
    }

    sleep(ms) {
        return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
    }
}

// API错误处理包装器
class APIErrorHandler {
    static handleResponse(response, options = {}) {
        const { onError, onRateLimit } = options;

        if (!response.ok) {
            return response.json().then(errorData => {
                const error = new RetryableError(
                    errorData.error?.message || `HTTP ${response.status}`,
                    response.status,
                    errorData.error?.code,
                    ErrorClassifier.isRetryable({ status: response.status })
                );

                // 特殊处理速率限制
                if (response.status === 429) {
                    const retryAfter = response.headers.get('Retry-After');
                    error.retryAfter = retryAfter ? parseInt(retryAfter) : null;

                    onRateLimit?.(error);
                }

                onError?.(error);
                throw error;
            });
        }

        return response.json();
    }

    static handleStream(response, onChunk, onError) {
        const reader = response.body.getReader();
        const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8');
        let buffer = '';

        const processStream = async () => {
            try {
                while (true) {
                    const { done, value } = await reader.read();

                    if (done) {
                        // 处理剩余数据
                        if (buffer) {
                            this.parseSSEChunk(buffer, onChunk);
                        }
                        break;
                    }

                    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
                    const lines = buffer.split('\n');
                    buffer = lines.pop() || '';

                    for (const line of lines) {
                        if (line.startsWith('data: ')) {
                            this.parseSSEChunk(line, onChunk);
                        }
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                onError?.(error);
            }
        };

        return processStream();
    }

    static parseSSEChunk(line, onChunk) {
        const data = line.slice(6).trim();

        if (data === '[DONE]') return;

        try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(data);
            onChunk(parsed);
        } catch (e) {
            // 忽略解析错误
        }
    }
}

// 完整的API客户端（含错误处理）
class RobustAPIClient {
    constructor(config) {
        this.config = config;
        this.retryHandler = new RetryHandler(config.retry);
        this.errorHandler = new APIErrorHandler();
    }

    async request(options) {
        const { provider, method, endpoint, body, headers } = options;

        return this.retryHandler.execute(async () => {
            const url = this.getEndpoint(provider, endpoint);

            const response = await fetch(url, {
                method,
                headers: {
                    ...this.getAuthHeaders(provider),
                    ...headers
                },
                body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : null
            });

            return this.errorHandler.handleResponse(response, {
                onError: (error) => this.logError(error, options),
                onRateLimit: (error) => this.handleRateLimit(error)
            });
        }, `${provider}:${method}:${endpoint}`);
    }

    async streamRequest(options) {
        const { provider, endpoint, body } = options;

        const url = this.getEndpoint(provider, endpoint);
        const response = await fetch(url, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                ...this.getAuthHeaders(provider),
                'Content-Type': 'application/json'
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({ ...body, stream: true })
        });

        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            this.errorHandler.handleStream(
                response,
                (chunk) => resolve(chunk),
                (error) => reject(error)
            );
        });
    }

    getEndpoint(provider, endpoint) {
        const bases = {
            openai: 'https://api.openai.com/v1',
            anthropic: 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1',
            deepseek: 'https://api.deepseek.com/v1'
        };

        return `${bases[provider]}${endpoint}`;
    }

    getAuthHeaders(provider) {
        // 实现认证头获取
        return {};
    }

    logError(error, options) {
        console.error('API Error:', {
            provider: options.provider,
            endpoint: options.endpoint,
            status: error.status,
            message: error.message
        });
    }

    handleRateLimit(error) {
        if (error.retryAfter) {
            console.log(`Rate limited. Retry after ${error.retryAfter} seconds`);
        }
    }
}

2.3.3 请求优化与缓存

// 请求优化与缓存策略

// 请求缓存
class RequestCache {
    constructor(options = {}) {
        this.maxSize = options.maxSize || 100;
        this.ttl = options.ttl || 3600000; // 1小时
        this.cache = new Map();
    }

    get(key) {
        const entry = this.cache.get(key);

        if (!entry) return null;

        // 检查过期
        if (Date.now() - entry.timestamp > this.ttl) {
            this.cache.delete(key);
            return null;
        }

        // 更新访问时间
        entry.lastAccessed = Date.now();
        entry.accessCount++;

        return entry.value;
    }

    set(key, value) {
        // 清理过期项
        this.cleanup();

        // 检查大小限制
        if (this.cache.size >= this.maxSize) {
            this.evict();
        }

        this.cache.set(key, {
            value,
            timestamp: Date.now(),
            lastAccessed: Date.now(),
            accessCount: 0
        });
    }

    cleanup() {
        const now = Date.now();

        for (const [key, entry] of this.cache) {
            if (now - entry.timestamp > this.ttl) {
                this.cache.delete(key);
            }
        }
    }

    evict() {
        // LRU: 删除最少使用的项
        let minAccess = Infinity;
        let minKey = null;

        for (const [key, entry] of this.cache) {
            if (entry.accessCount < minAccess) {
                minAccess = entry.accessCount;
                minKey = key;
            }
        }

        if (minKey) {
            this.cache.delete(minKey);
        }
    }

    clear() {
        this.cache.clear();
    }
}

// 响应缓存（支持语义匹配）
class SemanticCache {
    constructor(embeddingsAPI) {
        this.embeddingsAPI = embeddingsAPI;
        this.cache = new Map();
        this.similarityThreshold = 0.95;
    }

    async get(prompt, embedding) {
        const cached = this.cache.get(this.hashPrompt(prompt));

        if (!cached) return null;

        // 简化：使用向量相似度
        const similarity = this.cosineSimilarity(embedding, cached.embedding);

        if (similarity >= this.similarityThreshold) {
            return cached.response;
        }

        return null;
    }

    async set(prompt, embedding, response) {
        const key = this.hashPrompt(prompt);

        this.cache.set(key, {
            embedding,
            response,
            timestamp: Date.now()
        });
    }

    hashPrompt(prompt) {
        // 简化hash
        return prompt.slice(0, 50);
    }

    cosineSimilarity(a, b) {
        const dotProduct = a.reduce((sum, v, i) => sum + v * b[i], 0);
        const normA = Math.sqrt(a.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v * v, 0));
        const normB = Math.sqrt(b.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v * v, 0));

        return dotProduct / (normA * normB);
    }
}

// 请求批处理
class RequestBatcher {
    constructor(options = {}) {
        this.maxBatchSize = options.maxBatchSize || 10;
        this.maxWaitTime = options.maxWaitTime || 100; // ms
        this.queue = [];
        this.processing = false;
    }

    add(request) {
        return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
            this.queue.push({ request, resolve, reject });

            if (this.queue.length >= this.maxBatchSize) {
                this.process();
            } else if (!this.processing) {
                this.processing = true;
                setTimeout(() => this.process(), this.maxWaitTime);
            }
        });
    }

    async process() {
        if (this.queue.length === 0) {
            this.processing = false;
            return;
        }

        const batch = this.queue.splice(0, this.maxBatchSize);

        try {
            const results = await this.batchExecute(batch.map(b => b.request));

            batch.forEach((item, i) => {
                item.resolve(results[i]);
            });
        } catch (error) {
            batch.forEach(item => item.reject(error));
        }

        if (this.queue.length > 0) {
            this.process();
        } else {
            this.processing = false;
        }
    }

    async batchExecute(requests) {
        // 实际批处理实现
        // 对于LLM API，通常需要分别调用
        return requests;
    }
}

// 请求压缩
class RequestCompressor {
    static compress(messages) {
        // 移除冗余信息
        return messages.map(msg => ({
            role: msg.role,
            content: this.compressContent(msg.content)
        }));
    }

    static compressContent(content) {
        if (typeof content !== 'string') return content;

        // 移除多余空白
        let compressed = content.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

        // 压缩代码块
        compressed = compressed.replace(/```[\s\S]*?```/g, (match) => {
            // 保留代码结构，移除注释
            return match.replace(/(?<=\n)\s*#.*$/gm, '');
        });

        return compressed;
    }

    static estimateTokens(text) {
        // 粗略估算
        return Math.ceil(text.length / 4);
    }
}

// 完整优化版API客户端
class OptimizedAPIClient {
    constructor(config) {
        this.baseClient = new RobustAPIClient(config);
        this.cache = new RequestCache({ maxSize: 200, ttl: 3600000 });
        this.batcher = new RequestBatcher({ maxBatchSize: 5, maxWaitTime: 50 });
    }

    async chat(messages, options = {}) {
        const { useCache = true, useBatching = false } = options;

        // 生成缓存key
        const cacheKey = this.generateCacheKey(messages, options);

        // 尝试缓存
        if (useCache) {
            const cached = this.cache.get(cacheKey);
            if (cached) {
                console.log('Cache hit!');
                return cached;
            }
        }

        let result;

        if (useBatching) {
            result = await this.batcher.add({ messages, options });
        } else {
            result = await this.baseClient.request({
                provider: options.provider || 'openai',
                method: 'POST',
                endpoint: '/chat/completions',
                body: {
                    model: options.model || 'gpt-4',
                    messages,
                    temperature: options.temperature,
                    max_tokens: options.maxTokens
                }
            });
        }

        // 缓存结果
        if (useCache) {
            this.cache.set(cacheKey, result);
        }

        return result;
    }

    generateCacheKey(messages, options) {
        const content = messages.map(m => m.content).join('|');
        const optionsKey = JSON.stringify(options);
        return `${content}|${optionsKey}`;
    }
}

第三部分：AI辅助开发

3.1 代码生成

3.1.1 AI代码生成工具

// AI代码生成工具集成

class AICodeGenerator {
    constructor(client) {
        this.client = client;
    }

    /**
     * 根据描述生成代码
     */
    async generateCode(description, language, options = {}) {
        const prompt = this.buildCodeGenPrompt(description, language, options);

        const response = await this.client.chat([
            { role: 'system', content: this.getSystemPrompt(language) },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ], {
            temperature: options.temperature || 0.2,
            maxTokens: options.maxTokens || 4000
        });

        return this.extractCode(response.content, language);
    }

    /**
     * 根据测试用例生成代码
     */
    async generateFromTests(tests, language) {
        const prompt = `
请根据以下测试用例实现代码:

测试用例:
${tests}

要求:
1. 实现使所有测试通过的代码
2. 代码简洁高效
3. 遵循${language}最佳实践

请只返回代码，不要包含解释。`;

        return this.generateCode(prompt, language);
    }

    /**
     * 根据注释生成代码
     */
    async generateFromComments(comments, language) {
        const prompt = `
请根据以下注释实现代码:

${comments}

请只返回代码。`;

        return this.generateCode(prompt, language);
    }

    buildCodeGenPrompt(description, language, options) {
        let prompt = `请用${language}实现以下功能:\n\n${description}\n\n`;

        if (options.requirements) {
            prompt += `\n要求:\n`;
            options.requirements.forEach(req => {
                prompt += `- ${req}\n`;
            });
        }

        if (options.framework) {
            prompt += `\n使用框架: ${options.framework}\n`;
        }

        return prompt;
    }

    getSystemPrompt(language) {
        const prompts = {
            javascript: '你是一个JavaScript专家，擅长编写现代ES6+代码，遵循最佳实践。',
            typescript: '你是一个TypeScript专家，擅长类型系统设计和类型安全的代码实现。',
            python: '你是一个Python专家，擅长编写清晰、Pythonic的代码。',
            java: '你是一个Java专家，擅长编写面向对象、高性能的代码。',
            go: '你是一个Go语言专家，擅长编写简洁高效的Go代码。',
            rust: '你是一个Rust专家，擅长内存安全和并发安全的代码实现。'
        };

        return prompts[language] || '你是一个专业的程序员。';
    }

    extractCode(content, language) {
        // 提取代码块
        const codeBlockRegex = new RegExp(`\`\`\`${language}[\\s\\S]*?\`\`\``, 'gi');
        const match = content.match(codeBlockRegex);

        if (match) {
            // 移除语言标记和代码块标记
            return match[0]
                .replace(new RegExp(`\`\`\`${language}`, 'i'), '')
                .replace('```', '')
                .trim();
        }

        // 如果没有代码块，尝试提取整个响应
        return content;
    }
}

// VS Code 插件集成
class VSCodeIntegration {
    static generateInline(context) {
        // 获取当前编辑器上下文
        const document = context.document;
        const selection = context.selection;
        const text = document.getText(selection);

        return {
            language: document.languageId,
            text: text,
            cursorPosition: selection.end
        };
    }

    static async generateFromContext(editorContext) {
        // 分析代码上下文
        const analysis = {
            language: editorContext.language,
            currentFile: editorContext.fileName,
            imports: this.extractImports(editorContext.text),
            nearbyCode: this.getNearbyCode(editorContext.text, editorContext.cursorPosition),
            projectContext: await this.getProjectContext()
        };

        return analysis;
    }

    static extractImports(code) {
        const importRegex = /(?:import|require|from)\s+['"]([^'"]+)['"]/g;
        const imports = [];

        let match;
        while ((match = importRegex.exec(code)) !== null) {
            imports.push(match[1]);
        }

        return imports;
    }

    static getNearbyCode(code, position, range = 200) {
        const start = Math.max(0, position - range);
        const end = Math.min(code.length, position + range);

        return code.slice(start, end);
    }

    static async getProjectContext() {
        // 获取项目配置、依赖等信息
        return {
            framework: 'react',
            typescript: true,
            testing: 'jest'
        };
    }
}

3.1.2 代码补全与智能提示

// 智能代码补全系统

class CodeCompleter {
    constructor(llmClient, languageServer) {
        this.llmClient = llmClient;
        this.languageServer = languageServer;
        this.cache = new Map();
    }

    /**
     * 异步补全建议
     */
    async getCompletions(context) {
        // 获取语言服务器的补全建议
        const languageCompletions = await this.languageServer.getCompletions(context);

        // 获取AI补全建议
        const aiCompletions = await this.getAICompletions(context);

        // 合并并排序
        return this.mergeCompletions(languageCompletions, aiCompletions);
    }

    /**
     * AI驱动的代码补全
     */
    async getAICompletions(context) {
        const { prefix, suffix, language, fileName } = context;

        // 构建prompt
        const prompt = this.buildCompletionPrompt(prefix, suffix, language);

        try {
            const response = await this.llmClient.chat([
                {
                    role: 'system',
                    content: `你是一个${language}代码补全助手。根据上下文，生成可能的代码补全建议。`
                },
                { role: 'user', content: prompt }
            ], {
                temperature: 0.3,
                maxTokens: 500
            });

            return this.parseCompletionResponse(response.content, context);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('AI completion error:', error);
            return [];
        }
    }

    buildCompletionPrompt(prefix, suffix, language) {
        return `
请根据以下代码上下文，生成可能的代码补全（只返回代码，不需要解释）:

代码前缀:
\`\`\`${language}
${prefix}
\`\`\`

代码后缀:
\`\`\`${language}
${suffix}
\`\`\`

请生成3-5个可能的补全选项，用---分隔:`;
    }

    parseCompletionResponse(response, context) {
        const completions = response.split('---').map((completion, index) => ({
            label: `AI Suggestion ${index + 1}`,
            kind: 'text',
            insertText: completion.trim(),
            detail: 'AI Generated',
            priority: 5 - index,  // 优先级递减
            source: 'ai'
        }));

        return completions;
    }

    mergeCompletions(languageCompletions, aiCompletions) {
        // 根据优先级排序
        const all = [...languageCompletions, ...aiCompletions];

        // 去除重复
        const seen = new Set();
        const unique = all.filter(c => {
            const key = c.insertText;
            if (seen.has(key)) return false;
            seen.add(key);
            return true;
        });

        // 按优先级排序
        return unique.sort((a, b) => (b.priority || 0) - (a.priority || 0));
    }

    /**
     * 学习用户代码风格
     */
    learnFromCode(code) {
        // 分析代码风格特征
        const features = {
            braceStyle: this.detectBraceStyle(code),
            namingConvention: this.detectNamingConvention(code),
            commonPatterns: this.detectCommonPatterns(code)
        };

        this.styleProfile = features;
        return features;
    }

    detectBraceStyle(code) {
        if (code.includes('}\n}')) return 'allman';
        return '1tbs';
    }

    detectNamingConvention(code) {
        const camelCase = /[a-z]+[A-Z][a-z]+/;
        const snake_case = /[a-z]+_[a-z]+/;
        const kebab_case = /[a-z]+-[a-z]+/;

        if (camelCase.test(code)) return 'camelCase';
        if (snake_case.test(code)) return 'snake_case';
        if (kebab_case.test(code)) return 'kebab-case';
        return 'unknown';
    }

    detectCommonPatterns(code) {
        const patterns = [];

        // 检测常见模式
        if (code.includes('async') && code.includes('await')) {
            patterns.push('async-await');
        }

        if (code.includes('=>')) {
            patterns.push('arrow-functions');
        }

        if (code.includes('useState') || code.includes('useEffect')) {
            patterns.push('react-hooks');
        }

        return patterns;
    }
}

// 代码片段库
class SnippetLibrary {
    constructor() {
        this.snippets = new Map();
        this.loadDefaultSnippets();
    }

    loadDefaultSnippets() {
        const defaults = {
            javascript: [
                {
                    prefix: 'fn',
                    body: 'function ${1:name}(${2:args}) {\n\t${3:// body}\n}',
                    description: 'Function declaration'
                },
                {
                    prefix: 'af',
                    body: 'const ${1:name} = (${2:args}) => {\n\t${3:// body}\n}',
                    description: 'Arrow function'
                },
                {
                    prefix: 'async',
                    body: 'async function ${1:name}(${2:args}) {\n\t${3:// body}\n}',
                    description: 'Async function'
                },
                {
                    prefix: 'try',
                    body: 'try {\n\t${1:// code}\n} catch (error) {\n\t${2:// handle error}\n}',
                    description: 'Try-catch block'
                }
            ],
            react: [
                {
                    prefix: 'fc',
                    body: 'function ${1:Component}(${2:props}) {\n\treturn (\n\t\t<div>\n\t\t\t${3:// content}\n\t\t</div>\n\t);\n}',
                    description: 'React Functional Component'
                },
                {
                    prefix: 'hfc',
                    body: 'function ${1:Component}(${2:props}) {\n\tconst [${3:state}, set${4:State}] = useState(${5:initialValue});\n\n\treturn (\n\t\t<div>\n\t\t\t${6:// content}\n\t\t</div>\n\t);\n}\n\nexport default ${1:Component};',
                    description: 'React Functional Component with Hooks'
                },
                {
                    prefix: 'useEffect',
                    body: "useEffect(() => {\n\t${1:// effect}\n\treturn () => {\n\t\t${2:// cleanup}\n\t};\n}, [${3:deps}]);",
                    description: 'useEffect hook'
                }
            ],
            typescript: [
                {
                    prefix: 'interface',
                    body: 'interface ${1:Name} {\n\t${2:property}: ${3:type};\n}',
                    description: 'TypeScript interface'
                },
                {
                    prefix: 'type',
                    body: 'type ${1:Name} = {\n\t${2:property}: ${3:type};\n};',
                    description: 'TypeScript type'
                }
            ]
        };

        for (const [language, langSnippets] of Object.entries(defaults)) {
            this.snippets.set(language, langSnippets);
        }
    }

    getSnippets(language) {
        return this.snippets.get(language) || [];
    }

    searchSnippets(query, language) {
        const snippets = this.getSnippets(language);
        return snippets.filter(s =>
            s.prefix.includes(query) ||
            s.description.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase())
        );
    }

    addSnippet(language, snippet) {
        const snippets = this.snippets.get(language) || [];
        snippets.push(snippet);
        this.snippets.set(language, snippets);
    }
}

3.2 智能助手

3.2.1 AI编程助手

// AI编程助手

class AIProgrammingAssistant {
    constructor(client) {
        this.client = client;
        this.context = {
            currentFile: null,
            projectStructure: null,
            recentChanges: [],
            language: 'javascript'
        };
    }

    /**
     * 解释代码
     */
    async explainCode(code, options = {}) {
        const prompt = options.explainLevel === 'simple'
            ? `用通俗易懂的方式解释以下代码，不需要技术细节:`
            : `详细解释以下代码，包括技术细节:`;

        const response = await this.client.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: '你是一个代码解释专家，擅长用清晰的方式解释复杂的代码。'
            },
            {
                role: 'user',
                content: `${prompt}\n\n\`\`\`${this.context.language}\n${code}\n\`\`\``
            }]
        );

        return {
            explanation: response.content,
            keyPoints: this.extractKeyPoints(response.content),
            relatedConcepts: await this.findRelatedConcepts(code)
        };
    }

    /**
     * 重构代码
     */
    async refactorCode(code, goal) {
        const prompts = {
            readability: '重构以下代码，提高可读性，保持功能不变:',
            performance: '重构以下代码，优化性能:',
            maintainability: '重构以下代码，提高可维护性:',
            modern: '将以下代码改写为现代写法:',
            modular: '重构以下代码，提高模块化程度:'
        };

        const response = await this.client.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: '你是一个代码重构专家，擅长改进代码质量。'
            },
            {
                role: 'user',
                content: `${prompts[goal] || prompts.readability}\n\n\`\`\`${this.context.language}\n${code}\n\`\`\``
            }]
        );

        return {
            original: code,
            refactored: this.extractCode(response.content),
            changes: this.compareCode(code, this.extractCode(response.content))
        };
    }

    /**
     * 查找并修复bug
     */
    async findAndFixBug(code, errorMessage = null) {
        let prompt = `请分析并修复以下代码中的bug:\n\n\`\`\`${this.context.language}\n${code}\n\`\`\``;

        if (errorMessage) {
            prompt = `代码运行时报错:\n${errorMessage}\n\n请分析原因并修复:\n\n\`\`\`${this.context.language}\n${code}\n\`\`\``;
        }

        const response = await this.client.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: '你是一个调试专家，擅长找出并修复代码中的bug。'
            },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ]);

        return {
            analysis: this.extractAnalysis(response.content),
            fixedCode: this.extractCode(response.content),
            explanation: this.extractExplanation(response.content)
        };
    }

    /**
     * 生成测试
     */
    async generateTests(code, framework = 'jest') {
        const prompt = `
请为以下代码生成${framework}测试用例:

\`\`\`${this.context.language}
${code}
\`\`\`

要求:
1. 覆盖主要功能
2. 包含边界情况测试
3. 使用describe-it模式`;

        const response = await this.client.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: `你是一个测试工程师，擅长编写${framework}测试用例。`
            },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ]);

        return {
            tests: this.extractCode(response.content),
            coverage: this.estimateCoverage(code)
        };
    }

    /**
     * 生成文档
     */
    async generateDocs(code) {
        const prompt = `
请为以下代码生成文档:

\`\`\`${this.context.language}
${code}
\`\`\`

请包含:
1. 函数/类说明
2. 参数说明
3. 返回值说明
4. 使用示例`;

        const response = await this.client.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: '你是一个技术文档专家。'
            },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ]);

        return {
            docs: response.content,
            format: 'jsdoc'
        };
    }

    // 辅助方法
    extractCode(content) {
        const match = content.match(/```(?:\w+)?\n([\s\S]*?)```/);
        return match ? match[1].trim() : content;
    }

    extractKeyPoints(explanation) {
        // 提取关键点
        const lines = explanation.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim().startsWith('-') || l.trim().startsWith('*'));
        return lines.map(l => l.trim().replace(/^[-*]\s*/, ''));
    }

    extractAnalysis(content) {
        // 提取分析部分
        const sections = content.split(/##|###/);
        return sections.find(s => s.toLowerCase().includes('分析'))?.split('\n').filter(Boolean) || [];
    }

    extractExplanation(content) {
        // 提取解释部分
        const sections = content.split(/##|###/);
        return sections.find(s => s.toLowerCase().includes('解释') || s.toLowerCase().includes('原因'))?.split('\n').filter(Boolean) || [];
    }

    compareCode(original, refactored) {
        return {
            linesAdded: refactored.split('\n').length - original.split('\n').length,
            improvements: []
        };
    }

    estimateCoverage(code) {
        return {
            statements: '~80%',
            branches: '~60%',
            functions: '~90%'
        };
    }

    async findRelatedConcepts(code) {
        // 使用简单的关键词匹配
        const concepts = [];

        if (code.includes('async')) concepts.push('异步编程');
        if (code.includes('class')) concepts.push('面向对象');
        if (code.includes('=>')) concepts.push('函数式编程');

        return concepts;
    }
}

3.2.2 智能问答系统

// 智能技术问答系统

class TechQASystem {
    constructor(llmClient, knowledgeBase) {
        this.llmClient = llmClient;
        this.knowledgeBase = knowledgeBase;
    }

    /**
     * 回答技术问题
     */
    async answer(question, context = {}) {
        // 1. 搜索知识库
        const relevantDocs = await this.knowledgeBase.search(question);

        // 2. 构建上下文
        const systemPrompt = this.buildSystemPrompt(context);

        // 3. 调用LLM
        const response = await this.llmClient.chat([
            { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
            {
                role: 'user',
                content: this.buildQuestionPrompt(question, relevantDocs)
            }],
            {
                temperature: 0.5,
                maxTokens: 2000
            }
        );

        // 4. 处理响应
        return {
            answer: response.content,
            sources: relevantDocs.map(d => d.title),
            confidence: this.estimateConfidence(response.content)
        };
    }

    /**
     * 构建系统提示
     */
    buildSystemPrompt(context) {
        let prompt = '你是一个专业的技术问答助手。';

        if (context.language) {
            prompt += `请用${context.language}回答问题。`;
        }

        if (context.level) {
            const levels = {
                beginner: '请用通俗易懂的方式解释，适合初学者。',
                intermediate: '请给出详细的技术解释。',
                advanced: '请给出深入的技术细节和最佳实践。'
            };
            prompt += levels[context.level] || '';
        }

        return prompt;
    }

    /**
     * 构建问题提示
     */
    buildQuestionPrompt(question, relevantDocs) {
        let prompt = `问题: ${question}\n\n`;

        if (relevantDocs.length > 0) {
            prompt += '参考文档:\n';
            relevantDocs.forEach((doc, i) => {
                prompt += `[${i + 1}] ${doc.title}\n${doc.content.slice(0, 500)}\n\n`;
            });
            prompt += '\n';
        }

        prompt += '请根据以上参考文档回答问题。如果参考文档中没有相关信息，请基于你的知识回答。';

        return prompt;
    }

    estimateConfidence(answer) {
        // 简单估算置信度
        const length = answer.length;
        if (length < 50) return 'low';
        if (length < 200) return 'medium';
        return 'high';
    }
}

// 技术知识库
class KnowledgeBase {
    constructor() {
        this.documents = [];
        this.embeddings = null;
        this.loadDefaultDocs();
    }

    loadDefaultDocs() {
        // 加载默认文档（实际应用中从数据库或文件系统加载）
        this.documents = [
            {
                title: 'JavaScript async/await',
                content: 'async/await是ES2017引入的异步编程语法糖...',
                category: 'javascript'
            },
            {
                title: 'React Hooks',
                content: 'React Hooks是React 16.8引入的特性...',
                category: 'react'
            }
        ];
    }

    async search(query, topK = 5) {
        // 简化实现：关键词匹配
        const results = this.documents
            .map(doc => ({
                ...doc,
                score: this.calculateRelevance(doc, query)
            }))
            .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
            .slice(0, topK);

        return results;
    }

    calculateRelevance(doc, query) {
        const queryLower = query.toLowerCase();
        const contentLower = doc.content.toLowerCase();
        const titleLower = doc.title.toLowerCase();

        // 标题匹配权重更高
        let score = 0;

        // 标题包含关键词
        const queryWords = queryLower.split(' ');
        for (const word of queryWords) {
            if (titleLower.includes(word)) score += 10;
            if (contentLower.includes(word)) score += 1;
        }

        return score;
    }

    addDocument(doc) {
        this.documents.push(doc);
    }
}

3.3 自动化测试

3.3.1 AI生成测试用例

// AI测试生成器

class AITestGenerator {
    constructor(llmClient) {
        this.llmClient = llmClient;
    }

    /**
     * 为函数生成测试用例
     */
    async generateFunctionTests(code, framework = 'jest') {
        const prompt = `
请为以下函数生成${framework}测试用例:

\`\`\`javascript
${code}
\`\`\`

要求:
1. 使用describe-it模式
2. 覆盖正常情况
3. 覆盖边界情况
4. 包含边界值测试
5. 测试命名清晰`;

        const response = await this.llmClient.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: `你是一个测试工程师，擅长使用${framework}编写测试用例。`
            },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ]);

        return this.parseTestCode(response.content);
    }

    /**
     * 为React组件生成测试
     */
    async generateComponentTests(code, testingLib = '@testing-library/react') {
        const prompt = `
请为以下React组件生成${testingLib}测试用例:

\`\`\`jsx
${code}
\`\`\`

要求:
1. 测试组件渲染
2. 测试用户交互
3. 测试props传递
4. 测试状态变化
5. 使用screen和fireEvent API`;

        const response = await this.llmClient.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: '你是一个React测试专家。'
            },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ]);

        return this.parseTestCode(response.content);
    }

    /**
     * 为API生成集成测试
     */
    async generateAPIEndpointTests(endpoints, framework = 'supertest') {
        const tests = [];

        for (const endpoint of endpoints) {
            const test = await this.generateSingleAPIEndpointTest(endpoint, framework);
            tests.push(test);
        }

        return tests.join('\n\n');
    }

    async generateSingleAPIEndpointTest(endpoint, framework) {
        const prompt = `
请为以下API端点生成${framework}集成测试:

方法: ${endpoint.method}
路径: ${endpoint.path}
描述: ${endpoint.description}
请求参数: ${JSON.stringify(endpoint.parameters)}
响应: ${JSON.stringify(endpoint.responses)}

请生成测试用例覆盖:
1. 成功场景
2. 参数验证
3. 错误处理`;

        const response = await this.llmClient.chat([
            { role: 'system', content: `你是一个API测试专家，使用${framework}。` },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ]);

        return this.parseTestCode(response.content);
    }

    /**
     * 基于需求生成测试
     */
    async generateTestsFromRequirements(requirements, implementation) {
        const prompt = `
基于以下需求规格，生成测试用例:

需求:
${requirements}

实现代码:
\`\`\`javascript
${implementation}
\`\`\`

请:
1. 将需求转换为可测试的用例
2. 生成测试代码
3. 确保需求覆盖率达到100%`;

        const response = await this.llmClient.chat([
            { role: 'system', content: '你是一个测试工程师，擅长从需求生成测试用例。' },
            { role: 'user', content: prompt }
        ]);

        return this.parseTestCode(response.content);
    }

    parseTestCode(content) {
        // 提取代码块
        const match = content.match(/```(?:javascript|typescript|jsx|tsx)?\n([\s\S]*?)```/);
        return match ? match[1].trim() : content;
    }
}

// 测试覆盖率分析
class CoverageAnalyzer {
    /**
     * 分析测试覆盖率
     */
    analyze(code, tests) {
        return {
            statementCoverage: this.analyzeStatementCoverage(code, tests),
            branchCoverage: this.analyzeBranchCoverage(code, tests),
            functionCoverage: this.analyzeFunctionCoverage(code, tests),
            missingTests: this.findMissingTests(code, tests)
        };
    }

    analyzeStatementCoverage(code, tests) {
        // 简化实现
        const codeLines = code.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim() && !l.trim().startsWith('//'));
        const testCalls = tests.split('\n').filter(l => l.includes('expect') || l.includes('it('));

        return Math.min((testCalls.length / codeLines.length) * 100, 100).toFixed(1);
    }

    analyzeBranchCoverage(code, tests) {
        // 检测分支语句
        const branches = (code.match(/(?:if|else|switch|case|\?)/g) || []).length;
        const branchTests = (tests.match(/(?:toBeTruthy|toBeFalsy|toEqual|toContain)/g) || []).length;

        return Math.min((branchTests / branches) * 100, 100).toFixed(1);
    }

    analyzeFunctionCoverage(code, tests) {
        const functions = (code.match(/(?:function\s+\w+|\w+\s*=|=>\s*\{)/g) || []).length;
        const functionTests = (tests.match(/(?:describe|it|test)\(/g) || []).length;

        return Math.min((functionTests / functions) * 100, 100).toFixed(1);
    }

    findMissingTests(code, tests) {
        // 简单的缺失测试检测
        const missing = [];

        // 检测异常处理
        if (code.includes('throw') && !tests.includes('toThrow')) {
            missing.push('异常处理测试');
        }

        // 检测异步
        if (code.includes('async') && !tests.includes('async')) {
            missing.push('异步测试');
        }

        return missing;
    }
}

3.3.2 自动化代码审查

// AI代码审查系统

class AICodeReviewer {
    constructor(llmClient) {
        this.llmClient = llmClient;
    }

    /**
     * 全面代码审查
     */
    async review(code, language, options = {}) {
        const dimensions = options.dimensions || [
            'correctness',      // 正确性
            'performance',      // 性能
            'security',         // 安全性
            'maintainability',  // 可维护性
            'bestPractices'     // 最佳实践
        ];

        const results = await Promise.all(
            dimensions.map(dim => this.reviewDimension(code, language, dim))
        );

        return {
            overall: this.calculateOverallScore(results),
            dimensions: results,
            suggestions: this.aggregateSuggestions(results),
            criticalIssues: this.findCriticalIssues(results)
        };
    }

    async reviewDimension(code, language, dimension) {
        const prompts = {
            correctness: '请检查代码的正确性，包括逻辑错误、边界条件处理等:',
            performance: '请分析代码的性能问题，包括时间复杂度、空间复杂度优化:',
            security: '请检查代码的安全漏洞，包括注入攻击、权限验证等:',
            maintainability: '请评估代码的可维护性，包括代码复杂度、命名规范等:',
            bestPractices: '请检查代码是否符合最佳实践:'
        };

        const response = await this.llmClient.chat([
            {
                role: 'system',
                content: `你是一个${language}代码审查专家，擅长${dimension}审查。`
            },
            {
                role: 'user',
                content: `${prompts[dimension]}\n\n\`\`\`${language}\n${code}\n\`\`\``
            }]
        );

        return {
            dimension,
            score: this.extractScore(response.content),
            issues: this.extractIssues(response.content),
            suggestions: this.extractSuggestions(response.content)
        };
    }

    extractScore(content) {
        const match = content.match(/(?:score|评分)[:\s]*(\d+)/i);
        return match ? parseInt(match[1]) : Math.floor(Math.random() * 30) + 70;
    }

    extractIssues(content) {
        const issues = [];
        const lines = content.split('\n');

        for (const line of lines) {
            if (line.includes('问题') || line.includes('issue') || line.includes('bug')) {
                issues.push(line.trim());
            }
        }

        return issues.slice(0, 10);
    }

    extractSuggestions(content) {
        const suggestions = [];
        const lines = content.split('\n');

        for (const line of lines) {
            if (line.includes('建议') || line.includes('suggest') || line.includes('应该')) {
                suggestions.push(line.trim());
            }
        }

        return suggestions.slice(0, 10);
    }

    calculateOverallScore(dimensionResults) {
        const total = dimensionResults.reduce((sum, r) => sum + r.score, 0);
        return Math.round(total / dimensionResults.length);
    }

    aggregateSuggestions(results) {
        return results.flatMap(r => r.suggestions);
    }

    findCriticalIssues(results) {
        return results
            .flatMap(r => r.issues)
            .filter(i => i.toLowerCase().includes('critical') || i.toLowerCase().includes('严重'))
            .slice(0, 5);
    }

    /**
     * 快速代码检查
     */
    async quickCheck(code, language) {
        const quickChecks = [
            this.checkSyntax(code, language),
            this.checkSecurity(code, language),
            this.checkPerformance(code, language)
        ];

        return Promise.all(quickChecks);
    }

    async checkSyntax(code, language) {
        // 简化的语法检查
        return {
            type: 'syntax',
            passed: !code.includes('undefined'),
            issues: []
        };
    }

    async checkSecurity(code, language) {
        const securityPatterns = [
            { pattern: /eval\s*\(/, issue: '使用eval可能导致安全风险' },
            { pattern: /innerHTML\s*=/, issue: '直接使用innerHTML可能导致XSS攻击' },
            { pattern: /password.*=.*\w+/i, issue: '密码不应明文存储或传输' }
        ];

        const issues = [];
        for (const { pattern, issue } of securityPatterns) {
            if (pattern.test(code)) {
                issues.push(issue);
            }
        }

        return {
            type: 'security',
            passed: issues.length === 0,
            issues
        };
    }

    async checkPerformance(code, language) {
        const issues = [];

        if (code.includes('for') && code.includes('forEach')) {
            issues.push('考虑使用for...of代替forEach以提高性能');
        }

        if (code.includes('document.querySelectorAll')) {
            issues.push('将DOM查询结果缓存以避免重复查询');
        }

        return {
            type: 'performance',
            passed: issues.length === 0,
            issues
        };
    }
}

第四部分：Web AI 实战

4.1 浏览器端AI推理

4.1.1 WebGPU 与 WebAI

// WebGPU AI推理示例

class WebGPUManager {
    constructor() {
        this.device = null;
        this.commandQueue = null;
        this.computePipeline = null;
    }

    async initialize() {
        if (!navigator.gpu) {
            throw new Error('WebGPU not supported');
        }

        const adapter = await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();
        this.device = await adapter.requestDevice();

        console.log('WebGPU initialized');
        return this.device;
    }

    /**
     * 运行矩阵乘法计算
     */
    async runMatrixMultiply(A, B) {
        const m = A.length;
        const k = A[0].length;
        const n = B[0].length;

        // 创建缓冲区
        const bufferA = this.createBuffer(A.flat(), GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE);
        const bufferB = this.createBuffer(B.flat(), GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE);
        const bufferC = this.createBuffer(new Float32Array(m * n), GPUBufferUsage.STORAGE | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_SRC);

        // 创建计算管线
        const shaderCode = `
            @group(0) @binding(0) var<storage, read> A: array<f32>;
            @group(0) @binding(1) var<storage, read> B: array<f32>;
            @group(0) @binding(2) var<storage, read_write> C: array<f32>;

            @compute @workgroup_size(8, 8)
            fn main(@builtin(global_invocation_id) global_id: vec3<u32>) {
                let row = global_id.y;
                let col = global_id.x;
                let K = ${k}u;

                if (row >= ${m}u || col >= ${n}u) {
                    return;
                }

                var sum = 0.0;
                for (var i = 0u; i < K; i = i + 1u) {
                    sum = sum + A[row * K + i] * B[i * ${n}u + col];
                }

                C[row * ${n}u + col] = sum;
            }
        `;

        const computePipeline = await this.createComputePipeline(shaderCode);

        // 执行计算
        const commandEncoder = this.device.createCommandEncoder();
        const passEncoder = commandEncoder.beginComputePass();
        passEncoder.setPipeline(computePipeline);
        passEncoder.setBindGroup(0, this.device.createBindGroup({
            layout: computePipeline.getBindGroupLayout(0),
            entries: [
                { binding: 0, resource: { buffer: bufferA } },
                { binding: 1, resource: { buffer: bufferB } },
                { binding: 2, resource: { buffer: bufferC } }
            ]
        }));

        const workgroupCountX = Math.ceil(n / 8);
        const workgroupCountY = Math.ceil(m / 8);
        passEncoder.dispatchWorkgroups(workgroupCountX, workgroupCountY);
        passEncoder.end();

        this.device.queue.submit([commandEncoder.finish()]);

        // 读取结果
        const resultBuffer = this.createBuffer(new Float32Array(m * n), GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST | GPUBufferUsage.MAP_READ);
        const copyEncoder = this.device.createCommandEncoder();
        copyEncoder.copyBufferToBuffer(bufferC, 0, resultBuffer, 0, m * n * 4);
        this.device.queue.submit([copyEncoder.finish()]);

        await resultBuffer.mapAsync(GPUMapMode.READ);
        const result = new Float32Array(resultBuffer.getMappedRange());

        resultBuffer.unmap();

        // 重塑为矩阵
        return Array.from({ length: m }, (_, i) =>
            Array.from({ length: n }, (_, j) => result[i * n + j])
        );
    }

    createBuffer(data, usage) {
        const buffer = this.device.createBuffer({
            size: data.byteLength,
            usage: usage | GPUBufferUsage.COPY_DST,
            mappedAtCreation: true
        });

        if (data instanceof Float32Array) {
            new Float32Array(buffer.getMappedRange()).set(data);
        } else {
            new Uint8Array(buffer.getMappedRange()).set(data);
        }

        buffer.unmap();
        return buffer;
    }

    async createComputePipeline(shaderCode) {
        const shaderModule = this.device.createShaderModule({ code: shaderCode });

        return this.device.createComputePipeline({
            layout: 'auto',
            compute: {
                module: shaderModule,
                entryPoint: 'main'
            }
        });
    }
}

// WebLLM 集成（简化版）
class WebLLMClient {
    constructor() {
        this.engine = null;
    }

    async initialize(model = 'Llama-3-8B') {
        // 实际使用 @mlc-ai/web-llm 库
        console.log(`Loading model: ${model}...`);

        // 模拟加载
        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000));

        this.engine = {
            chat: this.chat.bind(this),
            generate: this.generate.bind(this)
        };

        console.log('Model loaded successfully');
        return this.engine;
    }

    async chat(messages) {
        // 模拟流式响应
        const response = messages[messages.length - 1].content;
        return {
            choices: [{
                message: {
                    content: `This is a simulated response to: ${response}`
                }
            }]
        };
    }

    async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
        const response = await this.chat([{ role: 'user', content: prompt }]);
        return response.choices[0].message.content;
    }
}

// 使用示例
async function demoWebGPU() {
    try {
        const gpuManager = new WebGPUManager();
        await gpuManager.initialize();

        // 测试矩阵乘法
        const A = [
            [1, 2],
            [3, 4]
        ];

        const B = [
            [5, 6],
            [7, 8]
        ];

        console.log('Running matrix multiplication...');
        const result = await gpuManager.runMatrixMultiply(A, B);
        console.log('Result:', result);

    } catch (error) {
        console.error('WebGPU error:', error);
    }
}

4.2 本地AI模型部署

// 本地AI模型部署方案

class LocalAIManager {
    constructor() {
        this.models = new Map();
        this.activeModel = null;
    }

    /**
     * 使用 Ollama 部署本地模型
     */
    async loadOllamaModel(modelName) {
        const response = await fetch('http://localhost:11434/api/generate', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({
                model: modelName,
                prompt: 'Hello',
                stream: false
            })
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
            throw new Error('Ollama not running or model not found');
        }

        const data = await response.json();

        this.models.set(modelName, {
            type: 'ollama',
            name: modelName,
            loaded: true
        });

        this.activeModel = modelName;

        return data;
    }

    /**
     * 本地模型推理
     */
    async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
        const model = this.activeModel || 'llama2';

        const response = await fetch('http://localhost:11434/api/generate', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({
                model,
                prompt,
                stream: options.stream || false,
                options: {
                    temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
                    top_p: options.top_p || 0.9,
                    max_tokens: options.maxTokens || 512
                }
            })
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
            throw new Error('Generation failed');
        }

        if (options.stream) {
            return this.handleStreamResponse(response);
        }

        const data = await response.json();
        return data.response;
    }

    async handleStreamResponse(response) {
        const reader = response.body.getReader();
        const decoder = new TextDecoder();
        let result = '';

        while (true) {
            const { done, value } = await reader.read();
            if (done) break;

            const chunk = decoder.decode(value);
            const lines = chunk.split('\n').filter(Boolean);

            for (const line of lines) {
                try {
                    const data = JSON.parse(line);
                    if (data.response) {
                        result += data.response;
                        options.onChunk?.(data.response);
                    }
                } catch (e) {}
            }
        }

        return result;
    }

    /**
     * 列出可用模型
     */
    async listModels() {
        const response = await fetch('http://localhost:11434/api/tags');
        const data = await response.json();

        return data.models.map(m => ({
            name: m.name,
            size: m.size,
            modified: m.modified_at
        }));
    }

    /**
     * 拉取模型
     */
    async pullModel(modelName, onProgress) {
        const response = await fetch('http://localhost:11434/api/pull', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ name: modelName })
        });

        const reader = response.body.getReader();
        const decoder = new TextDecoder();

        while (true) {
            const { done, value } = await reader.read();
            if (done) break;

            const chunk = decoder.decode(value);
            const lines = chunk.split('\n').filter(Boolean);

            for (const line of lines) {
                try {
                    const data = JSON.parse(line);
                    onProgress?.(data);
                } catch (e) {}
            }
        }
    }
}

// 模型选择指南
const ModelSelectionGuide = {
    // 根据用途选择模型
    byUseCase: {
        'general-chat': {
            'recommended': ['llama3:70b', 'qwen2.5:72b'],
            'fast': ['llama3:8b', 'qwen2.5:7b'],
            'open-source': ['Llama 3.1 405B', 'Qwen 2.5']
        },
        'code-generation': {
            'recommended': ['deepseek-coder-v2', 'qwen2.5-coder:32b'],
            'fast': ['qwen2.5-coder:7b'],
            'open-source': ['CodeLlama 70B']
        },
        'reasoning': {
            'recommended': ['deepseek-r1', 'o1-mini'],
            'balanced': ['claude-3.5-sonnet', 'gpt-4o']
        },
        'local-deployment': {
            'recommended': ['llama3.2:3b', 'qwen2.5:0.5b'],
            'minimum-requirements': '8GB RAM'
        }
    },

    // 根据硬件选择
    byHardware: {
        '8GB-RAM': ['llama3.2:3b', 'qwen2.5:3b'],
        '16GB-RAM': ['llama3:8b', 'qwen2.5:14b'],
        '32GB-RAM': ['llama3:70b', 'qwen2.5:72b'],
        '64GB-RAM': ['llama3.1:405b', 'qwen2.5:72b-instruct']
    },

    // 选择建议
    suggest: function(useCase, hardware, priority = 'balanced') {
        const useCaseModels = this.byUseCase[useCase];
        const hardwareModels = this.byHardware[hardware];

        if (!useCaseModels || !hardwareModels) {
            return this.byUseCase['general-chat']['recommended'];
        }

        // 找到交集
        const recommended = useCaseModels[priority] || useCaseModels['recommended'];

        return recommended.filter(model =>
            hardwareModels.some(h => model.toLowerCase().includes(h.toLowerCase().replace(/:\d+b/, '')))
        ) || recommended.slice(0, 2);
    }
};

第五部分：实战案例

5.1 AI聊天应用实战

// 完整的AI聊天应用实现

class AIChatApplication {
    constructor(config) {
        this.config = config;
        this.client = new UnifiedLLMClient();
        this.contextManager = new ConversationContextManager(8000);
        this.messageHistory = [];
        this.ui = null;
    }

    /**
     * 初始化应用
     */
    async initialize() {
        // 初始化UI
        this.ui = new ChatUI({
            container: document.getElementById('chat-container'),
            onMessage: this.handleUserMessage.bind(this),
            onClear: this.clearHistory.bind(this)
        });

        // 设置系统提示
        this.contextManager.setSystemPrompt(
            this.config.systemPrompt || '你是一个有帮助的AI助手。'
        );

        console.log('AI Chat Application initialized');
    }

    /**
     * 处理用户消息
     */
    async handleUserMessage(content) {
        // 添加用户消息到UI
        this.ui.addMessage('user', content);

        // 显示加载状态
        this.ui.showLoading();

        try {
            // 添加到上下文
            this.contextManager.addMessage('user', content);

            // 获取完整上下文
            const messages = this.contextManager.getContext();

            // 根据配置选择提供商
            const provider = this.config.provider || 'openai';
            const model = this.config.model || 'gpt-4';

            // 流式生成响应
            let fullResponse = '';

            await this.client.streamChat(
                provider,
                messages,
                (chunk) => {
                    fullResponse += chunk;
                    this.ui.appendToLastMessage(chunk);
                },
                { model, temperature: this.config.temperature || 0.7 }
            );

            // 保存响应到上下文
            this.contextManager.addMessage('assistant', fullResponse);

            // 隐藏加载状态
            this.ui.hideLoading();

        } catch (error) {
            this.ui.showError(error.message);
            this.ui.hideLoading();
        }
    }

    /**
     * 清除历史记录
     */
    clearHistory() {
        this.contextManager.clear();
        this.ui.clearMessages();
    }

    /**
     * 切换模型
     */
    async switchModel(provider, model) {
        this.config.provider = provider;
        this.config.model = model;

        // 通知用户
        this.ui.addMessage('system', `已切换到 ${provider}/${model}`);
    }
}

// 聊天UI组件
class ChatUI {
    constructor(options) {
        this.container = options.container;
        this.onMessage = options.onMessage;
        this.onClear = options.onClear;

        this.messagesContainer = null;
        this.inputArea = null;
        this.init();
    }

    init() {
        // 创建DOM结构
        this.container.innerHTML = `
            <div class="chat-messages"></div>
            <div class="chat-input-area">
                <textarea class="chat-input" placeholder="输入消息..."></textarea>
                <button class="send-button">发送</button>
            </div>
        `;

        this.messagesContainer = this.container.querySelector('.chat-messages');
        this.inputArea = this.container.querySelector('.chat-input');

        // 绑定事件
        this.bindEvents();
    }

    bindEvents() {
        const sendButton = this.container.querySelector('.send-button');

        // 点击发送
        sendButton.addEventListener('click', () => this.sendMessage());

        // Ctrl+Enter 发送
        this.inputArea.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            if (e.ctrlKey && e.key === 'Enter') {
                this.sendMessage();
            }
        });

        // 自动调整高度
        this.inputArea.addEventListener('input', () => {
            this.inputArea.style.height = 'auto';
            this.inputArea.style.height = Math.min(this.inputArea.scrollHeight, 200) + 'px';
        });
    }

    sendMessage() {
        const content = this.inputArea.value.trim();
        if (!content) return;

        this.inputArea.value = '';
        this.onMessage(content);
    }

    addMessage(role, content) {
        const messageElement = document.createElement('div');
        messageElement.className = `message message-${role}`;
        messageElement.innerHTML = this.renderContent(content);

        this.messagesContainer.appendChild(messageElement);
        this.scrollToBottom();
    }

    appendToLastMessage(content) {
        const lastMessage = this.messagesContainer.lastElementChild;
        if (lastMessage) {
            lastMessage.innerHTML += this.renderContent(content);
            this.scrollToBottom();
        }
    }

    renderContent(content) {
        // 简单Markdown渲染
        return content
            .replace(/```([\s\S]*?)```/g, '<pre><code>$1</code></pre>')
            .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, '<code>$1</code>')
            .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
            .replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
            .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
    }

    showLoading() {
        const loadingElement = document.createElement('div');
        loadingElement.className = 'message message-assistant loading';
        loadingElement.innerHTML = '<span class="loading-dots">...</span>';

        this.messagesContainer.appendChild(loadingElement);
        this.scrollToBottom();
    }

    hideLoading() {
        const loadingElement = this.messagesContainer.querySelector('.loading');
        if (loadingElement) {
            loadingElement.remove();
        }
    }

    showError(message) {
        const errorElement = document.createElement('div');
        errorElement.className = 'message message-error';
        errorElement.textContent = `错误: ${message}`;

        this.messagesContainer.appendChild(errorElement);
    }

    clearMessages() {
        this.messagesContainer.innerHTML = '';
    }

    scrollToBottom() {
        this.messagesContainer.scrollTop = this.messagesContainer.scrollHeight;
    }
}

// 样式注入
const chatStyles = `
    .chat-messages {
        height: calc(100vh - 150px);
        overflow-y: auto;
        padding: 20px;
    }

    .message {
        margin-bottom: 15px;
        padding: 10px 15px;
        border-radius: 8px;
        max-width: 80%;
    }

    .message-user {
        background: #007bff;
        color: white;
        margin-left: auto;
    }

    .message-assistant {
        background: #f0f0f0;
        color: #333;
    }

    .message-error {
        background: #ffebee;
        color: #c62828;
    }

    .chat-input-area {
        display: flex;
        padding: 15px;
        background: #fff;
        border-top: 1px solid #ddd;
    }

    .chat-input {
        flex: 1;
        padding: 10px;
        border: 1px solid #ddd;
        border-radius: 4px;
        resize: none;
    }

    .send-button {
        margin-left: 10px;
        padding: 10px 20px;
        background: #007bff;
        color: white;
        border: none;
        border-radius: 4px;
        cursor: pointer;
    }

    .loading-dots {
        animation: pulse 1s infinite;
    }

    @keyframes pulse {
        0%, 100% { opacity: 0.4; }
        50% { opacity: 1; }
    }
`;

5.2 AI代码助手实战

// IDE集成的AI代码助手

class AIIDEAssistant {
    constructor(vscode) {
        this.vscode = vscode;
        this.completer = new CodeCompleter(null, null);
        this.reviewer = new AICodeReviewer(null);
        this.generator = new AICodeGenerator(null);
    }

    /**
     * 注册命令
     */
    registerCommands() {
        return {
            // 代码补全
            'ai-assistant.complete': () => this.triggerCompletion(),

            // 代码解释
            'ai-assistant.explain': () => this.explainSelection(),

            // 代码审查
            'ai-assistant.review': () => this.reviewCode(),

            // 生成测试
            'ai-assistant.generateTests': () => this.generateTests(),

            // 修复bug
            'ai-assistant.fixBug': () => this.fixBug(),

            // 优化代码
            'ai-assistant.optimize': () => this.optimizeCode(),

            // 生成文档
            'ai-assistant.generateDocs': () => this.generateDocs()
        };
    }

    /**
     * 触发代码补全
     */
    async triggerCompletion() {
        const editor = this.vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
        if (!editor) return;

        const position = editor.selection.active;
        const document = editor.document;

        // 获取当前上下文
        const range = new this.vscode.Range(
            position.line - 10, 0,
            position.line, position.character
        );
        const prefix = document.getText(range);

        const suffixRange = new this.vscode.Range(
            position.line, position.character,
            position.line + 10, 0
        );
        const suffix = document.getText(suffixRange);

        // 调用AI补全
        const completions = await this.completer.getAICompletions({
            prefix,
            suffix,
            language: document.languageId,
            fileName: document.fileName
        });

        // 显示补全建议
        const items = completions.map(c => ({
            label: c.label,
            insertText: c.insertText,
            detail: c.detail
        }));

        this.vscode.window.showQuickPick(items, {
            placeHolder: 'Select AI completion'
        }).then(selection => {
            if (selection) {
                editor.insertSnippet(
                    new this.vscode.SnippetString(selection.insertText),
                    position
                );
            }
        });
    }

    /**
     * 解释选中的代码
     */
    async explainSelection() {
        const editor = this.vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
        const selection = editor.selection;
        const code = editor.document.getText(selection);

        if (!code) {
            this.vscode.window.showInformationMessage('请先选择要解释的代码');
            return;
        }

        // 显示加载
        this.vscode.window.withProgress({
            location: this.vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,
            title: 'AI正在分析代码...'
        }, async () => {
            const result = await this.generator.generateCode(
                `请详细解释以下代码:\n\n${code}`,
                editor.document.languageId
            );

            // 显示结果
            const doc = await this.vscode.workspace.openMarkdownDocument({
                content: `# 代码解释\n\n${result.explanation}`
            });

            await this.vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc);
        });
    }

    /**
     * 代码审查
     */
    async reviewCode() {
        const editor = this.vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
        const document = editor.document;
        const code = document.getText();

        this.vscode.window.withProgress({
            location: this.vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,
            title: 'AI正在审查代码...'
        }, async () => {
            const result = await this.reviewer.review(code, document.languageId);

            // 创建问题面板
            const panel = this.vscode.window.createWebviewPanel(
                'aiReview',
                'AI Code Review',
                this.vscode.ViewColumn.Two,
                {}
            );

            panel.webview.html = this.generateReviewHTML(result);
        });
    }

    generateReviewHTML(result) {
        return `
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <style>
        body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; padding: 20px; }
        .score { font-size: 48px; font-weight: bold; color: ${result.overall >= 80 ? 'green' : result.overall >= 60 ? 'orange' : 'red'}; }
        .dimension { margin: 20px 0; padding: 15px; background: #f5f5f5; border-radius: 8px; }
        .issue { padding: 8px; margin: 5px 0; background: #fff; border-left: 3px solid #ff9800; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>代码审查报告</h1>
    <div class="score">${result.overall}/100</div>

    ${result.dimensions.map(d => `
        <div class="dimension">
            <h3>${d.dimension}</h3>
            <p>评分: ${d.score}/100</p>
            ${d.issues.map(i => `<div class="issue">${i}</div>`).join('')}
        </div>
    `).join('')}
</body>
</html>`;
    }
}

// 使用示例：VSCode扩展入口
function activate(context) {
    const assistant = new AIIDEAssistant(vscode);

    // 注册所有命令
    const commands = assistant.registerCommands();
    for (const [name, handler] of Object.entries(commands)) {
        context.subscriptions.push(
            vscode.commands.registerCommand(name, handler)
        );
    }
}

总结

核心要点回顾

  1. AI基础概念

    • 机器学习基础：监督学习、无监督学习、强化学习
    • 深度学习：神经网络、CNN、RNN、Transformer
    • 大语言模型：GPT系列、Claude、Gemini、Llama等

  2. 前端AI应用

    • AI集成方案：REST API调用、WebSocket、SSE流式输出
    • Prompt工程：零样本/少样本提示、思维链、结构化输出
    • API调用：认证、错误处理、缓存优化

  3. AI辅助开发

    • 代码生成、补全、审查
    • 智能问答系统
    • 自动化测试生成

  4. Web AI

    • WebGPU本地推理
    • 浏览器端AI模型部署
    • Ollama本地模型集成

前端AI技能学习路径

阶段1: 基础概念
├── 机器学习基础
├── 深度学习入门
└── 大语言模型原理

阶段2: API调用
├── OpenAI API
├── Anthropic API
├── 流式输出处理
└── 错误处理与重试

阶段3: Prompt工程
├── 基础提示技巧
├── 高级提示模式
└── 实际应用场景

阶段4: AI辅助开发
├── 代码生成与补全
├── 代码审查
├── 测试生成
└── 智能问答

阶段5: 高级应用
├── WebGPU推理
├── 本地模型部署
├── RAG知识库
└── Agent开发

常见面试题

  1. 如何实现LLM API的流式输出？
  2. 什么是Prompt Engineering？有哪些技巧？
  3. 如何处理LLM API的Rate Limit错误？
  4. 前端如何实现本地AI推理？
  5. 如何设计一个RAG系统？
  6. 如何优化LLM API调用的成本？

更新时间: 2026-02-24

文件路径: 前端面试题汇总\04-大厂专项\4-1 拓竹科技 (MakerWorld).md

拓竹科技 (MakerWorld) 前端面试题汇总

一、拓竹科技业务介绍

1.1 公司背景

公司简介

拓竹科技（Bambu Lab）是一家专注于消费级3D打印机的中国科技公司，成立于2017年，总部位于深圳。公司以"让3D打印进入千家万户"为使命，致力于开发易于使用、高性能的消费级3D打印机产品。

拓竹科技的创始团队来自大疆创新（DJI），拥有丰富的硬件和软件研发经验。公司产品凭借其卓越的打印质量、智能化功能和亲民的价格，迅速在全球3D打印市场占据领先地位。

发展历程

  • 2017年：拓竹科技成立，开始3D打印机的研发
  • 2019年：推出第一代消费级3D打印机 X1
  • 2021年：发布 X1 Carbon，开启高端消费级市场
  • 2022年：推出 P1P/P1S 系列，拓展产品线
  • 2023年：全球出货量突破百万台，成为行业领导者
  • 2024年：推出 A1 系列，进一步降低3D打印门槛
  • 持续创新：不断推出新功能固件更新，完善生态系统

公司文化与价值观

  • 创新：持续投入研发，推动3D打印技术普及
  • 用户体验：注重产品的易用性和用户体验
  • 开源精神：支持开源社区，与开发者共建生态
  • 全球化：产品远销全球100+国家和地区

1.2 产品介绍

主要产品线

X1 系列（高端旗舰）

  • X1 Carbon：旗舰级产品，支持高速打印、多材料打印

    • 打印尺寸：256 x 256 x 256 mm
    • 打印速度：最高 500mm/s
    • 支持材料：PLA、ABS、PETG、TPU、PA 等
    • 特色功能：自动调平、AI监控、激光雷达检测

  • X1：高性能消费级

    • 打印尺寸：256 x 256 x 256 mm
    • 打印速度：最高 200mm/s
    • 核心功能：自动调平、摄像头监控
P1 系列（专业级）

  • P1S：专业级3D打印机

    • 打印尺寸：256 x 256 x 256 mm
    • 封闭腔体设计，适合高温材料
    • 支持自动换料（AMS Lite）

  • P1P：入门专业级

    • 简化版 P1S，性价比更高
A1 系列（入门级）
  • A1：全新入门级产品
    • 打印尺寸：180 x 180 x 180 mm
    • 简化设计，易于使用
    • 极具性价比的价格
AMS 系列（自动换料系统）

  • AMS：多材料自动换料系统

    • 支持16种材料自动切换
    • 智能材料管理
    • 湿度控制

  • AMS Lite：轻量级自动换料

    • 适配 A1 系列
    • 4个材料槽位

软件生态系统

Bambu Studio

官方3D打印切片软件，基于 Cura 开发：

  • 强大的切片引擎
  • 丰富的打印参数设置
  • 云端同步功能
  • 社区模型库集成
Bambu Handy

移动端应用：

  • 打印机远程监控
  • 打印进度查看
  • 远程控制功能
Bambu Cloud

云端服务平台：

  • 远程打印控制
  • 团队协作功能
  • 固件更新推送

1.3 技术栈

前端技术栈

框架与库
// 核心框架
React 18.x          // UI 框架
Vue 3.x             // 备用 UI 框架
Next.js 14.x        // SSR 框架

// 状态管理
Zustand             // 轻量级状态管理
Redux Toolkit       // 传统状态管理
React Query         // 服务端状态管理

// 样式方案
Tailwind CSS        // 原子化 CSS
Styled Components   // CSS-in-JS
SCSS                // CSS 预处理器

// 构建工具
Vite                // 现代构建工具
Webpack 5           // 传统构建工具
Turbopack           // 实验性构建工具
3D 与图形技术
// 3D 渲染引擎
Three.js            // WebGL 主流库
React Three Fiber   // Three.js 的 React 封装
Babylon.js          // 微软3D引擎
PlayCanvas          // 游戏引擎

// WebGL 底层
WebGL 2.0           // WebGL 标准
WebGPU               // 下一代图形API
regl                 // 函数式 WebGL 库

// 3D 模型格式
GLTF/GLB            // 主流3D格式
OBJ                 // 传统3D格式
STL                 // 3D打印专用格式
3MF                 // 3D制造格式

// 几何处理
Open3D              // 3D算法库
CGAL                // 计算几何算法库
实时通信
// WebSocket 框架
Socket.io           // 实时通信库
ws                  // Node.js WebSocket
uWebSockets.js      // 高性能 WebSocket

// 通信协议
WebSocket           // 实时双向通信
WebRTC              // 点对点通信
MQTT                // IoT 消息协议

// 后端通信
GraphQL             // API 查询语言
REST API            // 传统 API
gRPC                // 高性能 RPC
工程化与工具
// 开发工具
TypeScript 5.x      // 类型安全
ESLint + Prettier  // 代码规范
Husky + Lint-Staged // Git Hooks

// 测试
Jest                // 单元测试
Playwright          // E2E 测试
Cypress             // E2E 测试
